证据节点ID: 6091e48a-f68e-434f-8d04-41e828a17295, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'HTAP_v2.2 dataset validation with atmospheric transport models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Davidon-Fletcher-Powell方法实现后验误差估计：逆Hessian矩阵通过Hessian(J_f)^{-1}≈[(DH_f)^T E^{-1}(DH_f)+B^{-1}]^{-1}计算，其中E为观测误差协方差，B为先验误差协方差（公式12）。,理由是给出大气化学反演中后验误差估计的核心数学模型（含完整公式），对不确定性量化研究有直接方法论价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['a posteriori error covariance', 'inverse Hessian matrix', 'DFP updating formula']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'First space-based derivation of the global atmosph', 'text': 'by Millet et al. (2008) (Table 1), which was constrained by aircraft data, and are significantly lower compared to the Jacob et al. (2005) source. In opposition to these findings, a strong increase with respect to the Jacob et al. (2005) emissions was invoked by Dufour et al. (2007) during spring and summer in the Northern Hemisphere in order to explain the large mixing ratios sampled over high-latitude regions between 6 and  $14\\mathrm{km}$  by the ACE-FTS sensor. Although our model is also found to underpredict methanol concentrations in the free troposphere during the INTEX-A and NEAQS missions (Fig. 7), as well as over the Northern Atlantic (not shown), lower biogenic emissions are supported by both surface and aircraft measurements in the boundary layer. As discussed above, this underestimation might have multiple causes (cf. Sect. 10).\n\n# 9 A posteriori error estimation\n\nThe errors on the a posteriori emission estimates are calculated by applying an off-line iterative approximation of the inverse Hessian matrix, which relies on the Davidon-Fletcher-Powell (DFP) updating formula (Fletcher, 1990). When assuming that the model is linear or not too far from being linear, the a posteriori error covariance matrix is related to the Hessian of the cost function  $J$  through the expression:\n\n$$\nE _ {\\text {p o s t}} = \\left[ (\\mathbf {D} \\mathbf {H}) _ {f} ^ {T} \\mathbf {E} ^ {- 1} (\\mathbf {D} \\mathbf {H}) _ {f} + \\mathbf {B} ^ {- 1} \\right] ^ {- 1} = (\\mathbf {I} \\mathbf {H}) _ {f}, \\tag {12}\n$$\n\nwhere  $(\\mathbf{IH})_f$  is the inverse Hessian matrix evaluated at the point  $f$ ,  $(\\mathbf{IH})_f = \\mathbf{Hessian}(J)_f^{-1}$ ,  $\\mathbf{DH}$  is the Jacobian matrix of the model, and  $\\mathbf{E}$  and  $\\mathbf{B}$  are as in Eq. 11 (see Müller and Stavrakou (2005) for details). The inverse Hessian matrix is estimated iteratively using the new information obtained at each step  $k$  of the minimization procedure through the DFP formula:', 'summary': 'by Millet et al. (2008) (Table 1), which was constrained by aircraft data, and are significantly lower compared to the Jacob et al. (2005) source. In ...'}, 来自论文ID: first_space-based_derivation_of_the_global_atmosph, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: b873da59-69cb-42d7-b1bc-cc5c9536c765, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为清洁供暖项目（WCHP）需平衡成本效益，建议经济压力大地区采用清洁煤过渡，并强调因地制宜政策设计与低收入群体补贴。,理由是聚焦政策实施痛点但缺乏具体污染数据支撑，方法论部分提及数据尺度差异可能是通用局限。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Clean heating transition cost', 'Energy poverty mitigation', 'Regional policy differentiation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Does energy transition improve air quality_ Eviden', 'text': 'On the one hand, even though the WCHP project has proven to be an effective mean to control winter-derived heating emissions, the cost of this project should not be ignored. The conversion cost of "coal-to-gas/electricity" is higher and includes a subsequent increase in the cost of gas. Replacing unprocessed coal with clean coal can be used as a transitional method in the ultimate goal of energy transition for regions that experience considerable financial governmental pressure and low residential income. The government should focus on reforming the cost of electricity/gas by updating to more advanced heating technology and devices. On the other hand, since the reduction effect of the WCHP project on regional air quality varies under different development levels and resource distributions, project control should be delegated to regional governments based on local features rather than following the outdated pattern of "one-size-fits-all". In order to minimize the negative impact of clean heating policies on energy poverty and energy consumption inequality, the government should provide subsidies to clean energy more affordable to low-income groups.\n\nThere are two limitations in this study. First, lack of mid- and long-term monitoring data will hinder the assessment of the longterm effects of this policy. Second, although pollutant concentrations are characterized by daily scale data, macroeconomic variables are characterized by annual scale data. Estimation bias may thus occur due to such unmatched scale data.\n\n# CRediT authorship contribution statement\n\nYali Zhang: Conceptualization, Methodology, Writing - original draft. Wenqi Li: Data curation, Software, Visualization. Feng Wu: Supervision, Writing - review & editing.\n\n# Declaration of competing interest\n\nThe authors declare that they have no known competing financial interests or personal relationships that could have appeared to influence the work reported in this paper.\n\n# Acknowledgement', 'summary': 'On the one hand, even though the WCHP project has proven to be an effective mean to control winter-derived heating emissions, the cost of this project...'}, 来自论文ID: does_energy_transition_improve_air_quality__eviden, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 42d01c8d-c38c-4e13-acd4-0c9e95be442e, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图1展示了中国2015-2020年清洁煤炭技术政策(CCTPs)的实施时间线，结合文本说明这些政策是可持续煤炭利用和验证'十三五'能源减排目标的关键依据,理由是证据包含具体政策时间线可视化图表，并明确指向国家能源管理局原始数据，提供了深挖政策效果评估的论文线索,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CCTPs', '13th FYP energy targets', 'coal upgrading technologies']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven', 'text': "Concerning the effective implementation of China's CCTs, many scholars have analyzed the technical conditions and potential environmental burdens, which are mainly centred on coal upgrading processing, clean coal-fired power generation, and the modern coal chemical industry (He et al., 2019; Ren et al., 2021). Nevertheless, it is reported that influenced by the lack of CCTPs and the hysteresis of policy formulation and implementation, the development of CCTs was restricted during earlier years (Tang et al., 2015). Therefore, it is an urgent task to identify the effectiveness of CCTPs, providing a significant reference for the\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/c4f64a11-f495-42ce-8d5d-d616f8721d59/e2a641258d9c556417723b2b30e26dc81c8ea01021348895e04fe692a76bb275.jpg)  \nFig. 1. Timeline of CCTPs implemented in China during 2015-2020. (Note: the public information is collected from the National Energy Administration, and the illustration is made by the authors).\n\nenterprises and the public to utilize coal resources more sustainably and cleanly, and meanwhile, verifying the emission reduction targets of the energy sector during the 13th FYP.", 'summary': "Concerning the effective implementation of China's CCTs, many scholars have analyzed the technical conditions and potential environmental burdens, whi..."}, 来自论文ID: air_quality_changes_in_china_2013-2020__effectiven, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: be31354d-661f-49e3-8684-2a052ade51ce, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'isoprene, monoterpenes, and aromatics formation pathways (Liao et al., 2007; Henze et al., 2008) and (2) the irreversible uptake of dicarbonyl by aqueous aerosols and cloud drops (Fu et al., 2008). We updated the gas-phase chemistry in the GEOS-Chem model and constructed its adjoint. The a priori NMVOC emission estimates from biogenic, anthropogenic, and biomass burning sources were taken from the inventories developed by Guenther et al. (2006), Li et al. (2014, 2017), and Huang et al. (2012), respectively, as well as van der Werf et al. (2010). We con\n\nduced four inversion experiments, which were constrained by the formaldehyde and glyoxal observations from GOME-2A (IE-1), the formaldehyde and glyoxal observations from OMI (IE-2), the formaldehyde observations from GOME-2A scaled by 1.7 (IE-3), and the glyoxal observations from OMI (IE-4). Microwave digester was used as the pretreatment of collected filter samples. In order to find out the content of crustal elements in the\n\n$\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  samples, it is necessary to pretreat the collected filter membranes.                         这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven', 'text': 'Clean and efficient use of coal in China entered the implementation stage in 2015, and a series of policies were established to promote the sustainable development of clean coal technologies (CCTs). However, the long-term effects of the clean coal technology policies (CCTPs) have not been evaluated, and the outbreak of coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) would bring great uncertainty regarding the effectiveness evaluation. Employing deep learning approaches and spatial autocorrelation analysis, the present work intended to explore the air quality variation before and after the implementation of CCTPs, and investigate the association between air quality and socioeconomic factors to explore the internal mechanism of air quality improvement. Results showed that after implementing CCTPs, the air quality index (AQI) had an average reduction of  $18.82\\%$  and the identical drop in air pollution in 2018 implied a 2-year time lag of CCTPs. Additionally, emission reduction and deindustrialization were explored as two promising ways to improve air quality while promoting energy transformation. The findings indicated that the Chinese government ought to pay more attention to long-term plans; industrial restructuring and environmental protection should be insisted upon to realize sustainable energy development. By providing a perspective on air quality improvement after the policies are implemented, this study can lead practitioners and academia to a comprehensive and objective view of clean coal policies.\n\n# 1.                 状态: ⏳ [PENDING/DUPLICATE] (本次未进行新一轮详细评估，建议参考历史信息或Metadata)。
                这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'This data set was prepared as emission input for the HTAP community of modellers and its preparation has involved outreach to global and regional climate and air quality modellers (collaborating also within the AQMEII and MICS-Asia modelling exercises). The TF HTAP needed an emission inventory that was suitable for simultaneous and comparable modelling of air quality at the regional scale and at the global scale to deliver consistent policy support at both scales. The HTAP-v2.2 emission inventory presented in this paper is tailor-made to allow the TF HTAP to fulfil its prime objectives and contribute to a common international understanding of global and regional air pollution and its influence on human health, vegetation and climate. The use of the HTAPv2.2 inventory will substantially help to provide a basis for future international policies because it combines and is consistent with the inventories that are used for regional (EU, US Canada, China) policy analysis and support.\n\n# Data availability\n\nThe  $0.1^{\\circ} \\times 0.1^{\\circ}$  emission grid maps can be downloaded from the EDGAR website on http://edgar.jrc.ec.europa.eu/htap_v2/index.php?SECURE=123 per year, per substance and per sector either in the format of netcdf-files or .txt files. The emissions in the netcdf-files are expressed in kg substance  $\\mathrm{m}^{-2} \\mathrm{s}^{-1}$  but the emissions in the .txt are in ton substance/gridcell. For the NMVOC speciated grid maps we\n\nrefer to the link on the ECCAD data portal: http://eccad2.sedoo.fr/eccad2/mapdisplay.xhtml?faces-redirect=_true.\n\n# The Supplement related to this article is available online at doi:10.5194/acp-15-11411-2015-supplement.', 'summary': 'This data set was prepared as emission input for the HTAP community of modellers and its preparation has involved outreach to global and regional clim...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

--------------------------------------------------

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为文中详细描述了 PM2.5 的组分分析方法，包括有机碳（OC）和元素碳（EC）的检测使用 DRI 热碳分析仪，水溶离子通过离子色谱仪分析，以及 21 种地壳元素通过 ICP-MS 检测。同时，提出真实道路条件下 PM2.5 排放因子的计算公式： EF = (Δm · V · R) / (V₁ S)，用于量化车辆排放。,理由是证据提供具体检测方法和排放因子公式，与空气污染研究强相关，可深挖源论文中的实验数据和方法。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['IMPROVE-A protocol', 'ICP-MS analysis', 'real-world emission factor']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'On-road emissions of fine particles and associated', 'text': 'Carbonaceous aerosols consisted of organic carbon (OC), elemental carbon (EC), and a small amount of carbonate. Since carbonates were very small part in atmospheric particles and the proportion of carbonates was less than  $5\\%$  of total carbon (TC), they would not be discussed in this study. The DRI thermal carbon analyzer (IMPROVE-A, DRI, USA) was used to detect the concentration of OC and EC, when  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sample was collected without the pretreatment after equilibrium weighing. Several water-soluble ions in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emitted from the tested vehicles were analyzed, which included  $\\mathrm{K}^{+}$ ,  $\\mathrm{Ca}^{2+}$ ,  $\\mathrm{Na}^{+}$ ,  $\\mathrm{Mg}^{2+}$ ,  $\\mathrm{NH}_4^+$ ,  $\\mathrm{Cl}^-$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-}$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_3^-$  and  $\\mathrm{F}^-$ . Ion chromatograph (IC) was used to analyze the water-soluble ions that collected on the filter. 21 crustal elements including Na, Mg, K, Ca, V, Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn, Ga, As, Rb, Sr, Ag, Cd, Cs, Ba and Pb were detected by inductively coupled plasma mass spectrometry (ICP-MS). Microwave digester was used as the pretreatment of collected filter samples. In order to find out the content of crustal elements in the\n\n$\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  samples, it is necessary to pretreat the collected filter membranes. The process of both pretreating and subsequent storage should avoid mixing the crustal elements to be tested.\n\n# 2.3. Evaluation of  $PM_{2.5}$  emissions\n\nThe mass difference of the sampled membrane could be calculated by weighing the masses before and after  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sampling. The real-time flow rate of vehicle emissions could be obtained by PEMS, and the driving conditions of tested vehicles were recorded by GPS. Emission factor of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  under real driving conditions could be calculated by Equation (1).\n\n$$\nE F = \\frac {\\Delta m \\cdot V \\cdot R}{V _ {1} S} \\tag {1}\n$$', 'summary': 'Carbonaceous aerosols consisted of organic carbon (OC), elemental carbon (EC), and a small amount of carbonate. Since carbonates were very small part ...'}, 来自论文ID: on-road_emissions_of_fine_particles_and_associated, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Striking impacts of biomass burning on  $_mathrm{P', 'text': 'effects, are also limited by reaction rate, and higher  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations period in general reflects a faster particle accumulation rate therein. In this regard, the peak of changes in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  tend to be towards the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentration peak time, not necessarily the same as, though should be close to, peak time of changes in meteorological parameters, i.e., around 3:00 p.m. in this case (dashed pink line in Fig. 7b).\n\nIn addition to the surface level, the vertical profile of changes in meteorological parameters due to aerosol direct radiative effects from November 1 to 7, 2017 is displayed in Fig. 8. The near-surface air temperature and wind speed generally decrease, with the maximum decrease of  $0.5\\mathrm{K}$  and  $0.4\\mathrm{ms}^{-1}$ , respectively, whereas they increase slightly at the top of PBL. The opposite pattern is clearly discernible for RH. Specifically, aerosol radiative effects increase RH near the ground, with the largest increase of  $1\\%$ , and the maximum decrease in RH at the top of PBL is  $2\\%$ . A repeated examination based on GFED emission inventory yields a very weak signal of radiative direct effects on either meteorology or the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations in both surface and the upper altitudes. The comparison of aerosol radiative effects induced by GFED and VIIRS is synthesized in Fig. S3.\n\n# 4. Conclusion and discussions', 'summary': 'effects, are also limited by reaction rate, and higher  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations period in general reflects a faster particle accumulation ...'}, 来自论文ID: striking_impacts_of_biomass_burning_on__$_mathrm{p, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为洲际空气污染传输在数天至数周时间尺度上发生，可显著加剧局部污染事件，但不同国家的排放清单存在报告质量和格式不统一问题。,理由是提供了空气污染传输的基本机制和国际合作框架背景，但缺乏具体数据或可深挖的独特方法论线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['TF HTAP', 'UNFCCC TACCC原则', 'CLRTAP']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'Intercontinental transport of air pollution occurs on timescales of days to weeks and, depending on the specific type of pollutant, may contribute substantially to local scale pollution episodes (HTAP, 2010). Common international understanding of global air pollution and its influence on human health, vegetation and climate, is imperative for providing a basis for future international policies and is a prime objective for the Task Force Hemispheric Transport of Air Pollution (TF HTAP)<sup>1</sup>. While nowadays many countries and regions report their air pollutant emissions, these estimates may not be readily accessible, or may be difficult to interpret without additional information, and their quality may differ widely, having various degrees of detail and being presented in different formats.\n\nThe UN Framework Convention on Climate Change (UNFCCC) requires official inventory reporting that complies with the TACCC principles of quality: transparency, accuracy, consistency, comparability and completeness<sup>2</sup>, reviewed by UNFCCC roster experts and made available at their website (UNFCCC, 2013). Under the CLRTAP (Convention on Long-range Transboundary Air Pollution) the parties need to report emissions to the EMEP (European Monitoring and Evaluation Programme) Centre on Emission In\n\nventories and Projections (CEIP), which also reviews data on completeness and consistency. Responsibility of providing emission inventories to several international bodies is often distributed within a particular country; e.g. the methane inventory of some Annex I countries is provided by different national institutions. Although they represent the same region, they might be different, which is often the case and leads to confusion (Janssens-Maenhout et al., 2012).', 'summary': 'Intercontinental transport of air pollution occurs on timescales of days to weeks and, depending on the specific type of pollutant, may contribute sub...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven', 'text': 'Differences in research objects are probably the leading cause of the distinction between our results and those in the literature. As stated before, the majority of contributions centred on the environmental effectiveness brought by one single kind of clean coal policy. Different from this, the study intends to investigate the variations caused by the profound industrial transformation, from a more convenient but intuitive perspective. Namely, investigating the air quality variations before and after the implementation of a variety of CCTPs at the national level.\n\n# 5.2. Theoretical and practical implications\n\nBy investigating the effective national control policies, this study has implications for theoretical research on the effectiveness of energy policies. The most valid deployment and efficiency of energy policies have been hotly debated in the literature. The single regional model is not applicable because it lacks a national perspective, as same as research on an individual policy. This single view is not conducive to allocating governance resources reasonably and establishing regional emission reduction targets and regulations. In addition, regarding uncertainties would be brought about when discussing the air quality change since the outbreak of COVID-19, the introduced deep learning approaches could supply researchers with new insights.', 'summary': 'Differences in research objects are probably the leading cause of the distinction between our results and those in the literature. As stated before, t...'}, 来自论文ID: air_quality_changes_in_china_2013-2020__effectiven, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'The HTAP modelling community is expected to run in addition to the actual 2008 and 2010 simulations with the HTAP_v2.2 emission inventory also the emission scenarios of ECLIPSEv5 (Klimont et al., 2015). ECLIPSEv5 starts with a 2010 emission inventory (or base year inventory), that serves also as reference point for all projections. Here we compare the ECLIPSEv5 emission inventory for 2010 with the HTAP_v2.2 2010 data, in order to evaluate how close the reference point is to the "officially accepted" regional inventories of HTAP_v2.2. At the global level, a relatively good agreement is found with small relative emis', 'summary': 'The HTAP modelling community is expected to run in addition to the actual 2008 and 2010 simulations with the HTAP_v2.2 emission inventory also the emi...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'east US in summer against aircraft measurements. They reported that the simulated formaldehyde mixing ratios showed only a small bias  $(-3\\% \\pm 2\\%)$  in the lower troposphere but were lower than the observations by  $41\\%$  in the free troposphere, likely due to insufficient deep convection in the model (Zhu et al., 2016). The simulated glyoxal mixing ratios were within  $20\\%$  of the observations in the mixed layer, but they were too low in the upper troposphere by more than a factor of 2, also likely due to insufficient model vertical transport (Chan Miller et al., 2017). It should be noted that these errors assessed by Zhu et al. (2016) and Chan Miller et al. (2017) likely also included the errors associated with precursor emissions. Nevertheless, based on these assessments, we estimated the model errors for formaldehyde and glyoxal VCDs to be  $\\pm 80\\%$  and  $\\pm 100\\%$ , respectively. Adding these estimated model errors in quadrature to the satellite retrieval errors (Sect. 2.3), we estimated the observation error  $(\\mathbf{S}_0)$  of formaldehyde and glyoxal to be about  $\\pm 90\\%$  and  $\\pm 150\\%$ , respectively.\n\nThe optimization of Eq. (1) was dependent on the relative weighting of the penalty error  $(\\mathbf{S_0})$  and the prediction', 'summary': 'east US in summer against aircraft measurements. They reported that the simulated formaldehyde mixing ratios showed only a small bias  $(-3\\% \\pm 2\\%)...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2017年中国BVOC排放量达23.54Tg/年，夏季导致BTH/SCB/YRD/PRD地区臭氧浓度最高增加47μg/m³，且70%的SOA来自生物源；人为排放与生物排放相互作用可提升60%生物源SOA形成,理由是量化展示BVOC对臭氧/SOA的区域影响及人为-生物排放耦合机制，包含模型情景分析(WRF-CMAQ)和关键数据峰值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEGAN model', 'biogenic SOA formation', 'VOC-limited urban areas', 'anthropogenic-biogenic interaction']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': "Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOC) play an important role in global environmental chemistry and climate. In the present work, biogenic emissions from China in 2017 were estimated based on the Model of Emissions of Gases and Aerosols from Nature (MEGAN). The effects of BVOC emissions on ozone and secondary organic aerosol (SOA) formation were investigated using the WRF-CMAQ modeling system. Three parallel scenarios were developed to assess the impact of BVOC emissions on China's ozone and SOA formation in July 2017. Biogenic emissions were estimated at  $23.54\\mathrm{Tg / yr}$ , with a peak in the summer and decreasing from southern to northern China. The high BVOC emissions across eastern and southwestern China increased the surface ozone levels, particularly in the BTH (Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei), SCB (Sichuan Basin), YRD (Yangtze River Delta) and central PRD (Pearl River Delta) regions, with increases of up to  $47\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  due to the sensitivity of VOC-limited urban areas. In summer, most SOA concentrations formed over China are from biogenic sources (national average of  $70\\%$ ). And SOA concentrations in YRD and SCB regions are generally higher than other regions. Excluding anthropogenic emissions while keeping biogenic emissions unchanged results that SOA concentrations reduce by  $60\\%$  over China, which indicates that anthropogenic emissions can interact with biogenic emissions then facilitate biogenic SOA formation. It is suggested that controlling anthropogenic emissions would result in reduction of both anthropogenic and biogenic SOA.\n\n# 1. Introduction", 'summary': 'Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOC) play an important role in global environmental chemistry and climate. In the present work, biogenic emissio...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 0e26e3a6-efcc-45be-86de-5db0cc1f4815, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为BVOCs占全球VOC排放90%以上，尤其异戊二烯/单萜类通过氧化反应主导SOA生成和新粒子形成，MEGAN模型基于植物功能型(PFT)构建排放基准。,理由是仅重复基础BVOC常识（排放占比/反应路径），未提供新数据或模型改进方案，与核心问题关联较弱。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': 'Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOCs) emitted from terrestrial ecosystems have substantial effects on the global climate and environmental chemistry. Previous studies have shown that up to  $90\\%$  of the total VOC emissions are derived from biogenic sources (Guenther et al. 1995). BVOCs such as isoprene, monoterpenes and sesquiterpenes participate in oxidative chemical reactions in the atmosphere with oxidants such as ozone, OH and  $\\mathrm{NO}_3$  radicals. In addition, BVOCs are major sources of secondary organic aerosols (SOA) and new particle formation (Hallquist et al. 2009; Kulmala et al. 2004; Paasonen et al. 2013; Kota et al. 2015). Measurements and modeling of BVOC emissions are of vital importance to understand the carbon cycle, biosphere-atmosphere interactions and climate change (Gu et al. 2017; Hantson et al. 2017).\n\nOver the past few decades, research has been focused on four objectives: (1) developing and improving BVOC instruments and technology, (2) quantifying the effects of BVOC emissions, (3) developing and improving BVOC emission models, and (4) understanding the mechanisms underlying the interactions of BVOCs with anthropogenic volatile organic compounds (AVOCs). Most BVOCs are highly reactive and readily interact with oxidants, consequently influencing the atmospheric composition. Therefore, accurately estimating the BVOC emissions can improve the results of studies of the effects of BVOCs on the regional and global air quality and climate systems (Makkonen et al. 2012).\n\nBVOC emissions are calculated with models, and the Model of Emissions of Gases and Aerosols from Nature (MEGAN) is one of the models commonly used (Guenther et al. 2006). The standard emission potential of a plant depends on the plant functional type (PFT) and its', 'summary': 'Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOCs) emitted from terrestrial ecosystems have substantial effects on the global climate and environmental chemi...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 402b8851-355f-45fd-8b34-606d56f187ba, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HTAP_v2.2排放清单揭示：亚洲59%SO2来自能源部门（燃煤电厂），32%来自制造业；国际航运贡献全球10%SO2和超10%NOx。,理由是提供关键排放源定量分配数据（含具体百分比），明确了跨境污染传输路径，对区域预测模型构建有核心价值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP_v2.2', 'shipping emission tracks', 'sectoral SO2 allocation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'The Asian region is still characterised by a relatively large contribution of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  from (coal fired) power plants and manufacturing industry. Most of the  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emitted in North America and Europe comes from coal power plants. However, in Europe Fig. 2a shows that  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  is also emitted from the residential and waste disposal sector. Residential (heating and cooking) and waste disposal sources are particularly relevant in Africa. High annual  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emissions are also observed for India, to which the energy sector contributes  $59\\%$  and the energy-intensive manufacturing industry (iron and steel)  $32\\%$ , also both using coking and bituminous coal according to IEA (2013). Finally, international shipping contributes  $\\sim 10\\%$  to the global  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emissions.  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  grid maps clearly show the ship emission tracks connecting Asia and Europe with Africa and America.\n\n# 3.1.2  $\\mathbf{NO}_x$\n\nFigure 2b shows that the major sources of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  are ground transport and power generation and these source contributions show a rather uniform feature for all the considered regions. In Central and South America, major emissions are attributed to the transportation sector and just to a minor extent to the energy sector (e.g. in Mexico  $65\\%$  of the  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions originate from road transport). Those industrialised countries with a large share of natural gas as fuel for heating houses and commercial centres and for industry (such as Canada, the Netherlands, Norway) show relatively high emissions of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ : the share of the residential and industry  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions is around  $30\\%$  of the total  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , whereas in USA this is only  $20\\%$ . International shipping and, in particular, aviation contribute together more than  $10\\%$  of global  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions.\n\n# 3.1.3 CO', 'summary': 'The Asian region is still characterised by a relatively large contribution of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  from (coal fired) power plants and manufacturing indus...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 25d5d8e1-db0c-4668-8eeb-ab542c86ff7b, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'HTAP_v2.2 dataset validation with atmospheric transport models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究整合NASA OMI/Aura臭氧剖面、OMI对流层NO₂/HCHO和MOPITT CO等多源卫星数据（Fig.S1），并采用WRF v4.0模型（12km分辨率）模拟美国气象场，CMAQ-WRF配置参数见Table 1。,理由是详述卫星数据集成与气象建模方法，但未展示具体实验结果或图表洞察，作为方法学参考保留较宜。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['WRF-CMAQ coupling', 'OMI tropospheric NO2', 'MOPITT CO']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the cont', 'text': 'with multiple satellite datasets such as the NASA OMI/Aura vertical  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  profile 1-Orbit level 2 data, NASA OMI tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO level 2 version 3 data, and the Measurement of Pollution in the Troposphere (MOPITT) CO level 2 version 8 data (shown in Fig. S1).\n\nUsing the Weather Research and Forecasting (WRF) model version 4.0, we estimated meteorological fields over the U.S.  $12\\mathrm{km}$  modeling domain (shown in Fig. 1) with the initial and boundary conditions from the National Centers for Environmental Prediction (NCEP) North American Regional Reanalysis (NARR), which has a  $32\\mathrm{km}$  horizontal resolution and  $3\\mathrm{h}$  of temporal resolution. Detailed configurations of both the CMAQ and WRF models can be found in Table 1. In an effort to enhance model performance in simulating meteorological fields, we applied indirect soil moisture and temperature nudging technique (Pleim and Gilliam, 2009; Pleim and Xiu, 2003) together with a four-\n\nTable 1 Model configurations.', 'summary': 'with multiple satellite datasets such as the NASA OMI/Aura vertical  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  profile 1-Orbit level 2 data, NASA OMI tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}...'}, 来自论文ID: changes_in_the_ozone_chemical_regime_over_the_cont, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 7a12c2c6-8771-4378-9c0b-72eed7a4467d, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为强调了生物源挥发性有机化合物（BVOC）排放对二次有机气溶胶（SOA）模拟的局限性，提出高氧化分子（HOMs）机制可显著增加 SOA 质量，未来应整合到区域模型。,理由是间接相关研究展望，但无具体深挖线索（如 HOMs 数据），适合作背景参考。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HOMs chemistry', 'SOA-BVOC interaction']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': 'It should be noted that the simulated SOA concentrations in this study have not been compared with direct measurements of organic particulate matter and SOA because of the data limitations. Extensive measurements of organic components have been conducted in megacities and major clusters in China by aerosol mass spectrometers (AMS), which provides details about various organic aerosols (Hu et al. 2016; Yang et al., 2016). And these data can be used as model validation for future local scale SOA modeling studies which can promote the understanding of SOA formation. Besides, a great deal of additional research is needed to further address the remaining questions. For example, to better quantify the separate and synergistic effects of anthropogenic and VOC emissions based on sensitivity testing, it is necessary to investigate the spatial distribution of ozone changes by comparing NOx and VOC emissions. Both chamber studies and field measurements have shown that HOMs (highly oxygenated molecules) can substantially increase the SOA mass because of their low volatility (Ehn et al. 2014). This mechanism has already been incorporated into box models (Öström et al. 2017) with detailed chemistry, and it would be interesting to observe the impact of this mechanism on SOA formation from BVOCs at the regional scale.\n\n# Author contributions\n\nThe manuscript was written through contributions of all authors. All authors have given approval to the final version of the manuscript.\n\n# Acknowledgements\n\nThis work was funded by the National Key Research and Development Program of China (No.2018YFC0214002), the Basic Applied Research Project of Science and Technology Plan of Sichuan Province (No.2018JY0011), the Key Project of Science and Technology Plan of Sichuan Province (No.2018SZDZX0023) and the Scientific Research Foundation of Chengdu University of Information Technology', 'summary': 'It should be noted that the simulated SOA concentrations in this study have not been compared with direct measurements of organic particulate matter a...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 279956cd-bc57-47a1-9d7b-a08b93a10537, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为VOCs（如工业源）是冬季PM2.5二次有机气溶胶（SOA）关键前体，贡献超30%有机质量。,理由是聚焦污染机制，解释霾季形成原理，但未提供2018年北京具体数据或图表。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Secondary organic aerosol', 'VOCs precursors']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds', 'text': 'Urban areas in China always suffer from serious haze problems due to high fine particle  $\\mathrm{(PM_{2.5})}$  concentration during wintertime (Zhang and Cao, 2015; Yin et al., 2017; Song et al., 2017). Organic matter (OM) is one of the most important chemical components of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  during winter haze episodes. During the long-lasting haze period in 2013, OM accounted for  $30.5 - 48.0\\%$  of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  masses and secondary organic-rich sources contributed  $12.2 - 25.8\\%$  to  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  at four megacities (Huang et al., 2014). As important precursor gases of secondary organic aerosol (SOA), high concentrations of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) were also observed in haze episodes (Zhang et al., 2014; Wu et al., 2016; Liu et al., 2017; Han et al., 2017). SOA is mainly formed by atmospheric oxidation and condensation of low-volatility VOCs from both anthropogenic and biogenic sources (Hallquist et al., 2016; Chen et al., 2017). The urban ambient VOCs are from anthropogenic activities such as oil and natural gas operations (Gilman et al., 2013; Zheng et al., 2018), fossil fuel combustion (Rodolfo Sosa et al., 2009; Liu et al., 2017), solvent use (Yuan et al., 2010), and chemical manufacturing (Mo et al.,\n\n2017; Zheng et al., 2019), etc. During winter haze periods, which VOC source plays a more important role in the formation of SOA deserves a clear illustration.', 'summary': 'Urban areas in China always suffer from serious haze problems due to high fine particle  $\\mathrm{(PM_{2.5})}$  concentration during wintertime (Zhang...'}, 来自论文ID: source_apportionment_of_volatile_organic_compounds, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: e5f3c10c-c9d5-4974-9fd1-48d921c322db, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'HTAP_v2.2 dataset validation with atmospheric transport models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HTAP_v2.2全球污染物清单整合北美EPA/加拿大、欧洲EMEP-TNO、亚洲MIX及EDGARv4.3区域数据，提供0.1°~0.25°分辨率网格排放图（含点源），支持排放因子与人均排放的跨区域校验。,理由是权威全球排放清单的核心技术描述，突出多源数据融合方案和高分辨率优势，且明确服务于排放因子验证需求。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP_v2.2', 'emission mosaic integration', 'point-source gridding']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'This paper describes the HTAP global air pollutant reference emission inventory for 2010, which is composed of latest available data from regional inventory compilers. It assures a consistent input for both regional and global modelling as required by the HTAP modelling exercise. The HTAP_v2.2 emission database makes use of consolidated estimates of official and latest available regional information with air pollutant grid maps from US EPA and Environment Canada for North America, EMEP-TNO for Europe, MIX for Asia, and the EDGARv4.3 database for the rest of the world. The mosaic of grid maps provides comprehensive local information on the emission of air pollutants, because it results from the collection of point sources and national emission grid maps at  $0.1^{\\circ}$  (for some regions  $0.25^{\\circ}$ ) resolution. Even though the HTAP_v2.2 data set is not a self-consistent bottom-up database with activity data of consistent international statistics, with harmonized emission factors, and with global sets of spatial proxy data, it provides a unique set of emission grid maps with global coverage and high spatial resolution, including in particular important point sources. The compilation of implied emission factors and per capita emissions for the different world regions using multiple sources provides the regional and national emission inventory compilers with a valuable asset for comparison with their own data for cross checking and analysis which may lead to identification of future improvement options.', 'summary': 'This paper describes the HTAP global air pollutant reference emission inventory for 2010, which is composed of latest available data from regional inv...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: 12a14365-e241-400d-90d5-fd34e92a1767, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'HTAP_v2.2 dataset validation with atmospheric transport models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为EDGARv4.3以0.1度网格分辨率提供全球排放空间分布，采用北半球/赤道/南半球三区域差异化月度分解因子。,理由是描述排放数据处理的关键技术参数（空间分辨率、时间分解方法）和具体污染物覆盖范围，构成模型开发核心要素。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['EDGARv4.3', '$0.1 \\times 0.1$ degree网格', '三区域月度因子']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'The EDGAR emission data are spatially distributed using an extensive set of global proxy data, which are representative for major source sectors and documented in the EDGAR gridding manual of Janssens-Maenhout et al. (2013). For HTAP_v2.2, the EDGARv4.3 database provides yearly emission grid maps with a resolution of  $0.1 \\times 0.1$  degree for the "rest of the world" countries of Table S1.2 of Annex I in the Supplement for all pollutants  $(\\mathrm{SO}_2, \\mathrm{NO}_x, \\mathrm{CO}, \\mathrm{NMVOC}, \\mathrm{NH}_3, \\mathrm{PM}_{10}, \\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}, \\mathrm{OC}, \\mathrm{BC})$  and HTAP sectors for the years 2008 and 2010. The htap_2 SHIPS data are provided for the entire world, while the htap_1 AIR data are provided for the entire world for the international aviation and for the world excluding USA and Canada for the domestic aviation. EDGAR provides also sector-specific monthly profiles, defined with first order estimated factors for each of the three different zones: Northern Hemisphere, the Equatorial region and Southern Hemisphere (Table S1.2 in the Supplement). A reverse profile is applied for the two hemispheres from the EDGAR v4.3 database, while no seasonal pattern is used for the Equatorial regions. Monthly emissions grid maps are generated from the annual emission data per HTAP sector using these EDGAR monthly factors, which resemble most to the EMEP-TNO profiles (see Sect. 2.3).', 'summary': 'The EDGAR emission data are spatially distributed using an extensive set of global proxy data, which are representative for major source sectors and d...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 390f5c99-d939-4868-887a-b3b8cfde75c8, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 2, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Exhaust Gas Condensation during Engine Cold Start ', 'text': 'Keywords: portable emissions measurement system (PEMS); worldwide harmonized light-duty vehicles test cycle (WLTC); real driving emissions (RDE); Fourier-transform infrared spectroscopy (FTIR); non-dispersive infrared detection (NDIR); gas analyzers; measurement uncertainty; engine cold start emissions; exhaust gas condensation; tailpipe  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$  measurements\n\n# 1. Introduction\n\nRoad transport is a significant source of air pollution in the European Union (EU) and vehicle emissions regulations try to limit the emission levels [1]. For instance, carbon dioxide  $(\\mathrm{CO}_{2})$  is a greenhouse gas regulated by the EU with emission limits for vehicles [2]. Exceedance of these limits by the vehicle manufacturers are subject to fines.\n\nThe current regulations are traditionally based on measurements of diluted samples from bags filled from a dilution tunnel where the whole exhaust gas is diluted during roller bench tests. However,\n\ndirect measurements of the raw exhaust from the tailpipe are permitted in the EU and worldwide in the case of engine emission tests (e.g., heavy duty diesel engines and small utility gasoline engines) [3]. Moreover, direct tailpipe measurements are often conducted for research purposes [4].', 'summary': 'Keywords: portable emissions measurement system (PEMS); worldwide harmonized light-duty vehicles test cycle (WLTC); real driving emissions (RDE); Four...'}, 来自论文ID: exhaust_gas_condensation_during_engine_cold_start_, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 8bc99c90-52a1-4cd4-a234-70c463760d52, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'air pollution study '}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HTAP_v2.2数据集提供0.1°网格化人为排放数据，包含SO2、NOx、CO、NMVOC、NH3等气体及PM10/PM2.5碳组分（BC/OC）的年度/月度分布，专用于大气化学传输模型,理由是包含可直接使用的全球排放清单标准数据集名称、空间分辨率和污染物种类，具备深挖价值（如获取数据源或对比模型应用）,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP_v2.2', 'anthropogenic emission inventory', 'grid maps']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'The resulting data set, named HTAP_v2.2, is a compilation of annual and monthly grid maps of anthropogenic air pollution emissions (with a  $0.1^{\\circ} \\times 0.1^{\\circ}$  grid resolution). It contains region-specific information on human activity (concerning intensity and geospatial distribution) and on fuel, technology- and process-dependent emission factors and end-of-pipe abatement, but it is not as consistent as a globally consistent emission inventory using international statistics and global geospatial distributions. With the perspective of being used in chemical transport models, this inventory includes the atmospheric gaseous pollutants  $\\mathrm{(SO_2, NO_x, CO, NMVOC^4, NH_3)}$  and particulate matter with carbonaceous speciation  $\\mathrm{(PM_{10}, PM_{2.5}, BC}$  and OC)5.', 'summary': 'The resulting data set, named HTAP_v2.2, is a compilation of annual and monthly grid maps of anthropogenic air pollution emissions (with a  $0.1^{\\cir...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 68c33446-37ff-406a-8bc3-87962759883d, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'air pollution study '}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为基于HDI指数对比各国人均PM2.5排放：中国(8.2kg), 印度(5.2kg), 日本(0.16kg)，揭示技术水平和经济活动对排放的影响,理由是包含关键跨国比较数据和排放驱动因子分析，提供HDI与排放的量化关系,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['per capita PM2.5', 'Human Development Index', 'end-of-pipe technology']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': "The level of per capita air pollution results from a combination of the per capita activity and the level of implementation of end-of-pipe measurement technology. The activity level can be reflected by the per capita  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$  emissions, which is highest for USA explaining the high air pollutant emissions per capita. However, it is not India with the lowest  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$  per capita, but Japan and Germany that have the lowest per capita air pollutant emissions, because of the level of technology and end-of-pipe implementation. To measure the latter we apply a kind of surrogate variable: the Human Development Index (HDI) (2010) from UNDP (2015). This shows that Germany and Japan are more advanced and have therefore lower emissions per capita for all air pollutants (except  $\\mathrm{NH}_{3}$  for Germany) and for the PM. We observe that the PM emissions per capita of Japan  $(0.16\\mathrm{kgPM}_{2.5}\\mathrm{yr}^{-1}\\mathrm{cap}^{-1})$  are only  $60\\%$  of those of Germany and Germany's one are about one-fifth of the per capita emissions of the USA, which are on their turn only  $60\\%$  of the per capita  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  for China. Table S3.1 indicates that developing countries, in particular those with emerging economies but not yet fully penetrated clean technologies and end-of-pipe measures, have enhanced PM per capita emissions (China  $-8.2\\mathrm{kgPM}_{2.5}\\mathrm{yr}^{-1}\\mathrm{cap}^{-1}$ , India  $-5.2\\mathrm{kgPM}_{2.5}\\mathrm{yr}^{-1}\\mathrm{cap}^{-1}$ , Brazil  $-3.1\\mathrm{kgPM}_{2.5}\\mathrm{yr}^{-1}\\mathrm{cap}^{-1}$ ). Russia has relatively high per capita PM emissions  $(2.2\\mathrm{kgPM}_{2.5}\\mathrm{yr}^{-1}\\mathrm{cap}^{-1}$  because of fossil fuel production and consumption in the power sector, but much less than Canada  $(7.4\\mathrm{kgPM}_{2.5}\\mathrm{yr}^{-1}\\mathrm{cap}^{-1})$ , a much less populated country but with important fossil fuel production industry for export. Both countries, with important contribution in the Arctic region, show relatively high NMVOC and  $\\mathr", 'summary': 'The level of per capita air pollution results from a combination of the per capita activity and the level of implementation of end-of-pipe measurement...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为整合区域排放网格（含中国等亚洲国家），提供2008和2010年全球网格化排放数据（SO2, NOx, PM2.5等），支持建模研究。,理由是提供排放清单框架，但未直接针对北京2018年细节，无图表或深挖线索，适合作为背景。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Regional gridded inventories', 'EDGARv4.3']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'Revised: 30 July 2015 - Accepted: 27 August 2015 - Published: 15 October 2015\n\nAbstract. The mandate of the Task Force Hemispheric Transport of Air Pollution (TF HTAP) under the Convention on Long-Range Transboundary Air Pollution (CLRTAP) is to improve the scientific understanding of the intercontinental air pollution transport, to quantify impacts on human health, vegetation and climate, to identify emission mitigation options across the regions of the Northern Hemisphere, and to guide future policies on these aspects.\n\nThe harmonization and improvement of regional emission inventories is imperative to obtain consolidated estimates on the formation of global-scale air pollution. An emissions data set has been constructed using regional emission grid maps (annual and monthly) for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , CO, NMVOC,  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , BC and OC for the years 2008 and 2010, with the purpose of providing consistent information to global and regional scale modelling efforts.\n\nThis compilation of different regional gridded inventories – including that of the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) for USA, the EPA and Environment Canada (for Canada), the European Monitoring and Evaluation Programme (EMEP) and Netherlands Organisation for Applied Scientific Research (TNO) for Europe, and the Model Intercomparison Study for Asia (MICS-Asia III) for China, India and other Asian countries – was gap-filled with the emission grid maps of the Emissions Database for Global Atmospheric Research (EDGARv4.3) for the rest of the world (mainly South America, Africa, Russia and Oceania). Emissions from seven main categories of human activities (power, industry, residential, agriculture, ground transport, aviation and shipping) were estimated and spatially distributed on a common grid of  $0.1^{\\circ} \\times 0.1^{\\circ}$  longitude-latitude, to yield\n\nmonthly, global, sector-specific grid maps for each substance and year.', 'summary': 'Revised: 30 July 2015 - Accepted: 27 August 2015 - Published: 15 October 2015\n\nAbstract. The mandate of the Task Force Hemispheric Transport of Air Po...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 677110f3-36b8-4c26-9292-114f5f2257c9, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为描述中国煤炭清洁利用产业链转型框架：从'开发-利用'向'煤炭基材料化工一体化'的循环经济模式演进。,理由是提供能源转型背景信息，但未涉及量化效果或预测模型，适合作为政策背景参考,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['coal-based circular economy', 'CCT industry chain']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven', 'text': 'The conflicts between abundant energy consumption and urgent environmental protection are sharper than ever before and have posed great pressure on Chinese sustainable economic growth in the new normal stage (Jiang et al., 2020). To solve these conflicts, the government has been shifting the energy production and utilization way from the traditional investment-led and resource-driven development mode to the sustainability-driven development mode which is low-carbon, waste minimizing, clean, and resource-efficient (Zeb et al., 2014). Specifically, for the coal industry, it is generally believed that clean and efficient use of coal plays an explicitly important role in the energy transformation, adding to a solid support for China\'s sustainable development, and has been verified as a tremendously important way to realize carbon peak and neutrality goals. Correspondingly, a circular economy industry chain of CCTs covering the life cycle of coal resources\n\ngrows up gradually in China, "coal development-coal with high quality-clean energy-the integration of coal-based materials and chemicals".', 'summary': 'The conflicts between abundant energy consumption and urgent environmental protection are sharper than ever before and have posed great pressure on Ch...'}, 来自论文ID: air_quality_changes_in_china_2013-2020__effectiven, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 0bb591a2-9145-4533-b30a-a3f080472427, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为讨论了挥发性有机化合物（VOC）排放数据在空气质量模型中的化学机制分配挑战，强调模型物种分配的错误会导致排放测定或化学机制的错误。,理由是为排放模型提供背景，但未包含具体数据或深挖路径（如 Paper ID），适于作为上下文保留。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['chemical mechanism assignment', 'VOC speciation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Development of a database for chemical mechanism a', 'text': 'Implications: Assigning air quality model species to the hundreds of emitted chemicals is a necessary link between emissions data and modeling effects of emissions on air quality. This is not easy and makes it difficult to implement new and more chemically detailed mechanisms in models. If done incorrectly, it is similar to errors in emissions speciation or the chemical mechanism used. Nevertheless, making such assignments is often an afterthought in chemical mechanism development and emissions processing, and existing assignments are usually undocumented and have errors and inconsistencies. This work is designed to address some of these problems.\n\n# Introduction\n\nAir quality models need to take differences in how volatile organic compounds (VOCs) react in the atmosphere when predicting effects of their emissions on secondary pollutants such as ozone or secondary organic aerosol. The chemical mechanism is the component of the models that represents how emitted compounds react and form secondary pollutants. Different mechanisms use different model species to represent how organic compounds react, with the number of species in different mechanisms varying by more than an order of magnitude. An important but often overlooked part of the air quality modeling process is determining which model species to use when representing the hundreds of organic compounds that are emitted.\n\nAnthropogenic emissions inventories generally give organic emissions as total mass either of total organic gas (TOG) or of nonexempt (U.S. Code of Federal Regulations, 2014) volatile organic compounds (VOCs) from various sources as a function of time and space, along with codes indicating the emissions sources. These data do not, in themselves, indicate which of the', 'summary': 'Implications: Assigning air quality model species to the hundreds of emitted chemicals is a necessary link between emissions data and modeling effects...'}, 来自论文ID: development_of_a_database_for_chemical_mechanism_a, 关键词: None

Janssens-Maenhout (greet.maenhout@jrc.ec.europa.eu)\n\nReceived: 19 March 2015 - Published in Atmos. Chem. Phys. Discuss.: 29 April 2015', 'summary': '# HTAP_v2.2: a mosaic of regional and global emission grid maps for 2008 and 2010 to study hemispheric transport of air pollution\n\nG. 证据节点ID: 42a96839-b619-4aac-b911-aedc112b3619, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'HTAP_v2.2 dataset validation with atmospheric transport models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图1展示亚洲MIX排放库组成（含中国），整合至HTAP v2.2，可直接支持北京PM2.5原始来源建模。,理由是图表关键：展示区域排放结构，提供与HTAP数据集链接，含2010年数据，可深挖北京排放组分。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Mosaic emission inventory', 'MICS-Asia III']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'MIX_ a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission invento', 'text': 'In order to support the MICS-Asia III and other global and regional modeling activities with the best available anthropogenic emission dataset over Asia, we develop a new Asian anthropogenic emission inventory, named MIX, by harmonizing different local emission inventories with the mosaic approach. The mosaic inventory developed in this work will provide (1) a more complete and state-of-the-art understanding of anthropogenic emissions over Asia with best estimates from local inventories; (2) a reference dataset with moderate accuracy and resolution that can support both scientific research and mitigation policy-making; and (3) broader application of the best available local inventories in modeling studies by processing them to model-ready format and including them in a publicly available emission dataset.\n\nThe MIX inventory is developed for 2008 and 2010, in accordance with base year simulations in MICS-Asia III and the Task Force on Hemispheric Transport of Air Pollution (TF HTAP). It should be noted that MIX is not comparable to INTEX-B and TRACE-P to derive an emission trend due to differences in methodology and underlying data. In this paper, we also provided Asian emissions for 2006 using the same methodology, partly resolving the problems of trend analysis in mosaic inventories. The gridded MIX emission data for the years 2008 and 2010 are then incorporated\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/fa4e3fc1-fa8a-45bf-892c-02fa70317f3a/0c04e1ce6e0b38a5005d851e7e1a801eb26948db3f103284a54c9f623bb940bf.jpg)  \nFigure 1. Domain and component of the MIX emission inventory.\n\ninto the HTAP v2.2 global emission inventory (Janssens-Maenhout et al., 2015) to support the modeling activities in HTAP, providing a consistent emission input for global and regional modeling activities.', 'summary': 'In order to support the MICS-Asia III and other global and regional modeling activities with the best available anthropogenic emission dataset over As...'}, 来自论文ID: mix__a_mosaic_asian_anthropogenic_emission_invento, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 5a8eb779-e173-43a6-9aea-525738b387f1, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图1b证实已建立排放因子的NMOG物种主要属于高挥发性物质（高于10⁶μg/m³阈值），显著忽略了对二次有机气溶胶(SOA)形成关键的IVOC前体物；图1a显示多数短寿命物种(化学寿命<物理传输寿命)缺少已知氧化产物数据，导致近场反应性模型存在重大空白。,理由是图像数据直接揭示NMOG排放表征的系统性缺陷，提供明确的深层量化指标（IVOC阈值/C*值）和未解决机制（近场反应性建模），且文本明确指向需'further work'的研究缺口。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['IVOC', 'NMOG speciation', 'near-field reactivity', 'C* threshold']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'An improved representation of fire non-methane org', 'text': 'Figure 1b shows the volatility of these same NMOG species. The species for which we have global EFs available are almost entirely very volatile and above a commonly held cutoff threshold for intermediate volatility compounds (IVOCs) vs. VOCs  $(\\mathrm{C}^{*} = 1\\times 10^{6}\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$ ; Ahern et al., 2019, and references therein). This suggests that both the standard model and our expanded treatment of NMOGs neglect many NMOG precursors for secondary organic aerosol. This study focuses on the OHR of NMOG from fires; further work is needed to constrain the EFs (Fig. 1b suggests that global EFs\n\nare not available for most IVOCs) and oxidation chemistry of NMOG species relevant to secondary organic aerosol (SOA) formation from fires.\n\nSpecies whose chemical lifetimes are shorter than the physical transport lifetimes (Fig. 1a) contribute strongly to near-field reactivity but are likely not exported from the grid box of emission. For these species, oxidation rapidly converts emitted species into secondary products, and it is these products that are exported away from the fire source. However, a detailed knowledge of the oxidative chemistry of many of these species is lacking (as evidenced by the small number of black-circled species, indicating "oxidation products known" in Fig. 1a). In particular, we note that we do not include several very reactive species (e.g., furfurals, guaiacol) (Coggon et al., 2019). A lumped highly reactive VOC may provide a means of describing this near-field reactivity in the model (though the oxidation products and their reactivity would be poorly described by such an approach). However, given that EFs for these highly reactive species are not globally characterized, there is currently no meaningful way to estimate the emissions of such a lumped VOC. Hence our model represents a lower limit of reactivity from fires despite our inclusion of longer-lived NMOG.', 'summary': 'Figure 1b shows the volatility of these same NMOG species. The species for which we have global EFs available are almost entirely very volatile and ab...'}, 来自论文ID: an_improved_representation_of_fire_non-methane_org, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: e7928785-628d-42b7-afc5-6a090be68883, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HTAP_v2.2排放清单存在区域边界不确定性，多图表展示排放因子建模差异导致跨境数据不一致（需分析图中网格化排放分布模式）。,理由是5张图表实质性展示排放清单空间异质性问题，Table 3直接提供不确定性量化框架，构成核心方法学资源。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Inventory boundary uncertainty', 'Emission factor disparity', 'Cross-border consistency metric']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': "Even though the HTAP_v2.2 data sources are all bottom-up constructed inventories, they differ considerably in e.g. the assumptions taken on the modelling of technology and endor-pipe measures and use different emission factors, which lead to inconsistencies at the borders between two adjacent inventories. On their turn the different bottom-up inventories are constructed with sub-regional (country, state, county or province level) activity data and emission factors. As such, inconsistencies can be expected at each country border, and the variation of the emissions at cross-border cells already gives us a first indication on the region- and sector-specific emission uncertainty. The propagation of uncertainty is given by the effect of variables' uncertainties (or errors) on the uncertainty; i.e. the variance of the activity data and that of the emission factor. Table 3 provides some insight in the estimation of the uncertainty range, however the approach followed in HTAP v2.2 inhibits an overall consistent uncertainty assessment because it is not one single bottom-up inventory.\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/4dd7b557-8ce1-4ebb-8cfc-af16a3cf3607/e129c235a1238d70c547e08ac07b6366b5ebbd9718236bcf530e2eacbf72f371.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/4dd7b557-8ce1-4ebb-8cfc-af16a3cf3607/451369dab0b2f33339ec070dd7403f4b261d07dbef65c5c7746170f630633ccb.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/4dd7b557-8ce1-4ebb-8cfc-af16a3cf3607/a7361627d99bece504842021dc7d5ee42194a0932f1662a482426f819429ad77.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/4dd7b557-8ce1-4ebb-8cfc-af16a3cf3607/37727f14c1db8e56aba9105d1bf3c7c1acf120693f4cda58b13e324d1dd6e15d.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/4dd7b557-8ce1-4ebb-8cfc-af16a3cf3607/20465503a09a73680f91c9a371ad2afb2c51e938388cad28671d786fdb6a9ddf.jpg)", 'summary': 'Even though the HTAP_v2.2 data sources are all bottom-up constructed inventories, they differ considerably in e.g. the assumptions taken on the modell...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 6ab92d70-76bd-4710-b17a-6108879feece, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为亚洲国家因工业过程和居民部门导致PM排放显著增高，巴西2008-2010年PM排放下降主要由木炭产量减少引起（全球占比从23%降至12%）。,理由是提供具体区域PM排放源解析和趋势数据（含巴西量化证据），表格数据可深挖各国排放强度指标。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Charcoal production emissions', 'Per capita PM emissions', 'Sectoral contribution analysis']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'strict legislation is applied in the industrial sector and in road transport. Figure 2e and f show a similar composition of the contributing sectors to  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  globally.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  grid maps point out the enhanced PM emissions in Asian countries, due to industrial processes and the residential sector. A decreasing trend from 2008 to 2010 is observed for Brazil due to decreases in emissions from charcoal production (with  $23\\%$  share in the world production in 2008 and  $12\\%$  in 2010, according to IEA, 2013). Emissions from charcoal production are also important for some African countries (Kenya, Sudan, South Africa, Tanzania, Ethiopia), with country-specific shares in world production varying between 1.3 and  $12.9\\%$  according to IEA (2013). Western Africa generally emits more PM than the eastern part because of more industrial activities.\n\nTable 2. (a) Comparison of the international shipping emissions: IMO bottom-up (BU) and IMO top-down (TD) emissions of the IMO (2014) study and the EDGAR emissions of the HTAP_v2.2 (2015) study. (b) Per capita emissions in 2010 for USA, Germany, China, India, Russia and Japan from HTAP_v2.2. (c) Emissions per unit of GDP in 2010 for USA, Germany, China, India, Russia and Japan from HTAP_v2.2.', 'summary': 'strict legislation is applied in the industrial sector and in road transport. Figure 2e and f show a similar composition of the contributing sectors t...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Progress of Air Pollution Control in China and Its', 'text': 'transformed into a new model: In contrast to its initial focus on control actions for a single pollutant or in a single sector, air quality management has now been redesigned to mitigate multiple precursors from multiple sectors through extensive coordination at the regional or national level. More recently, China has launched a series of movements including the short-term "blue sky defense battle" between 2018 and 2020, and the long-term "beautiful China" targets through 2035. The latter require fundamental improvements in air quality in China; in particular, they require all cities in China to achieve an annual concentration of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  below  $35\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  (the Interim Target-1 level recommended by the World Health Organization (WHO)) by 2035. To realize this goal, in-depth adjustment of the industrial structure and de-carbonization of energy systems will be critical, in addition to more stringent end-of-pipe control measures.', 'summary': 'transformed into a new model: In contrast to its initial focus on control actions for a single pollutant or in a single sector, air quality management...'}, 来自论文ID: progress_of_air_pollution_control_in_china_and_its, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 6091e48a-f68e-434f-8d04-41e828a17295, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'HTAP_v2.2 dataset validation with atmospheric transport models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Davidon-Fletcher-Powell方法实现后验误差估计：逆Hessian矩阵通过Hessian(J_f)^{-1}≈[(DH_f)^T E^{-1}(DH_f)+B^{-1}]^{-1}计算，其中E为观测误差协方差，B为先验误差协方差（公式12）。,理由是给出大气化学反演中后验误差估计的核心数学模型（含完整公式），对不确定性量化研究有直接方法论价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['a posteriori error covariance', 'inverse Hessian matrix', 'DFP updating formula']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'First space-based derivation of the global atmosph', 'text': 'by Millet et al. (2008) (Table 1), which was constrained by aircraft data, and are significantly lower compared to the Jacob et al. (2005) source. In opposition to these findings, a strong increase with respect to the Jacob et al. (2005) emissions was invoked by Dufour et al. (2007) during spring and summer in the Northern Hemisphere in order to explain the large mixing ratios sampled over high-latitude regions between 6 and  $14\\mathrm{km}$  by the ACE-FTS sensor. Although our model is also found to underpredict methanol concentrations in the free troposphere during the INTEX-A and NEAQS missions (Fig. 7), as well as over the Northern Atlantic (not shown), lower biogenic emissions are supported by both surface and aircraft measurements in the boundary layer. As discussed above, this underestimation might have multiple causes (cf. Sect. 10).\n\n# 9 A posteriori error estimation\n\nThe errors on the a posteriori emission estimates are calculated by applying an off-line iterative approximation of the inverse Hessian matrix, which relies on the Davidon-Fletcher-Powell (DFP) updating formula (Fletcher, 1990). When assuming that the model is linear or not too far from being linear, the a posteriori error covariance matrix is related to the Hessian of the cost function  $J$  through the expression:\n\n$$\nE _ {\\text {p o s t}} = \\left[ (\\mathbf {D} \\mathbf {H}) _ {f} ^ {T} \\mathbf {E} ^ {- 1} (\\mathbf {D} \\mathbf {H}) _ {f} + \\mathbf {B} ^ {- 1} \\right] ^ {- 1} = (\\mathbf {I} \\mathbf {H}) _ {f}, \\tag {12}\n$$\n\nwhere  $(\\mathbf{IH})_f$  is the inverse Hessian matrix evaluated at the point  $f$ ,  $(\\mathbf{IH})_f = \\mathbf{Hessian}(J)_f^{-1}$ ,  $\\mathbf{DH}$  is the Jacobian matrix of the model, and  $\\mathbf{E}$  and  $\\mathbf{B}$  are as in Eq. 11 (see Müller and Stavrakou (2005) for details). The inverse Hessian matrix is estimated iteratively using the new information obtained at each step  $k$  of the minimization procedure through the DFP formula:', 'summary': 'by Millet et al. (2008) (Table 1), which was constrained by aircraft data, and are significantly lower compared to the Jacob et al. (2005) source. In ...'}, 来自论文ID: first_space-based_derivation_of_the_global_atmosph, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: b873da59-69cb-42d7-b1bc-cc5c9536c765, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为清洁供暖项目（WCHP）需平衡成本效益，建议经济压力大地区采用清洁煤过渡，并强调因地制宜政策设计与低收入群体补贴。,理由是聚焦政策实施痛点但缺乏具体污染数据支撑，方法论部分提及数据尺度差异可能是通用局限。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Clean heating transition cost', 'Energy poverty mitigation', 'Regional policy differentiation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Does energy transition improve air quality_ Eviden', 'text': 'On the one hand, even though the WCHP project has proven to be an effective mean to control winter-derived heating emissions, the cost of this project should not be ignored. The conversion cost of "coal-to-gas/electricity" is higher and includes a subsequent increase in the cost of gas. Replacing unprocessed coal with clean coal can be used as a transitional method in the ultimate goal of energy transition for regions that experience considerable financial governmental pressure and low residential income. The government should focus on reforming the cost of electricity/gas by updating to more advanced heating technology and devices. On the other hand, since the reduction effect of the WCHP project on regional air quality varies under different development levels and resource distributions, project control should be delegated to regional governments based on local features rather than following the outdated pattern of "one-size-fits-all". In order to minimize the negative impact of clean heating policies on energy poverty and energy consumption inequality, the government should provide subsidies to clean energy more affordable to low-income groups.\n\nThere are two limitations in this study. First, lack of mid- and long-term monitoring data will hinder the assessment of the longterm effects of this policy. Second, although pollutant concentrations are characterized by daily scale data, macroeconomic variables are characterized by annual scale data. Estimation bias may thus occur due to such unmatched scale data.\n\n# CRediT authorship contribution statement\n\nYali Zhang: Conceptualization, Methodology, Writing - original draft. Wenqi Li: Data curation, Software, Visualization. Feng Wu: Supervision, Writing - review & editing.\n\n# Declaration of competing interest\n\nThe authors declare that they have no known competing financial interests or personal relationships that could have appeared to influence the work reported in this paper.\n\n# Acknowledgement', 'summary': 'On the one hand, even though the WCHP project has proven to be an effective mean to control winter-derived heating emissions, the cost of this project...'}, 来自论文ID: does_energy_transition_improve_air_quality__eviden, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 42d01c8d-c38c-4e13-acd4-0c9e95be442e, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图1展示了中国2015-2020年清洁煤炭技术政策(CCTPs)的实施时间线，结合文本说明这些政策是可持续煤炭利用和验证'十三五'能源减排目标的关键依据,理由是证据包含具体政策时间线可视化图表，并明确指向国家能源管理局原始数据，提供了深挖政策效果评估的论文线索,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CCTPs', '13th FYP energy targets', 'coal upgrading technologies']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven', 'text': "Concerning the effective implementation of China's CCTs, many scholars have analyzed the technical conditions and potential environmental burdens, which are mainly centred on coal upgrading processing, clean coal-fired power generation, and the modern coal chemical industry (He et al., 2019; Ren et al., 2021). Nevertheless, it is reported that influenced by the lack of CCTPs and the hysteresis of policy formulation and implementation, the development of CCTs was restricted during earlier years (Tang et al., 2015). Therefore, it is an urgent task to identify the effectiveness of CCTPs, providing a significant reference for the\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/c4f64a11-f495-42ce-8d5d-d616f8721d59/e2a641258d9c556417723b2b30e26dc81c8ea01021348895e04fe692a76bb275.jpg)  \nFig. 1. Timeline of CCTPs implemented in China during 2015-2020. (Note: the public information is collected from the National Energy Administration, and the illustration is made by the authors).\n\nenterprises and the public to utilize coal resources more sustainably and cleanly, and meanwhile, verifying the emission reduction targets of the energy sector during the 13th FYP.", 'summary': "Concerning the effective implementation of China's CCTs, many scholars have analyzed the technical conditions and potential environmental burdens, whi..."}, 来自论文ID: air_quality_changes_in_china_2013-2020__effectiven, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: be31354d-661f-49e3-8684-2a052ade51ce, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为需反演建模NMVOC排放用于2007年模拟，未涉及PM2.5直接源解析或北京区域。,理由是泛谈技术方法（如GEOS-Chem），与具体颗粒物来源无关，信息模糊且时间不匹配。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Adjoint inversion', 'Top-down emission estimates']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'isoprene, monoterpenes, and aromatics formation pathways (Liao et al., 2007; Henze et al., 2008) and (2) the irreversible uptake of dicarbonyl by aqueous aerosols and cloud drops (Fu et al., 2008). Other pathways, such as the atmospheric aging of semi-volatile and intermediate-volatility organic compounds, have been shown to be an important source of secondary organic aerosol (Robinson et al., 2007; Pye and Seinfeld, 2010) but they were not included in our version of the GEOS-Chem model. Regardless, the precursors and formation pathways of secondary organic aerosols in China are still poorly understood (Fu et al., 2012), such that no quantitative conclusions can be drawn regarding the impacts of our top-down NMVOC emission estimates on regional secondary organic aerosol formation.\n\n# 7 Conclusions\n\nWe used the GEOS-Chem model and its adjoint, as well as satellite observations of tropospheric column concentrations of formaldehyde and glyoxal, to constrain monthly Chinese NMVOC emissions from anthropogenic, biogenic, and biomass burning sources for the year 2007. We updated the gas-phase chemistry in the GEOS-Chem model and constructed its adjoint. The a priori NMVOC emission estimates from biogenic, anthropogenic, and biomass burning sources were taken from the inventories developed by Guenther et al. (2006), Li et al. (2014, 2017), and Huang et al. (2012), respectively, as well as van der Werf et al. (2010). We con\n\nduced four inversion experiments, which were constrained by the formaldehyde and glyoxal observations from GOME-2A (IE-1), the formaldehyde and glyoxal observations from OMI (IE-2), the formaldehyde observations from GOME-2A scaled by 1.7 (IE-3), and the glyoxal observations from OMI (IE-4). The results from these experiments represented the range of probable top-down NMVOC emission estimates for China given current satellite observation constraints.', 'summary': 'isoprene, monoterpenes, and aromatics formation pathways (Liao et al., 2007; Henze et al., 2008) and (2) the irreversible uptake of dicarbonyl by aque...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None
