                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 5},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为,理由是内容与前一证据完全重复（包括文本、图表引用及Table 1描述），属冗余信息。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the cont_1', 'text': 'with multiple satellite datasets such as the NASA OMI/Aura vertical  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  profile 1-Orbit level 2 data, NASA OMI tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and total HCHO level 2 version 3 data, and the Measurement of Pollution in the Troposphere (MOPITT) CO level 2 version 8 data (shown in Fig. S1).\n\nUsing the Weather Research and Forecasting (WRF) model version 4.0, we estimated meteorological fields over the U.S.  $12\\mathrm{km}$  modeling domain (shown in Fig. 1) with the initial and boundary conditions from the National Centers for Environmental Prediction (NCEP) North American Regional Reanalysis (NARR), which has a  $32\\mathrm{km}$  horizontal resolution and  $3\\mathrm{h}$  of temporal resolution. Detailed configurations of both the CMAQ and WRF models can be found in Table 1. In an effort to enhance model performance in simulating meteorological fields, we applied indirect soil moisture and temperature nudging technique (Pleim and Gilliam, 2009; Pleim and Xiu, 2003) together with a four-\n\nTable 1 Model configurations.', 'summary': 'with multiple satellite datasets such as the NASA OMI/Aura vertical  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  profile 1-Orbit level 2 data, NASA OMI tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}...'}, 来自论文ID: changes_in_the_ozone_chemical_regime_over_the_cont_1, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: cd25de7f-cc74-4e49-9870-1dc3e1142f29, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2015年启动两项煤炭清洁利用行动计划，聚焦四大煤控行业/21项关键技术，建立政府-企业-市场-公众协同治理框架,理由是详实记录中国空气污染治理政策演变但未提供新洞察，政策内容与图1形成互证，建议保留作政策背景,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['coal-dominated industries', 'strategic emerging industries coal use']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven', 'text': "On the policy side, the Chinese government explicitly proposed to promote the clean and efficient use of coal in 2014. And subsequently, two significant specialized action plans were published in 2015 (Action Plan for Clean and Efficient Use of Coal in Industry and Action Plan for Clean and Efficient Use of Coal), signifying that the clean and efficient use of coal in China has entered the implementation stage since 2015 (Zhu, 2019). Herein, the former plan chose four coal-dominated industries as key objects, and defined 21 types of critical technologies for clean and efficient coal utilization in the industry; the latter plan proposed the subjects involved in CCTPs include the government, enterprises, market, and the public, and all of the coal-rich districts in China were selected as key regions. Currently, a series of laws, regulations, and policies have been brought into effect, to alleviate air pollution and accelerate the development of CCTs. Additionally, China's 13th Five-Year Plan (FYP) ranges from 2016 to 2020, which sets goals and directions for national economic and social development during this period. In response to the economic regulation and marker supervision, 2020 is set as the last implementation year of many CCTPs, as shown in Fig. 1. Overall, these policies directed the dominant logic of atmospheric administration in the 13th FYP, namely utilizing coal resources cleanly and efficiently, reducing emissions comprehensively, and decreasing coal consumption.", 'summary': 'On the policy side, the Chinese government explicitly proposed to promote the clean and efficient use of coal in 2014. And subsequently, two significa...'}, 来自论文ID: air_quality_changes_in_china_2013-2020__effectiven, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'On-road emissions of fine particles and associated_1', 'text': 'Carbonaceous aerosols consisted of organic carbon (OC), elemental carbon (EC), and a small amount of carbonate. Since carbonates were very small part in atmospheric particles and the proportion of carbonates was less than  $5\\%$  of total carbon (TC), they would not be discussed in this study. The DRI thermal carbon analyzer (IMPROVE-A, DRI, USA) was used to detect the concentration of OC and EC, when  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sample was collected without the pretreatment after equilibrium weighing. Several water-soluble ions in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emitted from the tested vehicles were analyzed, which included  $\\mathrm{K}^{+}$ ,  $\\mathrm{Ca}^{2+}$ ,  $\\mathrm{Na}^{+}$ ,  $\\mathrm{Mg}^{2+}$ ,  $\\mathrm{NH}_4^+$ ,  $\\mathrm{Cl}^-$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-}$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_3^-$  and  $\\mathrm{F}^-$ . Ion chromatograph (IC) was used to analyze the water-soluble ions that collected on the filter. 21 crustal elements including Na, Mg, K, Ca, V, Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn, Ga, As, Rb, Sr, Ag, Cd, Cs, Ba and Pb were detected by inductively coupled plasma mass spectrometry (ICP-MS). Microwave digester was used as the pretreatment of collected filter samples. In order to find out the content of crustal elements in the\n\n$\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  samples, it is necessary to pretreat the collected filter membranes. The process of both pretreating and subsequent storage should avoid mixing the crustal elements to be tested.\n\n# 2.3. Evaluation of  $PM_{2.5}$  emissions\n\nThe mass difference of the sampled membrane could be calculated by weighing the masses before and after  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sampling. The real-time flow rate of vehicle emissions could be obtained by PEMS, and the driving conditions of tested vehicles were recorded by GPS. Emission factor of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  under real driving conditions could be calculated by Equation (1).\n\n$$\nE F = \\frac {\\Delta m \\cdot V \\cdot R}{V _ {1} S} \\tag {1}\n$$', 'summary': 'Carbonaceous aerosols consisted of organic carbon (OC), elemental carbon (EC), and a small amount of carbonate.                         具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究表明实施清洁煤技术政策(CCTPs)后，中国空气质量指数(AQI)平均下降18.82%，且政策效果存在2年滞后期，减排和去工业化是改善空气质量的两种核心路径。,理由是直接量化清洁煤政策的减霾效果（含具体百分比和滞后期），提供深度学习方法与机制分析，对政策效果建模有高价值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['CCTPs implementation lag', 'air quality index reduction', 'deindustrialization effect']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Air quality changes in China 2013-2020_ Effectiven', 'text': 'Clean and efficient use of coal in China entered the implementation stage in 2015, and a series of policies were established to promote the sustainable development of clean coal technologies (CCTs). However, the long-term effects of the clean coal technology policies (CCTPs) have not been evaluated, and the outbreak of coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) would bring great uncertainty regarding the effectiveness evaluation. Employing deep learning approaches and spatial autocorrelation analysis, the present work intended to explore the air quality variation before and after the implementation of CCTPs, and investigate the association between air quality and socioeconomic factors to explore the internal mechanism of air quality improvement. Results showed that after implementing CCTPs, the air quality index (AQI) had an average reduction of  $18.82\\%$  and the identical drop in air pollution in 2018 implied a 2-year time lag of CCTPs. Additionally, emission reduction and deindustrialization were explored as two promising ways to improve air quality while promoting energy transformation. The findings indicated that the Chinese government ought to pay more attention to long-term plans; industrial restructuring and environmental protection should be insisted upon to realize sustainable energy development. By providing a perspective on air quality improvement after the policies are implemented, this study can lead practitioners and academia to a comprehensive and objective view of clean coal policies.\n\n# 1. Table S1 in the Supplement lists the yields of formaldehyde and glyoxal from the OH oxidation of NMVOC precursors in our updated chemical mechanism. The lumped NMVOC precursors of formaldehyde in our mechanism included ethane, propane,  $\\geq \\mathrm{C_4}$  alkanes, ethene,  $\\geq \\mathrm{C}_3$  alkenes, benzene, toluene, xylenes, isoprene, monoterpenes, acetone, hydroxyacetone, methylgloxal, glycolaldehyde, acetaldehyde, 2-methyl-3-bute-nol, methyl ethyl ketone, methanol, and ethanol (lumped into  $\\geq \\mathrm{C}_4$  alkanes). Hereinafter we focused our discussion on these NMVOC precursors only, as their emissions may be constrained by formaldehyde and glyoxal observations.\n\nThe OH oxidation of isoprene is a major source of both formaldehyde and glyoxal over China (Fu et al., 2007, 2008; Myriokefalitakis et al., 2008).                         这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Mobile measurement of vehicle emission factors in ', 'text': 'In contrast to  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_{2}$ , and  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{X}}$ , the  $\\mathrm{O}_{3}$  profile indicated a decreasing trend from the entrance to the exit of the tunnel. The  $\\mathrm{O}_{3}$  concentration decreased until around  $1200\\mathrm{m}$ , and then remained at zero to the exit (Fig. 2e). According to (Nihill et al., 2021), the  $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio plays an important role in the atmospheric oxidation process. Inside the tunnel, a high  $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio (mixing zone: 1.89, accumulation zone: 8.09) may have caused different chemical reactions to those occurring in ambient air ( $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio: 0.1-1).\n\nThe  $\\sum$  VOCs concentration increased as the distance increased,\n\nfluctuating from 306 to 364 ppb, with the alkane group dominating. Interestingly, the  $\\sum \\mathrm{VOCs}$  concentration decreased near the entrance and exit of the tunnel (Fig. 2f), where VOCs might be suspected to participate in chemical reactions. Gasoline-fueled vehicles (GVs) mostly emit VOCs, whereas DVs mostly emit intermediate VOCs and semi-VOCs (Lu et al., 2018). The relatively low concentration and EF of VOCs in this study could be attributed to the high proportion of DVs in the tunnel. In addition, VOC emissions are affected by driving conditions (e.g., high emissions under low-speed driving conditions) (Huang et al., 2020).                         这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Long-term observations of oxygenated volatile orga', 'text': "Previous studies have proven that some low-carbon OVOCs (formaldehyde and acetaldehyde) can generate OH radicals and hydroperoxyl radicals  $\\mathrm{(HO_2)}$  through photolysis to affect the oxidizing capacity of the atmosphere (Volkamer et al., 2010; Shao et al., 2011; Xue et al., 2016). OVOCs can also participate in photochemical reactions and contribute to the generation of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  and SOA (Louie et al., 2013; Ehn et al., 2014). In addition, as most OVOCs are highly water soluble, they can be absorbed into the human body, irritating the eyes, skin and respiratory tract, thus harming human health. OVOCs such as formaldehyde, acetaldehyde, acetone and acrolein have been shown to pose serious health risks (WHO, 2000, Delfino et al., 2003; Bashkin, 2009; Du et al., 2014). Given the important role of OVOCs in photochemical reactions and the complexity of their sources, OVOCs have been the subject of extensive research recently (Sahu et al., 2017; Maji et al., 2020), especially in China, where air pollution is severe (Zhang et al., 2012, 2015; Zhou et al., 2019; Zhu et al., 2019). Zhang et al. (2012) studied the pollution characteristics of BTEX (benzene, toluene, ethylbenzene, m,p-xylene and o-xylene) and carbonyl compounds during summer in Beijing and found that the  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  formation potential of carbonyl compounds  $(166.1~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3)$  was approximately 2.5 times that of BTEX  $(65.4~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3)$ . Zhou et al. (2019) used proton transfer reaction mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) to measure VOCs in Xi'an and used the positive matrix factorization (PMF) model to analyze over 30 types of VOCs and identify eight primary sources and found that local emissions, such as industrial processes, solvent usage, residential biofuel use and vehicular exhaust, contributed about  $70\\%$  of the VOCs measured. Zhu et al. (2019) used PTR-MS to monitor OVOCs during different seasons and applied photochemical age parameter analysis to evaluate the sources of OVOCs in Shenzhen. They", 'summary': 'Previous studies have proven that some low-carbon OVOCs (formaldehyde and acetaldehyde) can generate OH radicals and hydroperoxyl radicals  $\\mathrm{(...'}, 来自论文ID: long-term_observations_of_oxygenated_volatile_orga, 关键词: None

                这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Changes in the ozone chemical regime over the cont', 'text': 'The identification of the  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  chemical regime is essential to determining the effectiveness of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  control policies. Based on analysis of a simple trajectory model, Sillman (1995) compared reactive odd nitrogen  $(\\mathrm{NO_y})$ ,  $\\mathrm{O_3 / (NO_y - NO_x)}$ , HCHO/NOy, and hydrogen peroxide  $(\\mathrm{H}_2\\mathrm{O}_2)$ /nitric acid  $(\\mathrm{HNO_3})$  as indicator species of  $\\mathrm{O_3 - NO_x - VOC}$  sensitivity. The following study by Tonnesen and Dennis (2000) found that the HCHO-to-  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  ratio  $(\\mathrm{HCHO} / \\mathrm{NO}_2)$  is more valuable than HCHO/NOy, owing to the short lifetime of  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO that can serve as proxies of  $\\mathrm{NO_x}$  and non-methane volatile organic compounds (NMVOCs) emissions. Satellite data have broader spatial and temporal coverage than in situ observations; hence, numerous studies have employed satellite-derived HCHO/NO2 ratio (Choi et al., 2012; Duncan et al., 2010; Martin et al., 2004; Schroeder et al., 2017). Recent studies, however, have reported that changes in satellite-observed  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO columns do not necessarily reflect the trends in the U.S. National Emission Inventory (NEI) and near-surface air quality. While the decrease of the satelliteobserved tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column has become slower since 2009, the trend of NEI indicates a monotonic decrease in  $\\mathrm{NO_x}$  emissions (Jiang et al., 2018; Silvern et al., 2019). Moreover, because of the significant reduction in surface emissions, the relative contribution of the background sources of  $\\mathrm{NO_x}$  in the troposphere (e.g., lightning and soils) has increased, as has its impact on atmospheric chemistry (Kang et al., 2019; Silvern et al., 2019). In the case of HCHO, its trend in urban cores is consistent with the trend of NEI emissions. However, biogenic and biomass burning (open fire) emissions, primarily driven by the temperature, are generally dominant over the southeastern and western U. S., respectively,', 'summary': 'The identification of the  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  chemical regime is essential to determining the effectiveness of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  control policies. Based o...'}, 来自论文ID: changes_in_the_ozone_chemical_regime_over_the_cont, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 85fe5b7d-4901-49f4-b52e-54313c8b46b6, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为NMVOC减排减少HO2/RO2自由基，抑制臭氧生成，但增强NO2+OH反应导致东中部臭氧损失；NMHC+O3反应在森林区仍是重要HOx来源。,理由是清晰描述自由基调控机制，但缺乏可视化数据或新颖方法,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HO2/RO2 modulation', 'radical-ozone interplay', 'NMHC oxidation pathways']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': 'atmospheric hydroxyl (OH) radicals. Due to the substantial decrease in NMVOC emissions, there was a reduction in the production of hydroperoxy radicals  $\\mathrm{(HO_2)}$  and organic peroxy radicals  $\\mathrm{(RO_2)}$  (Figure S86). Consequently, this reduction in  $\\mathrm{HO_2 / RO_2}$  levels, coupled with their reaction with NO, resulted in diminished  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production (Figures 7a and 7b). A strong correlation was observed between changes in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production via the  $\\mathrm{RO_2 + NO}$  reaction and NMVOC emissions (Figure 2), consistent with the findings of Souri et al. (2020). Typically, in NMVOC-rich environments, a decrease in NMVOC emissions boosts OH concentrations. Consequently, we noted an enhancement in the  $\\mathrm{NO_2 + OH}$  reaction in the eastern and central regions of China. In response to heightened  $\\mathrm{HO_x}$  concentrations over these areas, an increased  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss through the  $\\mathrm{O_3 + HO_x}$  pathway was observed. Furthermore, we detected a substantial decrease in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss through reactions with NMVOCs, especially in the southern China, where substantial isoprene emissions are prevalent. This reduction was primarily attributable to the decrease in NMVOC and  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  levels. While the NMVOC  $+\\mathrm{O_3}$  reaction proceeds at a substantially slower rate NMVOC  $+\\mathrm{OH}$ , this specific chemical pathway remains significant in oxidizing NMVOC and forming  $\\mathrm{HO_x}$  in forests areas (Paulson and Orlando, 1996). The difference in  $\\mathrm{O1D + H_2O}$  is primarily driven by the decrease of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  photolysis. Although the rate of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss decreases in some chemical pathways, overall, the rate of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production dominates the changes in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentration.', 'summary': 'atmospheric hydroxyl (OH) radicals. Due to the substantial decrease in NMVOC emissions, there was a reduction in the production of hydroperoxy radical...'}, 来自论文ID: constraint_of_non-methane_volatile_organic_compoun, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 5a8eb779-e173-43a6-9aea-525738b387f1, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图1b证实已建立排放因子的NMOG物种主要属于高挥发性物质（高于10⁶μg/m³阈值），显著忽略了对二次有机气溶胶(SOA)形成关键的IVOC前体物；图1a显示多数短寿命物种(化学寿命<物理传输寿命)缺少已知氧化产物数据，导致近场反应性模型存在重大空白。,理由是图像数据直接揭示NMOG排放表征的系统性缺陷，提供明确的深层量化指标（IVOC阈值/C*值）和未解决机制（近场反应性建模），且文本明确指向需'further work'的研究缺口。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['IVOC', 'NMOG speciation', 'near-field reactivity', 'C* threshold']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'An improved representation of fire non-methane org', 'text': 'Figure 1b shows the volatility of these same NMOG species. The species for which we have global EFs available are almost entirely very volatile and above a commonly held cutoff threshold for intermediate volatility compounds (IVOCs) vs. VOCs  $(\\mathrm{C}^{*} = 1\\times 10^{6}\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$ ; Ahern et al., 2019, and references therein). This suggests that both the standard model and our expanded treatment of NMOGs neglect many NMOG precursors for secondary organic aerosol. This study focuses on the OHR of NMOG from fires; further work is needed to constrain the EFs (Fig. 1b suggests that global EFs\n\nare not available for most IVOCs) and oxidation chemistry of NMOG species relevant to secondary organic aerosol (SOA) formation from fires.\n\nSpecies whose chemical lifetimes are shorter than the physical transport lifetimes (Fig. 1a) contribute strongly to near-field reactivity but are likely not exported from the grid box of emission. For these species, oxidation rapidly converts emitted species into secondary products, and it is these products that are exported away from the fire source. However, a detailed knowledge of the oxidative chemistry of many of these species is lacking (as evidenced by the small number of black-circled species, indicating "oxidation products known" in Fig. 1a). In particular, we note that we do not include several very reactive species (e.g., furfurals, guaiacol) (Coggon et al., 2019). A lumped highly reactive VOC may provide a means of describing this near-field reactivity in the model (though the oxidation products and their reactivity would be poorly described by such an approach). However, given that EFs for these highly reactive species are not globally characterized, there is currently no meaningful way to estimate the emissions of such a lumped VOC. Hence our model represents a lower limit of reactivity from fires despite our inclusion of longer-lived NMOG.', 'summary': 'Figure 1b shows the volatility of these same NMOG species. The species for which we have global EFs available are almost entirely very volatile and ab...'}, 来自论文ID: an_improved_representation_of_fire_non-methane_org, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'less effective in bringing agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations (Table S8). Figure 2 shows that the a posteriori NMVOC emission estimates from IE-2 were lower than the a priori estimates for all months. This was due to a combination of factors at work in the inversion. The low formaldehyde observations from OMI in all months drove a large reduction in the emissions of NMVOCs that produced only formaldehyde  $(\\geq C_4$  alkanes and  $\\geq C_3$  alkenes from anthropogenic activities, as well as primary formaldehyde from biomass burning). At the same time, the relatively high glyoxal observations from OMI drove an increase in the emissions of NMVOCs that produced mainly glyoxal (ethene, ethyne, and aromatics from anthropogenic activities, as well as primary glyoxal from biomass burning). For precursors that produced large amounts of both formaldehyde and glyoxal (most importantly biogenic isoprene), the inversion reduced the top-down emissions as the formaldehyde observations had more weight in the cost function than the glyoxal observations due to the lower observational errors in the formaldehyde VCDs. These findings showed the importance of well-characterized retrievals with reliable error estimates in inversion studies.', 'summary': 'less effective in bringing agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations (Table S8). Figure 2 shows that the a posteriori NMVOC emission estimates from ...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

These can be represented either using the special “UNKN” model species or using model species for a special mixture designed to represent unknown mixtures.</td></tr><tr><td>37</td><td>Unspecified complex mixtures that are judged to be nonvolatile and therefore represented using the “NVOL” special model species. 证据节点ID: 98c00e49-daff-4597-ad5d-10840bc8c70b, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图表显示：在NOx高估区域同时优化NMVOC排放时，HCHO生成过程加速补偿现有浓度（对应图中RMSE变化）；O3浓度与排放呈敏感区特性正/负相关。,理由是图表直观展示排放-O3敏感性的区域差异和交叉影响机制（含数据趋势图），提供可深挖实验名（EMDA/EMS3）和Paper ID（Souri 2020）,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['O3-NOx-VOC sensitivity', 'emission inversion optimization', 'RMSE compensation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': "![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/083dfa8a852a012dbc66ceb8b7d11f6af1e6716fa2b3293fa4d1ed28ef29c8c8.jpg)\n\n$\\mathrm{O}_3$  concentration and  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  (VOC) emissions are positively correlated in the  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  (VOC)-limited region and negatively correlated in the VOC  $(\\mathrm{NO}_x)$ -limited region (Tang et al., 2011). Therefore, the uncertainty in  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions can affect the model's diagnosis of  $\\mathrm{O}_3\\text{-NO}_x$ -VOC sensitivity, thereby introducing substantial model errors in the HCHO yield from VOC oxidation. In the base inversion experiment (EMDA), we simultaneously assimilated  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO observations to optimize  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and NMVOC emissions. To evaluate the impact of optimized  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ -VOC chemistry, EMS3 disregarded the uncertainty of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and focused on optimizing NMVOC emissions. Compared to the EMDA, in areas where  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  is significantly overestimated, NMVOC emissions in the EMS3 have correspondingly decreased (Figure 8b). This might be due to under high- $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  conditions, HCHO production occurs promptly, thereby compensating for the substantial amount of HCHO already present in the atmosphere by reducing emissions (Chan Miller et al., 2017). Figure S108 shows comparisons of concentrations and RMSE between the simulations using posterior emissions from EMS3 and EMDA experiments. Compared to VEP, CEP3-CEP2 showed a larger RMSE, highlighting the necessity for simultaneous optimization of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions when evaluating the impact of NMVOC emission optimization on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ . Additionally, CEP2 using prior  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions exhibited lower  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  levels over parts of NCP and YRD, as well as some urban areas (Figure 8c), but with larger biases and", 'summary': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/083dfa8a852a012dbc66ceb8b7d11f6af1e6716fa2b3293fa4d1ed28...'}, 来自论文ID: constraint_of_non-methane_volatile_organic_compoun, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 074210bc-9b9b-47ba-aea5-a47a6f13a9fe, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该研究更新了GEOS-Chem模型中芳香烃和烯烃化学机制，结果显示氮氧化物增加22%会显著降低非甲烷有机气体寿命，且乙二醛等产物浓度大幅升高。,理由是提供具体化学机制更新及定量影响（如22%的NO3增加），但未明确后续研究方向或数据线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['aromatic oxidation updates', 'ethene chemistry', 'NMOG lifetime']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'An improved representation of fire non-methane org', 'text': 'GEOS-Chem includes  $\\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-} - \\mathrm{NO}_3^- - \\mathrm{NH}_4^+$  thermodynamics (Fountoukis and Nenes, 2007) coupled to an  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ -VOC- $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -oxidant chemical mechanism (Chan Miller et al., 2017; Mao et al., 2013; Travis et al., 2016) with integrated Cl–Br–I chemistry (Sherwen et al., 2016). We add aromatic oxidation updates (with benzene, toluene, and xylene (C8 aromatic compounds including  $o-$ ,  $m-$ ,  $p$ -xylenes and ethylbenzene) emissions) as per Bates et al. (2021) and ethene and ethyne chemistry updates as per Kwon et al. (2021); both were developed in GEOS-Chem but not yet implemented in the standard model. These aromatic and ethene and ethyne chemistry updates modify oxidant levels, particularly  $\\mathrm{NO}_3$ , which overall decreases NMOG lifetimes. Bates et al. (2021) estimate an annual global mean increase of  $+22\\%$  for  $\\mathrm{NO}_3$ . In general, species not directly involved in the new chemistry are modestly impacted by these changes, while, for example, species like glyoxal and glycolaldehyde, which are important products of the ethene and ethyne chemistry, undergo large increases.\n\nBaseline fire emissions are from GFED4s (van der Werf et al., 2017) and are specified on a daily timescale. Additional details on fire NMOG emissions are provided in Sect. 3. A sensitivity analysis, described in Sect. 4, uses FINNv1.5. Anthropogenic emissions (including fossil and biofuel sources) follow the year-specific Community Emissions Data System\n\n(CEDS) global inventory (Hoesly et al., 2018).Trash burning emissions are from Wiedinmyer et al. (2014). Aircraft emissions are from the Aviation Emissions Inventory Code (AEIC) inventory (Stettler et al., 2011; Simone et al., 2013). Biogenic emissions are calculated online from the Model of Emissions of Gases and Aerosols from Nature version 2.1 (MEGANv2.1) emissions framework (Guenther et al., 2012).', 'summary': 'GEOS-Chem includes  $\\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-} - \\mathrm{NO}_3^- - \\mathrm{NH}_4^+$  thermodynamics (Fountoukis and Nenes, 2007) coupled to an  $\\mathrm{O}_3...'}, 来自论文ID: an_improved_representation_of_fire_non-methane_org, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 53718853-6e6f-42f5-ba25-c7ef93891ed4, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 4, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为O3浓度隧道内从入口向出口下降；VOCs总量（以烷烃为主）波动但进出口降低可能参与反应；柴油车比例高和车速快导致排放较低。,理由是证据内容与ID:4a6da45c...高度重复（相同文本和总结），信息冗余且无新增值，建议剪除以避免冗余。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Mobile measurement of vehicle emission factors in _1', 'text': 'In contrast to  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_{2}$ , and  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{X}}$ , the  $\\mathrm{O}_{3}$  profile indicated a decreasing trend from the entrance to the exit of the tunnel. The  $\\mathrm{O}_{3}$  concentration decreased until around  $1200\\mathrm{m}$ , and then remained at zero to the exit (Fig. 2e). According to (Nihill et al., 2021), the  $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio plays an important role in the atmospheric oxidation process. Inside the tunnel, a high  $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio (mixing zone: 1.89, accumulation zone: 8.09) may have caused different chemical reactions to those occurring in ambient air ( $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio: 0.1-1).\n\nThe  $\\sum$  VOCs concentration increased as the distance increased,\n\nfluctuating from 306 to 364 ppb, with the alkane group dominating. Interestingly, the  $\\sum \\mathrm{VOCs}$  concentration decreased near the entrance and exit of the tunnel (Fig. 2f), where VOCs might be suspected to participate in chemical reactions. Gasoline-fueled vehicles (GVs) mostly emit VOCs, whereas DVs mostly emit intermediate VOCs and semi-VOCs (Lu et al., 2018). The relatively low concentration and EF of VOCs in this study could be attributed to the high proportion of DVs in the tunnel. In addition, VOC emissions are affected by driving conditions (e.g., high emissions under low-speed driving conditions) (Huang et al., 2020). Because the mobile measurements were conducted between 14:00 and 17:30 to avoid rush-hour traffic, the average speed of the vehicles in the tunnel was over  $40\\mathrm{kmh}^{-1}$ , resulting in low VOC emissions.', 'summary': 'In contrast to  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_{2}$ , and  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{X}}$ , the  $\\mathrm{O}_{3}$  profile indicated a decreasing trend...'}, 来自论文ID: mobile_measurement_of_vehicle_emission_factors_in__1, 关键词: None

Introduction\n\nVolatile organic compounds (VOCs) are important precursors that can undergo atmospheric photochemical reactions with nitrogen oxides  $\\left(\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}\\right)$  under ultraviolet radiation to produce secondary products such as ozone  $\\left(\\mathrm{O}_{3}\\right)$  and peroxyacetyl nitrate (PAN) and form photochemical smog (Derwent et al., 2003; Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016). Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are a class of VOCs with oxygen-containing functional groups, mainly composed of aldehydes, ketones, and alcohols. The concentrations of atmospheric OVOCs vary greatly in different regions. Studies in clean marine areas showed that although phytoplankton in the marine may release OVOCs, such as methanol, acetaldehyde and acetone, their ambient air mixing ratios were usually only a few\n\nto a few hundred pptv (Galbally et al., 2007; Colomb et al., 2009; Wohl et al., 2020), while the concentrations of OVOCs in polluted areas can be as high as dozens of ppbv (Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016; Sheng et al., 2018; Zhou et al., 2019; Maji et al., 2020). The variation in OVOC concentrations is due to the wide variety and complexity of sources of OVOCs. OVOCs can be directly emitted by anthropogenic sources, e.g., solvent volatilization, vehicle emissions (Legreid et al., 2007; Ou et al., 2015), and biogenic sources (Jacob et al., 2002; Mellouki et al., 2015). In addition, OVOCs can also be formed as secondary products by photochemical oxidation of nonmethane hydrocarbons (NMHCs) from anthropogenic and biogenic sources (Yuan et al., 2012; Liu et al., 2015).', 'summary': '© 2020 Elsevier Ltd. The  $\\mathrm{O}_{3}$  concentration decreased until around  $1200\\mathrm{m}$ , and then remained at zero to the exit (Fig. 2e). According to (Nihill et al., 2021), the  $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio plays an important role in the atmospheric oxidation process. Inside the tunnel, a high  $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio (mixing zone: 1.89, accumulation zone: 8.09) may have caused different chemical reactions to those occurring in ambient air ( $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio: 0.1-1).\n\nThe  $\\sum$  VOCs concentration increased as the distance increased,\n\nfluctuating from 306 to 364 ppb, with the alkane group dominating. Interestingly, the  $\\sum \\mathrm{VOCs}$  concentration decreased near the entrance and exit of the tunnel (Fig. 2f), where VOCs might be suspected to participate in chemical reactions. Gasoline-fueled vehicles (GVs) mostly emit VOCs, whereas DVs mostly emit intermediate VOCs and semi-VOCs (Lu et al., 2018). The relatively low concentration and EF of VOCs in this study could be attributed to the high proportion of DVs in the tunnel. In addition, VOC emissions are affected by driving conditions (e.g., high emissions under low-speed driving conditions) (Huang et al., 2020).                         这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Long-term observations of oxygenated volatile orga', 'text': "Previous studies have proven that some low-carbon OVOCs (formaldehyde and acetaldehyde) can generate OH radicals and hydroperoxyl radicals  $\\mathrm{(HO_2)}$  through photolysis to affect the oxidizing capacity of the atmosphere (Volkamer et al., 2010; Shao et al., 2011; Xue et al., 2016). OVOCs can also participate in photochemical reactions and contribute to the generation of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  and SOA (Louie et al., 2013; Ehn et al., 2014). In addition, as most OVOCs are highly water soluble, they can be absorbed into the human body, irritating the eyes, skin and respiratory tract, thus harming human health. OVOCs such as formaldehyde, acetaldehyde, acetone and acrolein have been shown to pose serious health risks (WHO, 2000, Delfino et al., 2003; Bashkin, 2009; Du et al., 2014). Given the important role of OVOCs in photochemical reactions and the complexity of their sources, OVOCs have been the subject of extensive research recently (Sahu et al., 2017; Maji et al., 2020), especially in China, where air pollution is severe (Zhang et al., 2012, 2015; Zhou et al., 2019; Zhu et al., 2019). Zhou et al. (2019) used proton transfer reaction mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) to measure VOCs in Xi'an and used the positive matrix factorization (PMF) model to analyze over 30 types of VOCs and identify eight primary sources and found that local emissions, such as industrial processes, solvent usage, residential biofuel use and vehicular exhaust, contributed about  $70\\%$  of the VOCs measured. Based on analysis of a simple trajectory model, Sillman (1995) compared reactive odd nitrogen  $(\\mathrm{NO_y})$ ,  $\\mathrm{O_3 / (NO_y - NO_x)}$ , HCHO/NOy, and hydrogen peroxide  $(\\mathrm{H}_2\\mathrm{O}_2)$ /nitric acid  $(\\mathrm{HNO_3})$  as indicator species of  $\\mathrm{O_3 - NO_x - VOC}$  sensitivity. The following study by Tonnesen and Dennis (2000) found that the HCHO-to-  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  ratio  $(\\mathrm{HCHO} / \\mathrm{NO}_2)$  is more valuable than HCHO/NOy, owing to the short lifetime of  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO that can serve as proxies of  $\\mathrm{NO_x}$  and non-methane volatile organic compounds (NMVOCs) emissions. Satellite data have broader spatial and temporal coverage than in situ observations; hence, numerous studies have employed satellite-derived HCHO/NO2 ratio (Choi et al., 2012; Duncan et al., 2010; Martin et al., 2004; Schroeder et al., 2017). Recent studies, however, have reported that changes in satellite-observed  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO columns do not necessarily reflect the trends in the U.S. National Emission Inventory (NEI) and near-surface air quality. While the decrease of the satelliteobserved tropospheric  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  column has become slower since 2009, the trend of NEI indicates a monotonic decrease in  $\\mathrm{NO_x}$  emissions (Jiang et al., 2018; Silvern et al., 2019). Moreover, because of the significant reduction in surface emissions, the relative contribution of the background sources of  $\\mathrm{NO_x}$  in the troposphere (e.g., lightning and soils) has increased, as has its impact on atmospheric chemistry (Kang et al., 2019; Silvern et al., 2019). In the case of HCHO, its trend in urban cores is consistent with the trend of NEI emissions. However, biogenic and biomass burning (open fire) emissions, primarily driven by the temperature, are generally dominant over the southeastern and western U. S., respectively,', 'summary': 'The identification of the  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  chemical regime is essential to determining the effectiveness of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  control policies. Based o...'}, 来自论文ID: changes_in_the_ozone_chemical_regime_over_the_cont, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 85fe5b7d-4901-49f4-b52e-54313c8b46b6, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为NMVOC减排减少HO2/RO2自由基，抑制臭氧生成，但增强NO2+OH反应导致东中部臭氧损失；NMHC+O3反应在森林区仍是重要HOx来源。,理由是清晰描述自由基调控机制，但缺乏可视化数据或新颖方法,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HO2/RO2 modulation', 'radical-ozone interplay', 'NMHC oxidation pathways']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': 'atmospheric hydroxyl (OH) radicals. Due to the substantial decrease in NMVOC emissions, there was a reduction in the production of hydroperoxy radicals  $\\mathrm{(HO_2)}$  and organic peroxy radicals  $\\mathrm{(RO_2)}$  (Figure S86). Consequently, this reduction in  $\\mathrm{HO_2 / RO_2}$  levels, coupled with their reaction with NO, resulted in diminished  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production (Figures 7a and 7b). A strong correlation was observed between changes in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production via the  $\\mathrm{RO_2 + NO}$  reaction and NMVOC emissions (Figure 2), consistent with the findings of Souri et al. (2020). Typically, in NMVOC-rich environments, a decrease in NMVOC emissions boosts OH concentrations. Consequently, we noted an enhancement in the  $\\mathrm{NO_2 + OH}$  reaction in the eastern and central regions of China. In response to heightened  $\\mathrm{HO_x}$  concentrations over these areas, an increased  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss through the  $\\mathrm{O_3 + HO_x}$  pathway was observed. Furthermore, we detected a substantial decrease in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss through reactions with NMVOCs, especially in the southern China, where substantial isoprene emissions are prevalent. This reduction was primarily attributable to the decrease in NMVOC and  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  levels. While the NMVOC  $+\\mathrm{O_3}$  reaction proceeds at a substantially slower rate NMVOC  $+\\mathrm{OH}$ , this specific chemical pathway remains significant in oxidizing NMVOC and forming  $\\mathrm{HO_x}$  in forests areas (Paulson and Orlando, 1996). The difference in  $\\mathrm{O1D + H_2O}$  is primarily driven by the decrease of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  photolysis. Although the rate of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss decreases in some chemical pathways, overall, the rate of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production dominates the changes in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentration.', 'summary': 'atmospheric hydroxyl (OH) radicals. Due to the substantial decrease in NMVOC emissions, there was a reduction in the production of hydroperoxy radical...'}, 来自论文ID: constraint_of_non-methane_volatile_organic_compoun, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 5a8eb779-e173-43a6-9aea-525738b387f1, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图1b证实已建立排放因子的NMOG物种主要属于高挥发性物质（高于10⁶μg/m³阈值），显著忽略了对二次有机气溶胶(SOA)形成关键的IVOC前体物；图1a显示多数短寿命物种(化学寿命<物理传输寿命)缺少已知氧化产物数据，导致近场反应性模型存在重大空白。,理由是图像数据直接揭示NMOG排放表征的系统性缺陷，提供明确的深层量化指标（IVOC阈值/C*值）和未解决机制（近场反应性建模），且文本明确指向需'further work'的研究缺口。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['IVOC', 'NMOG speciation', 'near-field reactivity', 'C* threshold']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'An improved representation of fire non-methane org', 'text': 'Figure 1b shows the volatility of these same NMOG species. The species for which we have global EFs available are almost entirely very volatile and above a commonly held cutoff threshold for intermediate volatility compounds (IVOCs) vs. VOCs  $(\\mathrm{C}^{*} = 1\\times 10^{6}\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$ ; Ahern et al., 2019, and references therein). This suggests that both the standard model and our expanded treatment of NMOGs neglect many NMOG precursors for secondary organic aerosol. This study focuses on the OHR of NMOG from fires; further work is needed to constrain the EFs (Fig. 1b suggests that global EFs\n\nare not available for most IVOCs) and oxidation chemistry of NMOG species relevant to secondary organic aerosol (SOA) formation from fires.\n\nSpecies whose chemical lifetimes are shorter than the physical transport lifetimes (Fig. 1a) contribute strongly to near-field reactivity but are likely not exported from the grid box of emission. For these species, oxidation rapidly converts emitted species into secondary products, and it is these products that are exported away from the fire source. However, a detailed knowledge of the oxidative chemistry of many of these species is lacking (as evidenced by the small number of black-circled species, indicating "oxidation products known" in Fig. 1a). In particular, we note that we do not include several very reactive species (e.g., furfurals, guaiacol) (Coggon et al., 2019). A lumped highly reactive VOC may provide a means of describing this near-field reactivity in the model (though the oxidation products and their reactivity would be poorly described by such an approach). However, given that EFs for these highly reactive species are not globally characterized, there is currently no meaningful way to estimate the emissions of such a lumped VOC. Hence our model represents a lower limit of reactivity from fires despite our inclusion of longer-lived NMOG.', 'summary': 'Figure 1b shows the volatility of these same NMOG species. The species for which we have global EFs available are almost entirely very volatile and ab...'}, 来自论文ID: an_improved_representation_of_fire_non-methane_org, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 27006a1e-4b0d-4e16-a1c3-cd008ed4d527, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为后验NMVOC排放估算显示：甲醛观测驱动排放减少（特别针对仅生产甲醛的化合物，如≥C4烷烃），而glyoxal观测驱动排放增加（对主要生产glyoxal的化合物，如ethene和芳香烃）；isoprene排放减少归因于甲醛观测权重更高。,理由是证据涉及源排放反演模型（如PMF）和观测数据，与VOCs来源解析相关，但未提供深挖线索（如Paper ID），适合作为上下文参考。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Adjoint inversion', 'Positive matrix factorization (PMF)', 'Proton transfer reaction mass spectrometry (PTR-MS)']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'less effective in bringing agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations (Table S8). Figure 2 shows that the a posteriori NMVOC emission estimates from IE-2 were lower than the a priori estimates for all months. This was due to a combination of factors at work in the inversion. The low formaldehyde observations from OMI in all months drove a large reduction in the emissions of NMVOCs that produced only formaldehyde  $(\\geq C_4$  alkanes and  $\\geq C_3$  alkenes from anthropogenic activities, as well as primary formaldehyde from biomass burning). At the same time, the relatively high glyoxal observations from OMI drove an increase in the emissions of NMVOCs that produced mainly glyoxal (ethene, ethyne, and aromatics from anthropogenic activities, as well as primary glyoxal from biomass burning). For precursors that produced large amounts of both formaldehyde and glyoxal (most importantly biogenic isoprene), the inversion reduced the top-down emissions as the formaldehyde observations had more weight in the cost function than the glyoxal observations due to the lower observational errors in the formaldehyde VCDs. These findings showed the importance of well-characterized retrievals with reliable error estimates in inversion studies.', 'summary': 'less effective in bringing agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations (Table S8). Figure 2 shows that the a posteriori NMVOC emission estimates from ...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

                这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Development of a database for chemical mechanism a', 'text': '<table><tr><td>Total No.</td><td>Description</td></tr><tr><td>1670</td><td>Compounds assumed to be volatile and for which model species are assigned for all the lumped mechanisms listed in Table 1. These are represented using the special “NVOL” model species, which represents nonvolatile mass.</td></tr><tr><td>49</td><td>Compounds for which mechanism assignments were not made (unassigned compounds). These can be represented either using the special “NOASN” model species or using model species derived for a special mixture designed to represent unassigned compounds.</td></tr><tr><td>834</td><td>Mixtures whose compositions in terms of single compounds are specified. Model species are assigned based on those assigned to their constituents, none of which were unassigned.</td></tr><tr><td>68</td><td>Mixtures of unknown composition that are assumed to be volatile. These can be represented either using the special “UNKN” model species or using model species for a special mixture designed to represent unknown mixtures.</td></tr><tr><td>37</td><td>Unspecified complex mixtures that are judged to be nonvolatile and therefore represented using the “NVOL” special model species. These are primarily categories referring to Carbon Bond model species. These are represented the same as volatile unknown mixtures (see above).</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>Categories that are poorly named, ambiguous, or compounds whose structures could not be determined in this work but are presumed to be volatile. 证据节点ID: 98c00e49-daff-4597-ad5d-10840bc8c70b, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图表显示：在NOx高估区域同时优化NMVOC排放时，HCHO生成过程加速补偿现有浓度（对应图中RMSE变化）；O3浓度与排放呈敏感区特性正/负相关。,理由是图表直观展示排放-O3敏感性的区域差异和交叉影响机制（含数据趋势图），提供可深挖实验名（EMDA/EMS3）和Paper ID（Souri 2020）,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['O3-NOx-VOC sensitivity', 'emission inversion optimization', 'RMSE compensation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': "![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/083dfa8a852a012dbc66ceb8b7d11f6af1e6716fa2b3293fa4d1ed28ef29c8c8.jpg)\n\n$\\mathrm{O}_3$  concentration and  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  (VOC) emissions are positively correlated in the  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  (VOC)-limited region and negatively correlated in the VOC  $(\\mathrm{NO}_x)$ -limited region (Tang et al., 2011). Therefore, the uncertainty in  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions can affect the model's diagnosis of  $\\mathrm{O}_3\\text{-NO}_x$ -VOC sensitivity, thereby introducing substantial model errors in the HCHO yield from VOC oxidation. In the base inversion experiment (EMDA), we simultaneously assimilated  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO observations to optimize  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and NMVOC emissions. To evaluate the impact of optimized  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ -VOC chemistry, EMS3 disregarded the uncertainty of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and focused on optimizing NMVOC emissions. Compared to the EMDA, in areas where  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  is significantly overestimated, NMVOC emissions in the EMS3 have correspondingly decreased (Figure 8b). This might be due to under high- $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  conditions, HCHO production occurs promptly, thereby compensating for the substantial amount of HCHO already present in the atmosphere by reducing emissions (Chan Miller et al., 2017). Figure S108 shows comparisons of concentrations and RMSE between the simulations using posterior emissions from EMS3 and EMDA experiments. Compared to VEP, CEP3-CEP2 showed a larger RMSE, highlighting the necessity for simultaneous optimization of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions when evaluating the impact of NMVOC emission optimization on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ . Additionally, CEP2 using prior  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions exhibited lower  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  levels over parts of NCP and YRD, as well as some urban areas (Figure 8c), but with larger biases and", 'summary': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/083dfa8a852a012dbc66ceb8b7d11f6af1e6716fa2b3293fa4d1ed28...'}, 来自论文ID: constraint_of_non-methane_volatile_organic_compoun, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 074210bc-9b9b-47ba-aea5-a47a6f13a9fe, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该研究更新了GEOS-Chem模型中芳香烃和烯烃化学机制，结果显示氮氧化物增加22%会显著降低非甲烷有机气体寿命，且乙二醛等产物浓度大幅升高。,理由是提供具体化学机制更新及定量影响（如22%的NO3增加），但未明确后续研究方向或数据线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['aromatic oxidation updates', 'ethene chemistry', 'NMOG lifetime']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'An improved representation of fire non-methane org', 'text': 'GEOS-Chem includes  $\\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-} - \\mathrm{NO}_3^- - \\mathrm{NH}_4^+$  thermodynamics (Fountoukis and Nenes, 2007) coupled to an  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ -VOC- $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -oxidant chemical mechanism (Chan Miller et al., 2017; Mao et al., 2013; Travis et al., 2016) with integrated Cl–Br–I chemistry (Sherwen et al., 2016). We add aromatic oxidation updates (with benzene, toluene, and xylene (C8 aromatic compounds including  $o-$ ,  $m-$ ,  $p$ -xylenes and ethylbenzene) emissions) as per Bates et al. (2021) and ethene and ethyne chemistry updates as per Kwon et al. (2021); both were developed in GEOS-Chem but not yet implemented in the standard model. These aromatic and ethene and ethyne chemistry updates modify oxidant levels, particularly  $\\mathrm{NO}_3$ , which overall decreases NMOG lifetimes. Bates et al. (2021) estimate an annual global mean increase of  $+22\\%$  for  $\\mathrm{NO}_3$ . In general, species not directly involved in the new chemistry are modestly impacted by these changes, while, for example, species like glyoxal and glycolaldehyde, which are important products of the ethene and ethyne chemistry, undergo large increases.\n\nBaseline fire emissions are from GFED4s (van der Werf et al., 2017) and are specified on a daily timescale. Additional details on fire NMOG emissions are provided in Sect. 3. A sensitivity analysis, described in Sect. 4, uses FINNv1.5. Anthropogenic emissions (including fossil and biofuel sources) follow the year-specific Community Emissions Data System\n\n(CEDS) global inventory (Hoesly et al., 2018).Trash burning emissions are from Wiedinmyer et al. (2014). Aircraft emissions are from the Aviation Emissions Inventory Code (AEIC) inventory (Stettler et al., 2011; Simone et al., 2013). Biogenic emissions are calculated online from the Model of Emissions of Gases and Aerosols from Nature version 2.1 (MEGANv2.1) emissions framework (Guenther et al., 2012).', 'summary': 'GEOS-Chem includes  $\\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-} - \\mathrm{NO}_3^- - \\mathrm{NH}_4^+$  thermodynamics (Fountoukis and Nenes, 2007) coupled to an  $\\mathrm{O}_3...'}, 来自论文ID: an_improved_representation_of_fire_non-methane_org, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 53718853-6e6f-42f5-ba25-c7ef93891ed4, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为O3浓度隧道内从入口向出口下降；VOCs总量（以烷烃为主）波动但进出口降低可能参与反应；柴油车比例高和车速快导致排放较低。,理由是证据内容与ID:4a6da45c...高度重复（相同文本和总结），信息冗余且无新增值，建议剪除以避免冗余。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Mobile measurement of vehicle emission factors in _1', 'text': 'In contrast to  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_{2}$ , and  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{X}}$ , the  $\\mathrm{O}_{3}$  profile indicated a decreasing trend from the entrance to the exit of the tunnel. The  $\\mathrm{O}_{3}$  concentration decreased until around  $1200\\mathrm{m}$ , and then remained at zero to the exit (Fig. 2e). According to (Nihill et al., 2021), the  $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio plays an important role in the atmospheric oxidation process. Inside the tunnel, a high  $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio (mixing zone: 1.89, accumulation zone: 8.09) may have caused different chemical reactions to those occurring in ambient air ( $\\mathrm{NO} / \\mathrm{NO}_{2}$  ratio: 0.1-1).\n\nThe  $\\sum$  VOCs concentration increased as the distance increased,\n\nfluctuating from 306 to 364 ppb, with the alkane group dominating. Interestingly, the  $\\sum \\mathrm{VOCs}$  concentration decreased near the entrance and exit of the tunnel (Fig. 2f), where VOCs might be suspected to participate in chemical reactions. Gasoline-fueled vehicles (GVs) mostly emit VOCs, whereas DVs mostly emit intermediate VOCs and semi-VOCs (Lu et al., 2018). The relatively low concentration and EF of VOCs in this study could be attributed to the high proportion of DVs in the tunnel. In addition, VOC emissions are affected by driving conditions (e.g., high emissions under low-speed driving conditions) (Huang et al., 2020). Because the mobile measurements were conducted between 14:00 and 17:30 to avoid rush-hour traffic, the average speed of the vehicles in the tunnel was over  $40\\mathrm{kmh}^{-1}$ , resulting in low VOC emissions.', 'summary': 'In contrast to  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_{2}$ , and  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{X}}$ , the  $\\mathrm{O}_{3}$  profile indicated a decreasing trend...'}, 来自论文ID: mobile_measurement_of_vehicle_emission_factors_in__1, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Long-term observations of oxygenated volatile orga', 'text': '© 2020 Elsevier Ltd. All rights reserved.\n\n# Credit author contribution statement\n\nShi-Yong Xia: Methodology, Writing - original draft. Chuan Wang: Data curation, Formal analysis. Bo Zhu: Conceptualization, Data curation. Xue Chen: Data curation. Ning Feng: Formal analysis. Guang-He Yu: Conceptualization, Supervision. Xiao-Feng Huang: Methodology, Conceptualization, Writing - review & editing.\n\n# 1. Introduction\n\nVolatile organic compounds (VOCs) are important precursors that can undergo atmospheric photochemical reactions with nitrogen oxides  $\\left(\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}\\right)$  under ultraviolet radiation to produce secondary products such as ozone  $\\left(\\mathrm{O}_{3}\\right)$  and peroxyacetyl nitrate (PAN) and form photochemical smog (Derwent et al., 2003; Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016). Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are a class of VOCs with oxygen-containing functional groups, mainly composed of aldehydes, ketones, and alcohols. The concentrations of atmospheric OVOCs vary greatly in different regions. Studies in clean marine areas showed that although phytoplankton in the marine may release OVOCs, such as methanol, acetaldehyde and acetone, their ambient air mixing ratios were usually only a few\n\nto a few hundred pptv (Galbally et al., 2007; Colomb et al., 2009; Wohl et al., 2020), while the concentrations of OVOCs in polluted areas can be as high as dozens of ppbv (Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016; Sheng et al., 2018; Zhou et al., 2019; Maji et al., 2020). The variation in OVOC concentrations is due to the wide variety and complexity of sources of OVOCs. OVOCs can be directly emitted by anthropogenic sources, e.g., solvent volatilization, vehicle emissions (Legreid et al., 2007; Ou et al., 2015), and biogenic sources (Jacob et al., 2002; Mellouki et al., 2015). In addition, OVOCs can also be formed as secondary products by photochemical oxidation of nonmethane hydrocarbons (NMHCs) from anthropogenic and biogenic sources (Yuan et al., 2012; Liu et al., 2015).', 'summary': '© 2020 Elsevier Ltd. All rights reserved.\n\n# Credit author contribution statement\n\nShi-Yong Xia: Methodology, Writing - original draft. However, despite these advancements, the issue of  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  pollution persists and, in certain cases, has shown signs of worsening (Ren et al., 2022). The increase in  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  concentration can be attributed not only to adverse meteorological conditions but also predominantly to unbalanced joint control of non-methane volatile organic compounds (NMVOCs) and nitrogen oxides ( $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ ) (Li et al., 2020). NMVOCs are vital precursors of  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  and have a substantial impact on the atmospheric oxidation capacity, thereby altering the lifetimes of other pollutants. Accurately quantifying NMVOC emissions holds significant importance in investigating their impact on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  chemistry and in formulating emission reduction policies.', 'summary': '# Keywords\n\nNMVOC emissions,  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  pollution, Emission inversion, HCHO column retrievals, Data assimilation\n\n# 1 Introduction\n\nSince the Ch...'}, 来自论文ID: constraint_of_non-methane_volatile_organic_compoun, 关键词: None

    "extracted_insight": "研究发现生物质燃烧中PM2.5/CO排放比值为0.09±0.04，该比值可作为监测燃烧排放的关键指标；同时指出烟雾气溶胶模型需要调整OM/OC转换系数为2.2以提高精度。",

    "branch_action": "GROW",
    "extracted_insight": "VOC源解析对冬季PM2.5控制至关重要，现有两种OFP/SOAP估算方法中，排放清单法因依赖国外排放因子存在较大不确定性，而源谱测量法缺乏多源同步数据支撑。",
    "scores": {"relevance": 9, "credibility": 7},
    "reason": "明确指出VOC与PM2.5污染的因果关系及当前研究方法缺陷，引出对本地化排放因子和同步测量方案的深挖需求。",
    "suggested_keywords": ["VOC source apportionment", "OFP estimation", "local emission factors"]
  },

    "target_evidence_id": "77c0df59-7a0e-4406-b0b9-d623913c38cb",
    "branch_action": "GROW",
    "extracted_insight": "图15显示中国热带/温带省份NH3农业排放空间异质性，大型电厂SO2/CO2排放比随规模增大而降低（归因于脱硫设备覆盖率提升），该趋势未被EDGAR等全局恒定比模型捕捉。",
    "scores": {"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
    "reason": "包含关键图表展示区域排放差异（含热带/温带分区）和电厂规模与排放比的反向关系，提供检验模型精度的具体线索。",
    "suggested_keywords": ["SO2/CO2 emission ratio", "FGD efficiency", "plant-size dependency"]
  },
  {
    "target_evidence_id": "1f1fd4a9-bca3-4868-b9c1-adfcff21ff64",
    "branch_action": "KEEP",
    "extracted_insight": "东亚因工业/交通主导具有最低SO2/CO2和CO/CO2排放比，印度/东南亚因住宅燃烧效率低导致高排放比，区域排放比可表征能源结构差异。",
    "scores": {"relevance": 6, "credibility": 7},
    "reason": "提供区域对比框架但缺乏具体数据支撑，属有价值的背景信息但无直接深挖路径。",
    "suggested_keywords": ["regional emission signature", "combustion efficiency indicator", "SO2/CO2 spatial pattern"]
  },
  {
    "target_evidence_id": "bc8c3ef7-ff6a-4578-86d4-1b27722acb32",
    "branch_action": "GROW",
    "extracted_insight": "图7揭示PM2.5浓度梯度下VOC源贡献动态变化：交通排放（27.8%）和工业源（25.4%）主导OFP；高污染时溶剂使用对SOAP贡献激增，源解析需结合污染水平。",
    "scores": {"relevance": 10, "credibility": 9},
    "reason": "多图表直观展示PM2.5浓度与VOC来源贡献的耦合机制，提供污染治理的优先级判据，具备重大深挖价值。",
    "suggested_keywords": ["VOC source-PM2.5 coupling", "pollution-dependent apportionment", "OFP/SOAP tradeoff"]
  }
]
```

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为IE-4后验模拟显著提高人为glyoxal前体排放估计，使glyoxal垂直柱密度（VCDs）与OMI观测在所有月份一致，夏季生物源异戊二烯排放增加同时改善了甲醛VCDs。,理由是包含关键量化结果（R值从0.81提升至0.95）并引用图2和S6，提供深挖路径进行排放归因分析。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Vertical Column Densities (VCDs)', 'adjoint inversion']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'posteriori glyoxal VCDs from IE-4 were in better agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations for all months (Table S8). Figures 2 and S6 show that this increase in the a posteriori glyoxal VCDs in IE-4 was achieved by substantially increasing the emission estimates of anthropogenic glyoxal precursors for all months. In summer, the emissions of biogenic isoprene (precursor to both glyoxal and formaldehyde) also increased. As a result, the a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs in IE-4 increased in summer but remained similar to the a priori simulation for the other months (Figs. 7 and 8, Table S7).\n\nFigure S4 also compared the model a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs in 2007 against the GOME-2 observations, the model a priori formaldehyde VCDs, and the MAX-DOAS measurements (during 2010-2016) at Xianghe at GOME-2 crossing time. Compared to the a priori, our a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs were in better agreement with the seasonal variation in the MAX-DOAS measurements (R values increased from 0.81 for the a priori to 0.95 for IE-1 and 0.93 for IE-3). During the warm months (May to September), the monthly a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs from IE-1 and IE-3 bracketed the interannual variation in monthly formaldehyde VCDs measured by MAX-DOAS. For the rest of the year, both the GOME-2A observations and the a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs were systematically biased low relative to the MAX-DOAS measurements. As discussed before, these biases could not be fully accounted for by the interannual variability in the local formaldehyde VCDs and were thus likely due to sampling or retrieval difference between the MAX-DOAS and the satellite.\n\n# 4.2 Top-down estimates of Chinese NMVOC emissions from inversion experiments', 'summary': 'posteriori glyoxal VCDs from IE-4 were in better agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations for all months (Table S8).                         这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Biomass burning emissions estimated with a global ', 'text': 'The representation of smoke aerosols as OM  $(=1.5\\times\\mathrm{OC})$ , BC and sulphate  $(=1.5\\times\\mathrm{SO}_2)$  in the MACC model appears to be not entirely adequate in view of Table 3: for example, adding up the emission factors for OM, BC and sulphate for savannah yields  $5.8\\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{kg}^{-1}$  while the emission factor for total particulate matter is  $8.5\\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{kg}^{-1}$ . As a consequence, a scaling factor of 2.2 instead of 1.5 might be used for the calculation of the OM and sulphate emissions. Values around 2.2 for the OM/OC ratio have also been proposed for aged pollution and biomass burning aerosols by Turpin and Lim (2001), Pang et al. (2006) and Chen and Yu (2007). This would still leave an unexplained discrepancy by a factor of 2.3.\n\nThe similarity of the smoke outflow from Africa and South America into the South Atlantic in the analysis and the enhanced model in Fig. 8 is an indication that the aerosol sink processes are adequately implemented in the atmospheric model. Furthermore, it is unlikely – but possible – that all four atmospheric aerosol models (Morcette et al., 2009; Reid et al., 2009; Sofiev et al., 2009; Colarco, 2011) drastically overestimate the smoke aerosol sinks.\n\nThe aerosol emission factors appear to be well established: those compiled by Akagi et al. (2011), which are partially reproduced in Table 3, are within  $20\\%$  of the values used in GFASv1.0. The extensive review of Janhäll et al. (2010) is also consistent. The emission ratio  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5} / \\mathrm{CO}$  can be even more robustly measured than the aerosol emission factor. Janhäll et al. (2010) show that it is  $0.09 \\pm 0.04$  for all fires, which agrees excellently with the corresponding value of 0.084 derived from Table 3. However, there are also studies that find significantly larger values. Reid et al. (2005b) report average PM emission factors of 9 and  $34\\mathrm{gkg}^{-1}$  (DM) for flaming and smouldering combustion, respectively, and point', 'summary': 'The representation of smoke aerosols as OM  $(=1.5\\times\\mathrm{OC})$ , BC and sulphate  $(=1.5\\times\\mathrm{SO}_2)$  in the MACC model appears to be ...'}, 来自论文ID: biomass_burning_emissions_estimated_with_a_global_, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'Over eastern China, Liu et al. (2012) showed that the glyoxal column concentrations observed by SCIAMACHY in August 2007 were more than twice the simulated glyoxal columns using the bottom-up emission inventory developed by Q. Zhang et al. (2009). Over the Pearl River Delta (PRD) area in southern China, the discrepancy was at least a factor of 3. They suggested that the missing glyoxal source over eastern China was anthropogenic, on the basis that the anomalous glyoxal columns observed by SCIAMACHY (relative to the glyoxal columns simulated by their model) were spatially correlated with anthropogenic  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions. They estimated the Chinese anthropogenic aromatics emissions to be  $13.4\\mathrm{Tgyr}^{-1}$ , which was 6 times the  $2.4\\mathrm{Tgyr}^{-1}$  anthropogenic aromatic flux estimated by Q. Zhang et al. (2009). In contrast, Chan Miller et al. (2016) simulated the formaldehyde and glyoxal column concentrations over the PRD in southern China for the years 2006 and 2007 using the same inventory developed by Q. Zhang et al. (2009). They found that their simulated formaldehyde columns were consistent with the Ozone Monitoring Instrument (OMI) formaldehyde observations, while their simulated glyoxal columns were lower than OMI observations by only  $40\\%$ . They attributed the high anthropogenic aromatics emission estimate by Liu et al. (2012) in part to a regional high-bias in the SCIAMACHY data, and in part to the lower glyoxal yields from aromatics oxidation used in Liu et al. (2012).', 'summary': 'Over eastern China, Liu et al.                         这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds', 'text': 'For the OFP of different sources (Fig. 6), vehicle emissions had the largest contribution  $(27.8\\%)$ , followed by industrial sources  $(25.4\\%)$ , solvent usage  $(20.9\\%)$ , combustion sources  $(18.9\\%)$ , and gasoline evaporation  $(7.04\\%)$ , respectively. Relative difference between the SOA concentrations averaged in July with and without biogenic emissions  $(\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3})$\n\nSOA yield of the oxidized products of monoterpene and isoprene can be enhanced at high NOx concentrations, favoring the formation of organic nitrate, which is a low-volatility product and is likely to partition into seed particles. When the NOx level is low, isoprene oxidation occurs via the ISOPOOH pathway to form IEPOX-SOA, which favorably forms organic sulfate in acidic environments. This reaction has been incorporated into CMAQ; thus, the inclusion of both anthropogenic and biogenic emissions reflects these products, but including only one of them is unable to account for their reaction.\n\n# 3.5. Discussion of uncertainties in model driving variables', 'summary': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/ee507cff-688b-41b8-9b9a-13c820585331/5f5f94289697e46f174d107af6a74f1493d04d75a0f6d1e5052f92d5...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为BVOCs（特别是异戊二烯）对中国的近地面臭氧和SOA形成有显著影响，异戊二烯是北京地区臭氧形成主要贡献者（占50%），也是中国BSOA主导来源。,理由是提供关键背景：综述多项中国本土研究（Mo等2018；Qin等2018），但未包含深挖线索或原创数据。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Isoprene SOA', 'Ozone formation potential', 'BSOA formation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': 'Modeling and laboratory studies have shown that BVOC emissions can affect surface ozone and SOA. With the remarkable economic development and rapid increase of fossil fuel consumption, the air quality in China has deteriorated in recent years. Ground-level ozone pollution has become a major air quality issue in China. In addition, heavy pollution episodes exceeding 120 ppbv often occur in metropolis clusters such as Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei, the Yangtze River Delta and Sichuan Basin. A better understanding of the causes of elevated ozone in China is critical to develop effective emissions control strategies. Biogenic SOA (BSOA) is a major pollutant worldwide. Because of the large anthropogenic emission sources in China, anthropogenic SOA could be comparable to BSOA. Ding et al. (2014) analyzed SOA tracers from isoprene, monoterpenes, sesquiterpene and aromatics in China and found that isoprene and aromatics are primary contributors to SOA. Mo et al. (2018) investigated the contribution of biogenic isoprene emissions to ground-level ozone formation based on ground-based measurements in Beijing and found that isoprene emissions accounted for half of the total ozone formation potential. Qin et al. (2018) employed the CMAQ model to simulate isoprene-derived and monoterpene-derived BSOA formation in China, and the results indicated that isoprenederived BSOA dominates BSOA formation in China. However, those studies focused only on a specific temporal period or regional scale. The overall impact of BVOC emissions on ground-level ozone and SOA formation in China remains unclear and must be addressed.', 'summary': 'Modeling and laboratory studies have shown that BVOC emissions can affect surface ozone and SOA. With the remarkable economic development and rapid in...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

Comparison of the concentration profile between stationary and mobile measurements in the tunnel. The error bar and gray shaded area represent the standard deviation.\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/e4a3432b-8345-4cd9-8a8c-189d477acfe5/dbd3ccf82ce12bef302ee92ce1a29866d849a7f7893fab883b0c146e67929387.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/e4a3432b-8345-4cd9-8a8c-189d477acfe5/d6f3ce635dd242525c8cfd868b0f3f5528645db0881a3896237bedf8e0d0fffe.jpg)\n\nTable 1 Comparison of the emission factors  $(\\mathrm{mg}\\bullet \\mathrm{km}^{-1}\\bullet \\mathrm{vehicle}^{-1})$  determined this study with those reported in other studies.', 'summary': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/e4a3432b-8345-4cd9-8a8c-189d477acfe5/854fc111533f033330f4cf5a6eca65e630a38d2ea935a2bf78e11a4d...'}, 来自论文ID: mobile_measurement_of_vehicle_emission_factors_in_, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 27006a1e-4b0d-4e16-a1c3-cd008ed4d527, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为后验NMVOC排放估算显示：甲醛观测驱动排放减少（特别针对仅生产甲醛的化合物，如≥C4烷烃），而glyoxal观测驱动排放增加（对主要生产glyoxal的化合物，如ethene和芳香烃）；isoprene排放减少归因于甲醛观测权重更高。,理由是证据涉及源排放反演模型（如PMF）和观测数据，与VOCs来源解析相关，但未提供深挖线索（如Paper ID），适合作为上下文参考。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Adjoint inversion', 'Positive matrix factorization (PMF)', 'Proton transfer reaction mass spectrometry (PTR-MS)']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'less effective in bringing agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations (Table S8). Figure 2 shows that the a posteriori NMVOC emission estimates from IE-2 were lower than the a priori estimates for all months. This was due to a combination of factors at work in the inversion. The low formaldehyde observations from OMI in all months drove a large reduction in the emissions of NMVOCs that produced only formaldehyde  $(\\geq C_4$  alkanes and  $\\geq C_3$  alkenes from anthropogenic activities, as well as primary formaldehyde from biomass burning). At the same time, the relatively high glyoxal observations from OMI drove an increase in the emissions of NMVOCs that produced mainly glyoxal (ethene, ethyne, and aromatics from anthropogenic activities, as well as primary glyoxal from biomass burning). For precursors that produced large amounts of both formaldehyde and glyoxal (most importantly biogenic isoprene), the inversion reduced the top-down emissions as the formaldehyde observations had more weight in the cost function than the glyoxal observations due to the lower observational errors in the formaldehyde VCDs. These findings showed the importance of well-characterized retrievals with reliable error estimates in inversion studies.', 'summary': 'less effective in bringing agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations (Table S8). Figure 2 shows that the a posteriori NMVOC emission estimates from ...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 0f1e531d-74af-4b73-8550-f14b9d511ba4, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'quantifying IVOC emissions and oxidation kinetics for SOA formation'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为VOC源解析对冬季PM2.5控制至关重要，现有两种OFP/SOAP估算方法中，排放清单法因依赖国外排放因子存在较大不确定性，而源谱测量法缺乏多源同步数据支撑。,理由是明确指出VOC与PM2.5污染的因果关系及当前研究方法缺陷，引出对本地化排放因子和同步测量方案的深挖需求。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['VOC source apportionment', 'OFP estimation', 'local emission factors']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds', 'text': 'Currently, stringent controls on VOCs are needed to mitigate  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in winter (Huang et al., 2014). The estimation of ozone formation potential (OFP) and SOA of each VOC source is vital before cost-effective strategies can be carried out. Indeed, many researches have been done on determining the most reactive VOC sources. Generally, there are two methods to estimate the OFP or SOA formation potential (SOAP) of each VOC source. One is the speciated VOC emission inventory (Zheng et al., 2009; Liang et al., 2017; Wu et al., 2017; Wu and Xie, 2017) and the other refers to the field measurement of VOC profiles from source emissions. The emission inventory method is sensitive to emission factors, and most of these speciated inventory studies in China always adopted emission factors from studies conducted in foreign countries or other regions, which had large uncertainty (Zhang et al., 2013; Wang, 2014; Wu and Xie, 2017). The local VOC emission inventory is still insufficient (Li et al., 2017), mainly due to the complexity of obtaining emission factors and accurate source activity data.\n\nMeanwhile, the source-specific measurements and emission inventory establishing works are costly. In practice, the estimation of photochemical characteristics (i.e., OFP) with measured VOC source profiles is continuously being reported. For instance, the OFP of gasoline evaporation (Zhang et al., 2013), solvent usage (Wang, 2014), non-coal emission (He et al., 2015), petroleum refinery emission (Zhang et al., 2017), and thermal power plant (Yan et al., 2017) have been done. However, the lack of synchronous measurements of various sources may obstruct the understanding which source contributing most to the ambient ozone and SOA formation.', 'summary': 'Currently, stringent controls on VOCs are needed to mitigate  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in winter (Huang et al., 2014). The estimation of ozone f...'}, 来自论文ID: source_apportionment_of_volatile_organic_compounds, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: c3b1ba3f-c803-4e14-95fd-8708b3a2f212, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2017年中国BVOC排放量达23.54Tg/年，夏季导致BTH/SCB/YRD/PRD地区臭氧浓度最高增加47μg/m³，且70%的SOA来自生物源；人为排放与生物排放相互作用可提升60%生物源SOA形成,理由是量化展示BVOC对臭氧/SOA的区域影响及人为-生物排放耦合机制，包含模型情景分析(WRF-CMAQ)和关键数据峰值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEGAN model', 'biogenic SOA formation', 'VOC-limited urban areas', 'anthropogenic-biogenic interaction']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': "Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOC) play an important role in global environmental chemistry and climate. In the present work, biogenic emissions from China in 2017 were estimated based on the Model of Emissions of Gases and Aerosols from Nature (MEGAN). The effects of BVOC emissions on ozone and secondary organic aerosol (SOA) formation were investigated using the WRF-CMAQ modeling system. Three parallel scenarios were developed to assess the impact of BVOC emissions on China's ozone and SOA formation in July 2017. Biogenic emissions were estimated at  $23.54\\mathrm{Tg / yr}$ , with a peak in the summer and decreasing from southern to northern China. The high BVOC emissions across eastern and southwestern China increased the surface ozone levels, particularly in the BTH (Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei), SCB (Sichuan Basin), YRD (Yangtze River Delta) and central PRD (Pearl River Delta) regions, with increases of up to  $47\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  due to the sensitivity of VOC-limited urban areas. In summer, most SOA concentrations formed over China are from biogenic sources (national average of  $70\\%$ ). And SOA concentrations in YRD and SCB regions are generally higher than other regions. Excluding anthropogenic emissions while keeping biogenic emissions unchanged results that SOA concentrations reduce by  $60\\%$  over China, which indicates that anthropogenic emissions can interact with biogenic emissions then facilitate biogenic SOA formation. It is suggested that controlling anthropogenic emissions would result in reduction of both anthropogenic and biogenic SOA.\n\n# 1. Introduction", 'summary': 'Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOC) play an important role in global environmental chemistry and climate. In the present work, biogenic emissio...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None
