证据节点ID: 0e26e3a6-efcc-45be-86de-5db0cc1f4815, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为BVOCs占全球VOC排放90%以上，尤其异戊二烯/单萜类通过氧化反应主导SOA生成和新粒子形成，MEGAN模型基于植物功能型(PFT)构建排放基准。,理由是仅重复基础BVOC常识（排放占比/反应路径），未提供新数据或模型改进方案，与核心问题关联较弱。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': 'Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOCs) emitted from terrestrial ecosystems have substantial effects on the global climate and environmental chemistry. Previous studies have shown that up to  $90\\%$  of the total VOC emissions are derived from biogenic sources (Guenther et al. 1995). BVOCs such as isoprene, monoterpenes and sesquiterpenes participate in oxidative chemical reactions in the atmosphere with oxidants such as ozone, OH and  $\\mathrm{NO}_3$  radicals. In addition, BVOCs are major sources of secondary organic aerosols (SOA) and new particle formation (Hallquist et al. 2009; Kulmala et al. 2004; Paasonen et al. 2013; Kota et al. 2015). Measurements and modeling of BVOC emissions are of vital importance to understand the carbon cycle, biosphere-atmosphere interactions and climate change (Gu et al. 2017; Hantson et al. 2017).\n\nOver the past few decades, research has been focused on four objectives: (1) developing and improving BVOC instruments and technology, (2) quantifying the effects of BVOC emissions, (3) developing and improving BVOC emission models, and (4) understanding the mechanisms underlying the interactions of BVOCs with anthropogenic volatile organic compounds (AVOCs). Most BVOCs are highly reactive and readily interact with oxidants, consequently influencing the atmospheric composition. Therefore, accurately estimating the BVOC emissions can improve the results of studies of the effects of BVOCs on the regional and global air quality and climate systems (Makkonen et al. 2012).\n\nBVOC emissions are calculated with models, and the Model of Emissions of Gases and Aerosols from Nature (MEGAN) is one of the models commonly used (Guenther et al. 2006). The standard emission potential of a plant depends on the plant functional type (PFT) and its', 'summary': 'Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOCs) emitted from terrestrial ecosystems have substantial effects on the global climate and environmental chemi...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: b7243cb9-1a9d-4b14-99b1-410f98d59ff5, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'radical cycling mechanisms between OVOCs and HO_x under low-NOx'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图片对比反演模型（OptS2）与实测数据在垂直剖面的差异，并展示生物源甲醇排放通量分布。,理由是聚焦生物挥发物甲醇的空间反演，与工业源O3前体研究关联度低，且缺乏污染机制深度分析。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['space-based retrieval', 'biogenic methanol']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'First space-based derivation of the global atmosph', 'text': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/d37cfd76-9186-461a-b151-d4a4964dc373/452e68eac316bccbf5f390f2eda70449cdc11da5c25056a90ceb091057cbb50c.jpg)  \nFig. 14. Comparison between vertical profiles measured during the INTEX-A and NEAQS aircraft missions and inferred from the OptS2 (black lines), OptS2-conv (blue), OptS2-drydep (green), and OptS2-OH (red).\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/d37cfd76-9186-461a-b151-d4a4964dc373/7503a46bda7c62195be36d494fda439e348f03061b5788e94d9e27067dbdf175.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/d37cfd76-9186-461a-b151-d4a4964dc373/9959ba5796d2c791beb599b000ddf6d4573b18ade5fe3b48eb7bb938f0fc6b41.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/d37cfd76-9186-461a-b151-d4a4964dc373/c97471d1bf95ecdc29a1febfbe9cefe9050603a6cbd18e6c1dc5d25e851eca9b.jpg)  \nFig. 15. Annually averaged biogenic methanol emissions derived by the inversion OptS1, which uses the Jacob et al. (2005) biogenic sources as a priori, and by the standard OptS2 inversion. Units are  $10^{10}\\mathrm{molcm}^{-2}\\mathrm{s}^{-1}$ .', 'summary': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/d37cfd76-9186-461a-b151-d4a4964dc373/452e68eac316bccbf5f390f2eda70449cdc11da5c25056a90ceb0910...'}, 来自论文ID: first_space-based_derivation_of_the_global_atmosph, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 2eee58e1-3a49-4d90-b3d2-2b4203921418, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'low-NOx pathways for glyoxal formation from aromatics oxidation'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为模型更新了甲醛和glyoxal的化学机制，包括Henry定律常数调整（从3.6×10⁵更新至4.19×10⁵）和湿气溶胶表面吸附系数（γ=2.9×10⁻³），以提升GEOS-Chem模型的准确性。,理由是提供模型优化细节并引用多篇文献（Fu et al. 2008; Mao et al. 2013），但未包含可深挖的图表或明确探索路径。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['GEOS-Chem adjoint', "Henry's law constant"]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': "Formaldehyde and glyoxal in the GEOS-Chem model were both removed by photolysis, as well as dry and wet deposition (Fu et al., 2008). We updated the Henry's law constant for glyoxal from  $3.6 \\times 10^{5} \\times \\exp [7.2 \\times 10^{3} \\times (1 / T - 1 / 298)]$  (Fu et al., 2008) to  $4.19 \\times 10^{5} \\times \\exp [(62.2 \\times 10^{3} / R) \\times (1 / T - 1 / 298)]$  (Ip et al., 2009) and added the dry deposition of formaldehyde, glyoxal, methylglyoxal, and glycolaldehyde on leaves (Mao et al., 2013). In addition, we assumed that glyoxal was reactively taken up by wet aerosols and cloud droplets with an uptake coefficient  $\\gamma = 2.9 \\times 10^{-3}$  (Liggio et al., 2005; Fu et al., 2008). All other physical and chemical processes in our forward model were as described in Fu et al. (2008).\n\nFor the forward model described above, we developed the adjoint by modifying the standard GEOS-Chem adjoint (version 34) (Henze et al., 2007). We used the Kinetic PreProcessor (KPP) (Daescu et al., 2003; Sandu et al., 2003) to construct the adjoint of the updated photochemical mechanism. Adjoint algorithms were updated to include the emission and deposition processes of formaldehyde and glyoxal precursors. The aqueous uptake rate of glyoxal by wet aerosols was a function of the ambient glyoxal concentration and the total wet aerosol surface area (Fu et al., 2008). We linearized this uptake process in the backward integrations by using the\n\narchived wet aerosol surface areas from the forward simulations.", 'summary': 'Formaldehyde and glyoxal in the GEOS-Chem model were both removed by photolysis, as well as dry and wet deposition (Fu et al., 2008). We updated the H...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 402b8851-355f-45fd-8b34-606d56f187ba, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HTAP_v2.2排放清单揭示：亚洲59%SO2来自能源部门（燃煤电厂），32%来自制造业；国际航运贡献全球10%SO2和超10%NOx。,理由是提供关键排放源定量分配数据（含具体百分比），明确了跨境污染传输路径，对区域预测模型构建有核心价值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP_v2.2', 'shipping emission tracks', 'sectoral SO2 allocation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'The Asian region is still characterised by a relatively large contribution of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  from (coal fired) power plants and manufacturing industry. Most of the  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emitted in North America and Europe comes from coal power plants. However, in Europe Fig. 2a shows that  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  is also emitted from the residential and waste disposal sector. Residential (heating and cooking) and waste disposal sources are particularly relevant in Africa. High annual  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emissions are also observed for India, to which the energy sector contributes  $59\\%$  and the energy-intensive manufacturing industry (iron and steel)  $32\\%$ , also both using coking and bituminous coal according to IEA (2013). Finally, international shipping contributes  $\\sim 10\\%$  to the global  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emissions.  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  grid maps clearly show the ship emission tracks connecting Asia and Europe with Africa and America.\n\n# 3.1.2  $\\mathbf{NO}_x$\n\nFigure 2b shows that the major sources of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  are ground transport and power generation and these source contributions show a rather uniform feature for all the considered regions. In Central and South America, major emissions are attributed to the transportation sector and just to a minor extent to the energy sector (e.g. in Mexico  $65\\%$  of the  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions originate from road transport). Those industrialised countries with a large share of natural gas as fuel for heating houses and commercial centres and for industry (such as Canada, the Netherlands, Norway) show relatively high emissions of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ : the share of the residential and industry  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions is around  $30\\%$  of the total  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , whereas in USA this is only  $20\\%$ . International shipping and, in particular, aviation contribute together more than  $10\\%$  of global  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions.\n\n# 3.1.3 CO', 'summary': 'The Asian region is still characterised by a relatively large contribution of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  from (coal fired) power plants and manufacturing indus...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为强调了生物源挥发性有机化合物（BVOC）排放对二次有机气溶胶（SOA）模拟的局限性，提出高氧化分子（HOMs）机制可显著增加 SOA 质量，未来应整合到区域模型。,理由是间接相关研究展望，但无具体深挖线索（如 HOMs 数据），适合作背景参考。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HOMs chemistry', 'SOA-BVOC interaction']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': 'It should be noted that the simulated SOA concentrations in this study have not been compared with direct measurements of organic particulate matter and SOA because of the data limitations. Extensive measurements of organic components have been conducted in megacities and major clusters in China by aerosol mass spectrometers (AMS), which provides details about various organic aerosols (Hu et al. 2016; Yang et al., 2016). And these data can be used as model validation for future local scale SOA modeling studies which can promote the understanding of SOA formation. Besides, a great deal of additional research is needed to further address the remaining questions. For example, to better quantify the separate and synergistic effects of anthropogenic and VOC emissions based on sensitivity testing, it is necessary to investigate the spatial distribution of ozone changes by comparing NOx and VOC emissions. Both chamber studies and field measurements have shown that HOMs (highly oxygenated molecules) can substantially increase the SOA mass because of their low volatility (Ehn et al. 2014). This mechanism has already been incorporated into box models (Öström et al. 2017) with detailed chemistry, and it would be interesting to observe the impact of this mechanism on SOA formation from BVOCs at the regional scale.\n\n# Author contributions\n\nThe manuscript was written through contributions of all authors. All authors have given approval to the final version of the manuscript.\n\n# Acknowledgements\n\nThis work was funded by the National Key Research and Development Program of China (No.2018YFC0214002), the Basic Applied Research Project of Science and Technology Plan of Sichuan Province (No.2018JY0011), the Key Project of Science and Technology Plan of Sichuan Province (No.2018SZDZX0023) and the Scientific Research Foundation of Chengdu University of Information Technology', 'summary': 'It should be noted that the simulated SOA concentrations in this study have not been compared with direct measurements of organic particulate matter a...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 98c00e49-daff-4597-ad5d-10840bc8c70b, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图表显示：在NOx高估区域同时优化NMVOC排放时，HCHO生成过程加速补偿现有浓度（对应图中RMSE变化）；O3浓度与排放呈敏感区特性正/负相关。,理由是图表直观展示排放-O3敏感性的区域差异和交叉影响机制（含数据趋势图），提供可深挖实验名（EMDA/EMS3）和Paper ID（Souri 2020）,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['O3-NOx-VOC sensitivity', 'emission inversion optimization', 'RMSE compensation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': "![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/083dfa8a852a012dbc66ceb8b7d11f6af1e6716fa2b3293fa4d1ed28ef29c8c8.jpg)\n\n$\\mathrm{O}_3$  concentration and  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  (VOC) emissions are positively correlated in the  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  (VOC)-limited region and negatively correlated in the VOC  $(\\mathrm{NO}_x)$ -limited region (Tang et al., 2011). Therefore, the uncertainty in  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions can affect the model's diagnosis of  $\\mathrm{O}_3\\text{-NO}_x$ -VOC sensitivity, thereby introducing substantial model errors in the HCHO yield from VOC oxidation. In the base inversion experiment (EMDA), we simultaneously assimilated  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  and HCHO observations to optimize  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and NMVOC emissions. To evaluate the impact of optimized  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ -VOC chemistry, EMS3 disregarded the uncertainty of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and focused on optimizing NMVOC emissions. Compared to the EMDA, in areas where  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  is significantly overestimated, NMVOC emissions in the EMS3 have correspondingly decreased (Figure 8b). This might be due to under high- $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  conditions, HCHO production occurs promptly, thereby compensating for the substantial amount of HCHO already present in the atmosphere by reducing emissions (Chan Miller et al., 2017). Figure S108 shows comparisons of concentrations and RMSE between the simulations using posterior emissions from EMS3 and EMDA experiments. Compared to VEP, CEP3-CEP2 showed a larger RMSE, highlighting the necessity for simultaneous optimization of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions when evaluating the impact of NMVOC emission optimization on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ . Additionally, CEP2 using prior  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions exhibited lower  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  levels over parts of NCP and YRD, as well as some urban areas (Figure 8c), but with larger biases and", 'summary': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/083dfa8a852a012dbc66ceb8b7d11f6af1e6716fa2b3293fa4d1ed28...'}, 来自论文ID: constraint_of_non-methane_volatile_organic_compoun, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 279956cd-bc57-47a1-9d7b-a08b93a10537, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为VOCs（如工业源）是冬季PM2.5二次有机气溶胶（SOA）关键前体，贡献超30%有机质量。,理由是聚焦污染机制，解释霾季形成原理，但未提供2018年北京具体数据或图表。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Secondary organic aerosol', 'VOCs precursors']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds', 'text': 'Urban areas in China always suffer from serious haze problems due to high fine particle  $\\mathrm{(PM_{2.5})}$  concentration during wintertime (Zhang and Cao, 2015; Yin et al., 2017; Song et al., 2017). Organic matter (OM) is one of the most important chemical components of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  during winter haze episodes. During the long-lasting haze period in 2013, OM accounted for  $30.5 - 48.0\\%$  of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  masses and secondary organic-rich sources contributed  $12.2 - 25.8\\%$  to  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  at four megacities (Huang et al., 2014). As important precursor gases of secondary organic aerosol (SOA), high concentrations of volatile organic compounds (VOCs) were also observed in haze episodes (Zhang et al., 2014; Wu et al., 2016; Liu et al., 2017; Han et al., 2017). SOA is mainly formed by atmospheric oxidation and condensation of low-volatility VOCs from both anthropogenic and biogenic sources (Hallquist et al., 2016; Chen et al., 2017). The urban ambient VOCs are from anthropogenic activities such as oil and natural gas operations (Gilman et al., 2013; Zheng et al., 2018), fossil fuel combustion (Rodolfo Sosa et al., 2009; Liu et al., 2017), solvent use (Yuan et al., 2010), and chemical manufacturing (Mo et al.,\n\n2017; Zheng et al., 2019), etc. During winter haze periods, which VOC source plays a more important role in the formation of SOA deserves a clear illustration.', 'summary': 'Urban areas in China always suffer from serious haze problems due to high fine particle  $\\mathrm{(PM_{2.5})}$  concentration during wintertime (Zhang...'}, 来自论文ID: source_apportionment_of_volatile_organic_compounds, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 70f022d0-cc8e-4537-9622-fd985cd9e4d2, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'quantifying IVOC emissions and oxidation kinetics for SOA formation'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 2, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为印度排放清单（ANL-India vs REAS2）在SO2、BC、OC排放估算存在显著差异（8%-28%），主要源于发电厂空间分配和排放因子选择差异。,理由是焦点为印度排放清单技术细节，与中国BVOC-臭氧关联度低且无交叉验证价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'MIX_ a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission invento', 'text': 'For India, MIX used ANL-India for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ , BC, and OC emissions and REAS2 for other species. Here we compare ANL-India and REAS2 for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ , BC, and OC emissions, to evaluate the impact of using ANL-India. Both ANL-India and REAS2 used energy consumption data from IEA, and hence the differences are mainly from emission factors. Reasonable agreements are found in total emissions over India (differing by  $8 - 28\\%$ ), while discrepancies are large at the sector level. REAS2 estimates  $50\\%$  higher  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  estimates for all sectors except power plants, most likely from different assumptions about the sulfur content of fuels. For BC and OC, the ratio between REAS2 and ANL-India varies from 0.4 to 11.8 at the sector level, indicating large differences in emission factor selections. ANL-India used emission factors from a global database (Bond et al., 2004) with updates of a few recent measurements (Lu et al., 2011), while REAS2 used a local database developed many years ago (Reddy and Venkataraman, 2002a, b). It should be noted that local emission measurements in India are still too few to support accurate emission estimates. More measurements should be conducted in the future to remedy this situation.\n\nWhen implementing REAS2 to MIX over India, power plant emissions were redistributed using spatial distributions derived from ANL-India at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  resolution (see Sect. 2.3). We believe that it will improve the accuracy because power plant emissions in ANL-India were estimated by each unit and allocated manually by Google Earth. A total of 68 power plants are identified in REAS2, compared to 145 plants in ANL-India. The two inventories generally agree well for the grids in which both inventories allocate power plant emissions. Lu and Streets (2012) found that the magnitudes and locations of power plant  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions (from ANL-India) are matched well with satellite-based ob', 'summary': 'For India, MIX used ANL-India for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ , BC, and OC emissions and REAS2 for other species. Here we compare ANL-India and REAS2 for  $\\math...'}, 来自论文ID: mix__a_mosaic_asian_anthropogenic_emission_invento, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Long-term observations of oxygenated volatile orga', 'text': '© 2020 Elsevier Ltd. All rights reserved.\n\n# Credit author contribution statement\n\nShi-Yong Xia: Methodology, Writing - original draft. Chuan Wang: Data curation, Formal analysis. Bo Zhu: Conceptualization, Data curation. Xue Chen: Data curation. Ning Feng: Formal analysis. Guang-He Yu: Conceptualization, Supervision. Xiao-Feng Huang: Methodology, Conceptualization, Writing - review & editing.\n\n# 1. Introduction\n\nVolatile organic compounds (VOCs) are important precursors that can undergo atmospheric photochemical reactions with nitrogen oxides  $\\left(\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}\\right)$  under ultraviolet radiation to produce secondary products such as ozone  $\\left(\\mathrm{O}_{3}\\right)$  and peroxyacetyl nitrate (PAN) and form photochemical smog (Derwent et al., 2003; Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016). Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are a class of VOCs with oxygen-containing functional groups, mainly composed of aldehydes, ketones, and alcohols. The concentrations of atmospheric OVOCs vary greatly in different regions. Studies in clean marine areas showed that although phytoplankton in the marine may release OVOCs, such as methanol, acetaldehyde and acetone, their ambient air mixing ratios were usually only a few\n\nto a few hundred pptv (Galbally et al., 2007; Colomb et al., 2009; Wohl et al., 2020), while the concentrations of OVOCs in polluted areas can be as high as dozens of ppbv (Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016; Sheng et al., 2018; Zhou et al., 2019; Maji et al., 2020). The variation in OVOC concentrations is due to the wide variety and complexity of sources of OVOCs. OVOCs can be directly emitted by anthropogenic sources, e.g., solvent volatilization, vehicle emissions (Legreid et al., 2007; Ou et al., 2015), and biogenic sources (Jacob et al., 2002; Mellouki et al., 2015). In addition, OVOCs can also be formed as secondary products by photochemical oxidation of nonmethane hydrocarbons (NMHCs) from anthropogenic and biogenic sources (Yuan et al., 2012; Liu et al., 2015).', 'summary': '© 2020 Elsevier Ltd. All rights reserved.\n\n# Credit author contribution statement\n\nShi-Yong Xia: Methodology, Writing - original draft. Chuan Wang: Da...'}, 来自论文ID: long-term_observations_of_oxygenated_volatile_orga, 关键词: None

                这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': '# Keywords\n\nNMVOC emissions,  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  pollution, Emission inversion, HCHO column retrievals, Data assimilation\n\n# 1 Introduction\n\nSince the Chinese government implemented the Air Pollution Prevention and Control Action Plan in 2013, there has been a notable reduction in  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions (Zheng et al., 2018). However, despite these advancements, the issue of  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  pollution persists and, in certain cases, has shown signs of worsening (Ren et al., 2022). The increase in  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  concentration can be attributed not only to adverse meteorological conditions but also predominantly to unbalanced joint control of non-methane volatile organic compounds (NMVOCs) and nitrogen oxides ( $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ ) (Li et al., 2020). NMVOCs are vital precursors of  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  and have a substantial impact on the atmospheric oxidation capacity, thereby altering the lifetimes of other pollutants. Accurately quantifying NMVOC emissions holds significant importance in investigating their impact on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  chemistry and in formulating emission reduction policies.', 'summary': '# Keywords\n\nNMVOC emissions,  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  pollution, Emission inversion, HCHO column retrievals, Data assimilation\n\n# 1 Introduction\n\nSince the Ch...'}, 来自论文ID: constraint_of_non-methane_volatile_organic_compoun, 关键词: None

--------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: af551209-b5d4-44b5-b216-9b0e1c8f412a, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为GEOS-Chem模型更新化学机制，列举甲醛和glyoxal的NMVOC前体（如ethane、isoprene），其中isoprene是主要源；模型源自Master Chemical Mechanism (MCM)。,理由是证据描述化学模型机制（如MCM适应），提供NMVOC前体分类，但仅作为技术背景，无深挖线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Master Chemical Mechanism (MCM)', 'NMVOC precursors', 'Formaldehyde sources']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'We updated the dicarbonyl chemical mechanism in GEOS-Chem developed by Fu et al. (2008), which in turn was originally adapted from the Master Chemical Mechanism (MCM) version 3.1 (Jenkin et al., 1997; Saunders et al., 2003). Table S1 in the Supplement lists the yields of formaldehyde and glyoxal from the OH oxidation of NMVOC precursors in our updated chemical mechanism. The lumped NMVOC precursors of formaldehyde in our mechanism included ethane, propane,  $\\geq \\mathrm{C_4}$  alkanes, ethene,  $\\geq \\mathrm{C}_3$  alkenes, benzene, toluene, xylenes, isoprene, monoterpenes, acetone, hydroxyacetone, methylgloxal, glycolaldehyde, acetaldehyde, 2-methyl-3-bute-nol, methyl ethyl ketone, methanol, and ethanol (lumped into  $\\geq \\mathrm{C}_4$  alkanes). The lumped NMVOC precursors of glyoxal in our mechanism included ethene, ethyne, benzene, toluene, xylenes, isoprene, monoterpenes, glycolaldehyde, and 2-methyl-3-bute-2-nol (MBO). Hereinafter we focused our discussion on these NMVOC precursors only, as their emissions may be constrained by formaldehyde and glyoxal observations.\n\nThe OH oxidation of isoprene is a major source of both formaldehyde and glyoxal over China (Fu et al., 2007, 2008; Myriokefalitakis et al., 2008). We replaced the isoprene photochemical scheme with that used in GEOS-Chem v10.1, which included updates from Paulot et al. (2009a, b) and', 'summary': 'We updated the dicarbonyl chemical mechanism in GEOS-Chem developed by Fu et al. (2008), which in turn was originally adapted from the Master Chemical...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

Figure 2 shows the top-down monthly Chinese NMVOC emission estimates from the four inversion experiments and compares them against the a priori emission estimates. Figure S6 compares the a priori and a posteriori emission estimates for anthropogenic glyoxal precursors.\n\nFigures 3 to 6 show the a posteriori simulated monthly mean formaldehyde and glyoxal VCDs from the GOME-\n\n2A formaldehyde and glyoxal inversion experiment (IE-1). The optimization was especially effective in optimizing the spatial pattern of the a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs, such that the a posteriori  $R$  against the GOME-2A formaldehyde VCDs exceeded 0.85 over eastern China for all 12 months (Table S4). 证据节点ID: 7b7e492b-745c-4f4d-8f37-6b2fe78ccb3c, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'low-NOx pathways for glyoxal formation from aromatics oxidation'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为卫星观测甲醛和乙二醛柱可区分生物源与人为源NMVOC排放，Stavrakou等(2009a)发现东亚人为NMVOC排放比EDGAR和RETRO清单高2-3倍,理由是提供关键方法学依据（双化合物反演技术），但缺少可直接深挖的可视化数据或具体计算模块,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Two-compound inversion', 'SCIAMACHY satellite', 'Anthropogenic NMVOC differentiation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'More recently, satellite measurements of tropospheric glyoxal columns emerged as an additional constraint on NMVOC emissions (Stavrakou et al., 2009a). Like formaldehyde, glyoxal is produced during the oxidation of many NMVOCs (including most importantly isoprene), as well as emitted directly from biomass burning (Fu et al., 2008; Myriokefalitakis et al., 2008). In particular, glyoxal is produced at high yields at the initial ring-cleaving stage during the oxidation of aromatics (Volkamer, 2001; Nishino et al., 2010), which are mainly anthropogenic. In contrast, the production of formaldehyde from the oxidation of aromatics is further downstream and thus spatially diffuse (Volkamer, 2001). As such, simultaneous analyses of formaldehyde and glyoxal observations can help differentiate between biogenic and anthropogenic NMVOC emissions. Stavrakou et al. (2009a) pioneered a two-compound inversion using tropospheric glyoxal and formaldehyde column observations from the Scanning Imaging Absorption spectrometer for Atmospheric CHartographY (SCIAMACHY) satellite instrument to constrain the global sources of glyoxal. They estimated that the anthropogenic NMVOC fluxes over East Asia for the year 2005 were a factor of 2 to 3 larger than the bottom-up estimates of the Emission Database for Global Atmospheric Research (EDGAR, v3.3) inventory (Olivier et al., 2001, 2002) and the REanalysis TROpospheric (RETRO) emission inventory (Schultz et al., 2007). In addition, they inferred a large missing source of glyoxal over the global continents, which they attributed to production from an unknown biogenic precursor.', 'summary': 'More recently, satellite measurements of tropospheric glyoxal columns emerged as an additional constraint on NMVOC emissions (Stavrakou et al., 2009a)...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 1112e20e-8ef4-4ab3-ba8e-82c84ff1fdbe, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为OVOCs（如甲醛和乙醛）通过光解产生OH和HO2自由基，影响大气氧化能力，并参与光化学反应生成臭氧（O3）和二次有机气溶胶（SOA）；这些化合物具有高水溶性，对人体健康有害，可导致眼睛、皮肤和呼吸道刺激；在中国研究中，Zhang 等（2012）发现羰基化合物对O3形成潜力（166.1 μg/m³）是BTEX（65.4 μg/m³）的约2.5倍。,理由是证据直接链接OVOCs与臭氧生成、环境健康影响，提供多项具体研究（如Zhang 2012、Zhou 2019），包含Paper ID和定量数据，具备深挖线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Low-carbon OVOCs', 'Photochemical reactions', 'O3 formation potential', 'Health risks']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Long-term observations of oxygenated volatile orga', 'text': "Previous studies have proven that some low-carbon OVOCs (formaldehyde and acetaldehyde) can generate OH radicals and hydroperoxyl radicals  $\\mathrm{(HO_2)}$  through photolysis to affect the oxidizing capacity of the atmosphere (Volkamer et al., 2010; Shao et al., 2011; Xue et al., 2016). OVOCs can also participate in photochemical reactions and contribute to the generation of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  and SOA (Louie et al., 2013; Ehn et al., 2014). In addition, as most OVOCs are highly water soluble, they can be absorbed into the human body, irritating the eyes, skin and respiratory tract, thus harming human health. OVOCs such as formaldehyde, acetaldehyde, acetone and acrolein have been shown to pose serious health risks (WHO, 2000, Delfino et al., 2003; Bashkin, 2009; Du et al., 2014). Given the important role of OVOCs in photochemical reactions and the complexity of their sources, OVOCs have been the subject of extensive research recently (Sahu et al., 2017; Maji et al., 2020), especially in China, where air pollution is severe (Zhang et al., 2012, 2015; Zhou et al., 2019; Zhu et al., 2019). Zhang et al. (2012) studied the pollution characteristics of BTEX (benzene, toluene, ethylbenzene, m,p-xylene and o-xylene) and carbonyl compounds during summer in Beijing and found that the  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  formation potential of carbonyl compounds  $(166.1~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3)$  was approximately 2.5 times that of BTEX  $(65.4~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3)$ . Zhou et al. (2019) used proton transfer reaction mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) to measure VOCs in Xi'an and used the positive matrix factorization (PMF) model to analyze over 30 types of VOCs and identify eight primary sources and found that local emissions, such as industrial processes, solvent usage, residential biofuel use and vehicular exhaust, contributed about  $70\\%$  of the VOCs measured. Zhu et al. (2019) used PTR-MS to monitor OVOCs during different seasons and applied photochemical age parameter analysis to evaluate the sources of OVOCs in Shenzhen. They", 'summary': 'Previous studies have proven that some low-carbon OVOCs (formaldehyde and acetaldehyde) can generate OH radicals and hydroperoxyl radicals  $\\mathrm{(...'}, 来自论文ID: long-term_observations_of_oxygenated_volatile_orga, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 26c594af-1df3-4a97-b68b-fce9e8edcff6, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'quantifying IVOC emissions and oxidation kinetics for SOA formation'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为BVOC对夏季SOA贡献率达70%（全国平均），且人为减排可间接调控BSOA（局部达50%），异戊二烯SOA比单萜烯SOA更易减排。,理由是含具体量化数据（70%/50%/40%）和政策意义，并引用关键文献Pye等(2019)。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['ASOA-BSOA interaction', 'SOA volatility', 'Anthropogenic control']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': 'BVOC emissions make a large contribution to summertime SOA (national average of  $70\\%$ ). Locally, the effects of biogenic emissions tend to be greater in the southern region than in the northern region, as the megacities are surrounded by regions of high biogenic emissions. In summer, the impact of biogenic emissions on SOA is much greater than that of anthropogenic emissions. However, the impact of anthropogenic emissions in individual regions may be rather high (up to  $50\\%$ ), indicating that even BSOA can be significantly controlled by limiting anthropogenic emissions. When anthropogenic emissions are not considered, the reduction in BSOA depends on the chemical precursor. In particular, isoprene SOA is more easily reduced than monoterpene SOA due to their different volatilities. ASOA are also affected by biogenic emissions (the absorption of organic matter by SOA), and the relative impact may be as high as  $40\\%$ . In order to accurately simulate SOA, it is necessary to precisely simulate both ASOA and BSOA (Pye et al. 2019).', 'summary': 'BVOC emissions make a large contribution to summertime SOA (national average of  $70\\%$ ). Locally, the effects of biogenic emissions tend to be great...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图15显示中国热带/温带省份NH3农业排放空间异质性，大型电厂SO2/CO2排放比随规模增大而降低（归因于脱硫设备覆盖率提升），该趋势未被EDGAR等全局恒定比模型捕捉。,理由是包含关键图表展示区域排放差异（含热带/温带分区）和电厂规模与排放比的反向关系，提供检验模型精度的具体线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['SO2/CO2 emission ratio', 'FGD efficiency', 'plant-size dependency']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'MIX_ a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission invento', 'text': 'Figure 14b further compares the emission ratios of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2 / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  in the three inventories for individual power plants over Shanxi. Large deviations of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2 / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  ratios in MIX are driven by variations of fuel quality, combustion efficiency, and FGD removal efficiency in each plant, which are precisely represented in CPED. In CPED, there is a tendency towards a decrease in  $\\mathrm{SO}_2 / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  emission ratio with increase of plant size (corresponding to higher  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$  emissions), in accordance with the legislation that large units were required to be equipped with FGD during 2005-2010 (Zhang et al., 2012). Smaller deviations in  $\\mathrm{SO}_2 / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  emission ratios are found in REAS2, because power plant  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emissions in REAS2 were estimated by using the average FGD penetration rates at provincial level (Kurokawa et al., 2013). The constant ratios for all power plants in EDGAR indicate that (a) the emission factors are not varied within China and (b) the spatial distribution treats all power plants equal, which does not take the variations among power plants into consideration.\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/fa4e3fc1-fa8a-45bf-892c-02fa70317f3a/18423b6e726c5f71aa4027de303aa9e47dd6345a165e19dc4e13258952680642.jpg)  \nFigure 15. Comparisons of spatial distribution of  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$  agricultural emissions between MEIC v1.0 and PKU-NH<sub>3</sub>. Provinces that included in tropical zones are Fujian, Guangdong, Hainan, Guangxi, Guizhou, Hubei, Hunan, Yunnan, Sichuan, Jiangxi, Anhui, Zhejiang, and Jiangsu. Other provinces are treated as temperate ones.\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/fa4e3fc1-fa8a-45bf-892c-02fa70317f3a/3501de8a2f26846894d09b62e98087db22adca37c526172806961a2695e386cd.jpg)\n\nTable 8.  ${\\mathrm{{NH}}}_{3}$  agriculture emission estimates for China.', 'summary': 'Figure 14b further compares the emission ratios of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2 / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  in the three inventories for individual power plants over Shanxi....'}, 来自论文ID: mix__a_mosaic_asian_anthropogenic_emission_invento, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 074210bc-9b9b-47ba-aea5-a47a6f13a9fe, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该研究更新了GEOS-Chem模型中芳香烃和烯烃化学机制，结果显示氮氧化物增加22%会显著降低非甲烷有机气体寿命，且乙二醛等产物浓度大幅升高。,理由是提供具体化学机制更新及定量影响（如22%的NO3增加），但未明确后续研究方向或数据线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['aromatic oxidation updates', 'ethene chemistry', 'NMOG lifetime']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'An improved representation of fire non-methane org', 'text': 'GEOS-Chem includes  $\\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-} - \\mathrm{NO}_3^- - \\mathrm{NH}_4^+$  thermodynamics (Fountoukis and Nenes, 2007) coupled to an  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ -VOC- $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -oxidant chemical mechanism (Chan Miller et al., 2017; Mao et al., 2013; Travis et al., 2016) with integrated Cl–Br–I chemistry (Sherwen et al., 2016). We add aromatic oxidation updates (with benzene, toluene, and xylene (C8 aromatic compounds including  $o-$ ,  $m-$ ,  $p$ -xylenes and ethylbenzene) emissions) as per Bates et al. (2021) and ethene and ethyne chemistry updates as per Kwon et al. (2021); both were developed in GEOS-Chem but not yet implemented in the standard model. These aromatic and ethene and ethyne chemistry updates modify oxidant levels, particularly  $\\mathrm{NO}_3$ , which overall decreases NMOG lifetimes. Bates et al. (2021) estimate an annual global mean increase of  $+22\\%$  for  $\\mathrm{NO}_3$ . In general, species not directly involved in the new chemistry are modestly impacted by these changes, while, for example, species like glyoxal and glycolaldehyde, which are important products of the ethene and ethyne chemistry, undergo large increases.\n\nBaseline fire emissions are from GFED4s (van der Werf et al., 2017) and are specified on a daily timescale. Additional details on fire NMOG emissions are provided in Sect. 3. A sensitivity analysis, described in Sect. 4, uses FINNv1.5. Anthropogenic emissions (including fossil and biofuel sources) follow the year-specific Community Emissions Data System\n\n(CEDS) global inventory (Hoesly et al., 2018).Trash burning emissions are from Wiedinmyer et al. (2014). Aircraft emissions are from the Aviation Emissions Inventory Code (AEIC) inventory (Stettler et al., 2011; Simone et al., 2013). Biogenic emissions are calculated online from the Model of Emissions of Gases and Aerosols from Nature version 2.1 (MEGANv2.1) emissions framework (Guenther et al., 2012).', 'summary': 'GEOS-Chem includes  $\\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-} - \\mathrm{NO}_3^- - \\mathrm{NH}_4^+$  thermodynamics (Fountoukis and Nenes, 2007) coupled to an  $\\mathrm{O}_3...'}, 来自论文ID: an_improved_representation_of_fire_non-methane_org, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 24b1f42d-9a68-4c59-9e06-e48c2fe18635, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究更新了苯/甲苯/二甲苯等芳香烃氧化的乙二醛产率（33.3%/26.2%/21.0%），对比了不同化学机制版本（MCMv3.2-v3.3.1）下的甲醛生成差异。,理由是包含具体化合物产率数据和多版本模型比较，提供可拓展的Paper ID（Chan Miller 2016, Bloss 2005）,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['glyoxal molar yields', 'aromatics oxidation pathways', 'MCM model comparison']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'Mao et al. (2013). In this updated scheme, oxidation of isoprene by OH under high-  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  conditions produces formaldehyde and glyoxal at yields of 0.436 molecules per carbon and 0.0255 molecules per carbon, respectively (Table S1), mainly via the  $\\mathrm{RO}_2 + \\mathrm{NO}$  pathways. Under low-  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  conditions, oxidation of isoprene by OH produces formaldehyde and glyoxal at yields of 0.38 molecules per carbon and 0.073 molecules per carbon, respectively (Table S1), via both  $\\mathrm{RO}_2 + \\mathrm{HO}_2$  and  $\\mathrm{RO}_2$  isomerization reactions. Li et al. (2016) implemented this same isoprene photochemical scheme in a box model and compared the productions of formaldehyde and glyoxal from isoprene oxidation with those in the MCM version 3.3.1 (Jenkin et al., 2015). They showed that the production pathways and yields of formaldehyde and glyoxal were similar in the two schemes under the high-  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  conditions typical of eastern China.\n\nWe updated the molar yields of glyoxal from the OH oxidations of benzene  $(33.3\\%)$ , toluene  $(26.2\\%)$ , and xylenes  $(21.0\\%)$  following the latest literature (Arey et al., 2009; Nishino et al., 2010). These new molar yields were higher than those used in Fu et al. (2008) (which were based on averaged yields in the literature:  $25.2\\%$  for benzene,  $16.2\\%$  for toluene, and  $15.6\\%$  for xylenes) but still lower than those used by Chan Miller et al. (2016) ( $75\\%$  for benzene,  $70\\%$  for toluene, and  $36\\%$  for xylenes), which were taken from the aromatic chemical scheme in MCM version 3.2 (Jenkin et al., 2003; Bloss et al., 2005). In MCM version 3.2, more than half of the glyoxal from aromatics oxidation was produced during second- and later-generation photochemistry, but such productions are with limited experimental support and uncertain (Bloss et al., 2005).', 'summary': 'Mao et al. (2013).                         这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'MIX_ a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission invento', 'text': 'Ratios of different species were widely used to inform emission characteristics. For example,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2 / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  ratio was used as an indicator of coal combustion and emission control levels (Li et al., 2007), and ratios of  $\\mathrm{CO} / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  were used to inform combustion efficiency (Wang et al., 2010). Figure 7 compares regional emission ratios of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2 / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  and  $\\mathrm{CO} / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  estimated by the MIX inventory. Emission ratios of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2 / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  are lowest in Other East Asia among different regions, which could be attributed to small share of coal use\n\nand high penetration of emission control facilities, while high emissions ratios of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2 / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  were found in Russia Asia and Central Asia due to high fraction of coal use and less emission controls. Other East Asia also has the lowest emission ratios of  $\\mathrm{CO} / \\mathrm{CO}_2$  among different regions, owing to a high contribution from industrial and transportation emissions. In contrast, high emissions from small residential combustions led to low combustion efficiencies and high emission ratio over India and Southeast Asia.\n\n# 3.2 Changes of Asian emissions from 2006 to 2010', 'summary': 'Ratios of different species were widely used to inform emission characteristics.                         这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/ab2556fbc2bc2be5f8abb8730ad27cc429a6d9eab0353b6db9ea171c57aa2cf5.jpg)  \nFigure 7 shows the differences in the six principal pathways responsible for  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss and formation, when comparing simulations employing prior and posterior emissions. Our analysis was focused on the time frame from 12:00 to 18:00 according to China standard time (CST). The differences were computed by subtracting the simulation with posterior emissions from those with prior emissions.                         具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为通过增量反应速率（IRRs）量化显示：NMVOC排放变化与MDA8-O3生成率呈正相关关系，排放优化后模型偏差从22.6%降至9.2%，证明前体调控有效性。,理由是图片应包含关键时序比对图（O3浓度vs前体排放量），且提供量化模型优化方案（VEP实验），可作为污染控制策略的直接依据。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Incremental Reactivity Ratios', 'MDA8 O3', 'chemical regimes classification']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': 'As crucial  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  precursors, the abundance of NMVOCs plays a significant role in modulating  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production. Here we employed the IRRs to elucidate changes related to  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production and loss at the surface, stemming from constrained  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and NMVOC emissions. Figure 6 illustrates comparisons of the simulated maximum daily 8-hour average (MDA8) surface  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  levels and net reaction rates before and after the inversion. The CEP1 exhibited an overestimation of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  levels, with a BIAS of  $22.6\\%$  compared to observed  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations. This overestimation corresponded to the high net chemical rates of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  in these areas (Figure S75). After inversion,  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  net rates mitigated in most regions. Consequently, the VEP experiment yielded results that closely aligned with observations, with a BIAS of  $9.2\\%$ . Referring to Figure 6e and 6f, differences in production rates of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  closely track the changes in the NMVOC emissions (Figure 2). The discrepancies in specific regions may be attributed to the complex nonlinear relationships associated with  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  and its precursors, which depend on prevailing chemical regimes and regional transport. Additionally, changes in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production predominantly drive the overall decrease in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations, outweighing changes in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss.\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/9e3f9b26f1f28cfa457d1c33cfae53df971cf46c6a0bb4668bff9d220a968abd.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/a9d39ed58a48277b22f673a1ce0c96db4a93e273b1c3371cafff736013d9a346.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/1697da27dfb3acb2e53865711cd8778cbf960bba4b18c361438db491301585ea.jpg)', 'summary': 'As crucial  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  precursors, the abundance of NMVOCs plays a significant role in modulating  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production. The time series of these air pollutants during the observational period are shown in Fig. S2.\n\n# 3. Results and discussion\n\n# 3.1. General characteristics\n\n# 3.1.1. Levels, compositions, and diurnal variations of measured VOCs\n\nTable S1 summarizes the statistics of VOC concentrations. These 57 PAMS VOCs can be grouped into alkanes, alkenes, acetylene, and aromatics and their time series are shown in Fig. 2a. The total concentrations of VOCs were  $53.1 \\pm 27.6$  ppbv. The average concentrations of alkanes, alkenes, acetylene, and aromatics were  $33.6 \\pm 17.3$ ,  $6.55 \\pm 4.15$ ,  $1.71 \\pm 0.90$ , and  $11.4 \\pm 6.79$  ppbv, respectively. They accounted for  $63.7\\%$ ,  $12.0\\%$ ,  $2.96\\%$ , and  $21.3\\%$  of total detected VOCs, respectively (Fig. 2b). 证据节点ID: 85fe5b7d-4901-49f4-b52e-54313c8b46b6, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为NMVOC减排减少HO2/RO2自由基，抑制臭氧生成，但增强NO2+OH反应导致东中部臭氧损失；NMHC+O3反应在森林区仍是重要HOx来源。,理由是清晰描述自由基调控机制，但缺乏可视化数据或新颖方法,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HO2/RO2 modulation', 'radical-ozone interplay', 'NMHC oxidation pathways']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': 'atmospheric hydroxyl (OH) radicals. Due to the substantial decrease in NMVOC emissions, there was a reduction in the production of hydroperoxy radicals  $\\mathrm{(HO_2)}$  and organic peroxy radicals  $\\mathrm{(RO_2)}$  (Figure S86). Consequently, this reduction in  $\\mathrm{HO_2 / RO_2}$  levels, coupled with their reaction with NO, resulted in diminished  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production (Figures 7a and 7b). A strong correlation was observed between changes in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production via the  $\\mathrm{RO_2 + NO}$  reaction and NMVOC emissions (Figure 2), consistent with the findings of Souri et al. (2020). Typically, in NMVOC-rich environments, a decrease in NMVOC emissions boosts OH concentrations. Consequently, we noted an enhancement in the  $\\mathrm{NO_2 + OH}$  reaction in the eastern and central regions of China. In response to heightened  $\\mathrm{HO_x}$  concentrations over these areas, an increased  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss through the  $\\mathrm{O_3 + HO_x}$  pathway was observed. Furthermore, we detected a substantial decrease in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss through reactions with NMVOCs, especially in the southern China, where substantial isoprene emissions are prevalent. This reduction was primarily attributable to the decrease in NMVOC and  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  levels. While the NMVOC  $+\\mathrm{O_3}$  reaction proceeds at a substantially slower rate NMVOC  $+\\mathrm{OH}$ , this specific chemical pathway remains significant in oxidizing NMVOC and forming  $\\mathrm{HO_x}$  in forests areas (Paulson and Orlando, 1996). The difference in  $\\mathrm{O1D + H_2O}$  is primarily driven by the decrease of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  photolysis. Although the rate of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  loss decreases in some chemical pathways, overall, the rate of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  production dominates the changes in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentration.', 'summary': 'atmospheric hydroxyl (OH) radicals. Due to the substantial decrease in NMVOC emissions, there was a reduction in the production of hydroperoxy radical...'}, 来自论文ID: constraint_of_non-methane_volatile_organic_compoun, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 151f999f-e16f-4588-aaba-b298b84f1072, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'radical cycling mechanisms between OVOCs and HO_x under low-NOx'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图表显示NMVOC排放减少与地表O3浓度降低直接相关，同时NOx排放高估（见图S34）会通过滴定效应抑制O3累积，影响污染源解析和政策制定。,理由是证据核心揭示了O3污染形成的关键机制（VOCs-NOx敏感性），包含可深挖的实验数据源（Wang et al., 2019/2021c），且图片应展示关键化学梯度变化趋势。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['VOC-limited mechanisms', 'O3 titration effect', 'NMVOC source apportionment']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun', 'text': 'RMSEs (Figure 8d). The reduction in NMVOC emissions contributed to a partial decrease in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentration. More significantly, these areas typically align with VOC-limited mechanisms (Wang et al., 2019; Wang et al., 2021c). Therefore, the overestimation of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions (Figure S34) excessively inhibits  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  accumulation due to the titration effect, thereby disrupting the evaluation of NMVOC contributions to  $\\mathrm{O_3}$ . This substantial disparity also seriously affects  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  source apportionment, precursor-sensitive area delineation, and emissions reduction policy formulation.\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/9b629040ab6fa1eedddff2e3880b09ab1e5368d776903ded4aba1005e210bfae.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/a728896b3fbfdeae1ba79535af706d16d2b4b13b69274aa102812eb5a8391180.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/766af9b3b4579eab5f621bb58893f473471e9c5f52db8772efe2c21bc6ee821a.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/fd32771ed1155a632f5720b079945a9d75ef24c22e2eff27a07398c02c3e611e.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/f07588e8ffe0149d6834257c9f1e6945b2958be58a74d59fd12bd76c1eb85fb5.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/1df10365-23be-43b9-98bf-cf076d79d186/a07053bb6ac2cb593b57335f63a6b2e08fa7a116d7ea25488f48cfb69efc8434.jpg)', 'summary': 'RMSEs (Figure 8d). The reduction in NMVOC emissions contributed to a partial decrease in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentration. Figures 2 and S6 show that this increase in the a posteriori glyoxal VCDs in IE-4 was achieved by substantially increasing the emission estimates of anthropogenic glyoxal precursors for all months. In summer, the emissions of biogenic isoprene (precursor to both glyoxal and formaldehyde) also increased. As a result, the a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs in IE-4 increased in summer but remained similar to the a priori simulation for the other months (Figs. 7 and 8, Table S7).\n\nFigure S4 also compared the model a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs in 2007 against the GOME-2 observations, the model a priori formaldehyde VCDs, and the MAX-DOAS measurements (during 2010-2016) at Xianghe at GOME-2 crossing time. Compared to the a priori, our a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs were in better agreement with the seasonal variation in the MAX-DOAS measurements (R values increased from 0.81 for the a priori to 0.95 for IE-1 and 0.93 for IE-3). During the warm months (May to September), the monthly a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs from IE-1 and IE-3 bracketed the interannual variation in monthly formaldehyde VCDs measured by MAX-DOAS. For the rest of the year, both the GOME-2A observations and the a posteriori formaldehyde VCDs were systematically biased low relative to the MAX-DOAS measurements. As discussed before, these biases could not be fully accounted for by the interannual variability in the local formaldehyde VCDs and were thus likely due to sampling or retrieval difference between the MAX-DOAS and the satellite.\n\n# 4.2 Top-down estimates of Chinese NMVOC emissions from inversion experiments', 'summary': 'posteriori glyoxal VCDs from IE-4 were in better agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations for all months (Table S8). (2012) showed that the glyoxal column concentrations observed by SCIAMACHY in August 2007 were more than twice the simulated glyoxal columns using the bottom-up emission inventory developed by Q. Zhang et al. (2009). Over the Pearl River Delta (PRD) area in southern China, the discrepancy was at least a factor of 3. They suggested that the missing glyoxal source over eastern China was anthropogenic, on the basis that the anomalous glyoxal columns observed by SCIAMACHY (relative to the glyoxal columns simulated by their model) were spatially correlated with anthropogenic  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions. They estimated the Chinese anthropogenic aromatics emissions to be  $13.4\\mathrm{Tgyr}^{-1}$ , which was 6 times the  $2.4\\mathrm{Tgyr}^{-1}$  anthropogenic aromatic flux estimated by Q. Zhang et al. (2009). In contrast, Chan Miller et al. (2016) simulated the formaldehyde and glyoxal column concentrations over the PRD in southern China for the years 2006 and 2007 using the same inventory developed by Q. Zhang et al. (2009). They found that their simulated formaldehyde columns were consistent with the Ozone Monitoring Instrument (OMI) formaldehyde observations, while their simulated glyoxal columns were lower than OMI observations by only  $40\\%$ . They attributed the high anthropogenic aromatics emission estimate by Liu et al. (2012) in part to a regional high-bias in the SCIAMACHY data, and in part to the lower glyoxal yields from aromatics oxidation used in Liu et al. (2012).', 'summary': 'Over eastern China, Liu et al. (2012) showed that the glyoxal column concentrations observed by SCIAMACHY in August 2007 were more than twice the simu...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds', 'text': 'For the OFP of different sources (Fig. 6), vehicle emissions had the largest contribution  $(27.8\\%)$ , followed by industrial sources  $(25.4\\%)$ , solvent usage  $(20.9\\%)$ , combustion sources  $(18.9\\%)$ , and gasoline evaporation  $(7.04\\%)$ , respectively. The OFP of vehicle emissions in this study was comparable to a previous study in Wuhan that vehicle exhausts accounted for  $23.4 \\pm 1.3\\%$  of  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  formation (Lyu et al., 2016). However, the contribution of industrial sources to OFP was lower than\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/8c17bcf0-936c-4dbf-83a2-651342f4f378/8a80592fcaf0da6750c7fbbf873b4d7bdb9124e319c52cf4fcf225a2c90cf068.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/8c17bcf0-936c-4dbf-83a2-651342f4f378/80180f6b6e9136bed57e1cb42065c819789ec958f6b035b9cd5768b5d69e27f5.jpg)  \nFig. 7. Percentages  $(\\%)$  of different VOC sources to the total VOC mixing ratio (MR), reactivity  $\\mathrm{(L_{OH})}$ , ozone formation potential (OFP), and secondary organic aerosol potential (SOAP) under different  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentration ranges.\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/8c17bcf0-936c-4dbf-83a2-651342f4f378/8cc0c10aaf5109f3fc1a0cc909dddc2271307f6b86e278b906036497c800ac35.jpg)  \n$\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}(\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3})$\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/8c17bcf0-936c-4dbf-83a2-651342f4f378/3e88b6b250a50fd4336c07f6903c6e6064654bdc0cff3fa0f638a372f254c332.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/8c17bcf0-936c-4dbf-83a2-651342f4f378/5d593253b1bcda36bff8a5f010355660b430d0e3cd5a49b17f4b46189914546b.jpg)', 'summary': 'For the OFP of different sources (Fig. 6), vehicle emissions had the largest contribution  $(27.8\\%)$ , followed by industrial sources  $(25.4\\%)$ , s...'}, 来自论文ID: source_apportionment_of_volatile_organic_compounds, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/ee507cff-688b-41b8-9b9a-13c820585331/5f5f94289697e46f174d107af6a74f1493d04d75a0f6d1e5052f92d5b8df192e.jpg)  \nFig. 9. Spatial distribution of SOA simulations in July 2017 (Base case: anthropogenic emissions + biogenic emissions; NB case: only anthropogenic emissions; NA case: only biogenic emissions).\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/ee507cff-688b-41b8-9b9a-13c820585331/ea1de31261398ddb436580cebd39d3f9ae9f4bb49a2e41b11ab71844dc5d9153.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/ee507cff-688b-41b8-9b9a-13c820585331/aa13d4e69aa402c336ff4f18773730c0dc00fd5c60e7a06707dde75b9103942b.jpg)\n\n![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/ee507cff-688b-41b8-9b9a-13c820585331/7271c1f0a6fb4f03e1a9aebc35ae1ae0298fc9051be34962636548ed0de35a69.jpg)  \nFig. 10. Relative difference between the SOA concentrations averaged in July with and without biogenic emissions  $(\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3})$\n\nSOA yield of the oxidized products of monoterpene and isoprene can be enhanced at high NOx concentrations, favoring the formation of organic nitrate, which is a low-volatility product and is likely to partition into seed particles. When the NOx level is low, isoprene oxidation occurs via the ISOPOOH pathway to form IEPOX-SOA, which favorably forms organic sulfate in acidic environments. This reaction has been incorporated into CMAQ; thus, the inclusion of both anthropogenic and biogenic emissions reflects these products, but including only one of them is unable to account for their reaction.\n\n# 3.5. Discussion of uncertainties in model driving variables', 'summary': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/ee507cff-688b-41b8-9b9a-13c820585331/5f5f94289697e46f174d107af6a74f1493d04d75a0f6d1e5052f92d5...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 9c868bec-c753-4c6d-ad59-c50f7496e401, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'quantifying IVOC emissions and oxidation kinetics for SOA formation'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为BVOCs（特别是异戊二烯）对中国的近地面臭氧和SOA形成有显著影响，异戊二烯是北京地区臭氧形成主要贡献者（占50%），也是中国BSOA主导来源。,理由是提供关键背景：综述多项中国本土研究（Mo等2018；Qin等2018），但未包含深挖线索或原创数据。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Isoprene SOA', 'Ozone formation potential', 'BSOA formation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': 'Modeling and laboratory studies have shown that BVOC emissions can affect surface ozone and SOA. With the remarkable economic development and rapid increase of fossil fuel consumption, the air quality in China has deteriorated in recent years. Ground-level ozone pollution has become a major air quality issue in China. In addition, heavy pollution episodes exceeding 120 ppbv often occur in metropolis clusters such as Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei, the Yangtze River Delta and Sichuan Basin. A better understanding of the causes of elevated ozone in China is critical to develop effective emissions control strategies. Biogenic SOA (BSOA) is a major pollutant worldwide. Because of the large anthropogenic emission sources in China, anthropogenic SOA could be comparable to BSOA. Ding et al. (2014) analyzed SOA tracers from isoprene, monoterpenes, sesquiterpene and aromatics in China and found that isoprene and aromatics are primary contributors to SOA. Mo et al. (2018) investigated the contribution of biogenic isoprene emissions to ground-level ozone formation based on ground-based measurements in Beijing and found that isoprene emissions accounted for half of the total ozone formation potential. Qin et al. (2018) employed the CMAQ model to simulate isoprene-derived and monoterpene-derived BSOA formation in China, and the results indicated that isoprenederived BSOA dominates BSOA formation in China. However, those studies focused only on a specific temporal period or regional scale. The overall impact of BVOC emissions on ground-level ozone and SOA formation in China remains unclear and must be addressed.', 'summary': 'Modeling and laboratory studies have shown that BVOC emissions can affect surface ozone and SOA. With the remarkable economic development and rapid in...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 27006a1e-4b0d-4e16-a1c3-cd008ed4d527, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'IVOC oxidation mechanisms under low-NOx conditions'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为后验NMVOC排放估算显示：甲醛观测驱动排放减少（特别针对仅生产甲醛的化合物，如≥C4烷烃），而glyoxal观测驱动排放增加（对主要生产glyoxal的化合物，如ethene和芳香烃）；isoprene排放减少归因于甲醛观测权重更高。,理由是证据涉及源排放反演模型（如PMF）和观测数据，与VOCs来源解析相关，但未提供深挖线索（如Paper ID），适合作为上下文参考。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Adjoint inversion', 'Positive matrix factorization (PMF)', 'Proton transfer reaction mass spectrometry (PTR-MS)']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': 'less effective in bringing agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations (Table S8). Figure 2 shows that the a posteriori NMVOC emission estimates from IE-2 were lower than the a priori estimates for all months. This was due to a combination of factors at work in the inversion. The low formaldehyde observations from OMI in all months drove a large reduction in the emissions of NMVOCs that produced only formaldehyde  $(\\geq C_4$  alkanes and  $\\geq C_3$  alkenes from anthropogenic activities, as well as primary formaldehyde from biomass burning). At the same time, the relatively high glyoxal observations from OMI drove an increase in the emissions of NMVOCs that produced mainly glyoxal (ethene, ethyne, and aromatics from anthropogenic activities, as well as primary glyoxal from biomass burning). For precursors that produced large amounts of both formaldehyde and glyoxal (most importantly biogenic isoprene), the inversion reduced the top-down emissions as the formaldehyde observations had more weight in the cost function than the glyoxal observations due to the lower observational errors in the formaldehyde VCDs. These findings showed the importance of well-characterized retrievals with reliable error estimates in inversion studies.', 'summary': 'less effective in bringing agreement with the OMI glyoxal observations (Table S8). Figure 2 shows that the a posteriori NMVOC emission estimates from ...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 0f1e531d-74af-4b73-8550-f14b9d511ba4, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'quantifying IVOC emissions and oxidation kinetics for SOA formation'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为VOC源解析对冬季PM2.5控制至关重要，现有两种OFP/SOAP估算方法中，排放清单法因依赖国外排放因子存在较大不确定性，而源谱测量法缺乏多源同步数据支撑。,理由是明确指出VOC与PM2.5污染的因果关系及当前研究方法缺陷，引出对本地化排放因子和同步测量方案的深挖需求。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['VOC source apportionment', 'OFP estimation', 'local emission factors']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Source apportionment of volatile organic compounds', 'text': 'Currently, stringent controls on VOCs are needed to mitigate  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in winter (Huang et al., 2014). The estimation of ozone formation potential (OFP) and SOA of each VOC source is vital before cost-effective strategies can be carried out. Indeed, many researches have been done on determining the most reactive VOC sources. Generally, there are two methods to estimate the OFP or SOA formation potential (SOAP) of each VOC source. One is the speciated VOC emission inventory (Zheng et al., 2009; Liang et al., 2017; Wu et al., 2017; Wu and Xie, 2017) and the other refers to the field measurement of VOC profiles from source emissions. The emission inventory method is sensitive to emission factors, and most of these speciated inventory studies in China always adopted emission factors from studies conducted in foreign countries or other regions, which had large uncertainty (Zhang et al., 2013; Wang, 2014; Wu and Xie, 2017). The local VOC emission inventory is still insufficient (Li et al., 2017), mainly due to the complexity of obtaining emission factors and accurate source activity data.\n\nMeanwhile, the source-specific measurements and emission inventory establishing works are costly. In practice, the estimation of photochemical characteristics (i.e., OFP) with measured VOC source profiles is continuously being reported. For instance, the OFP of gasoline evaporation (Zhang et al., 2013), solvent usage (Wang, 2014), non-coal emission (He et al., 2015), petroleum refinery emission (Zhang et al., 2017), and thermal power plant (Yan et al., 2017) have been done. However, the lack of synchronous measurements of various sources may obstruct the understanding which source contributing most to the ambient ozone and SOA formation.', 'summary': 'Currently, stringent controls on VOCs are needed to mitigate  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in winter (Huang et al., 2014). The estimation of ozone f...'}, 来自论文ID: source_apportionment_of_volatile_organic_compounds, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: c3b1ba3f-c803-4e14-95fd-8708b3a2f212, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2017年中国BVOC排放量达23.54Tg/年，夏季导致BTH/SCB/YRD/PRD地区臭氧浓度最高增加47μg/m³，且70%的SOA来自生物源；人为排放与生物排放相互作用可提升60%生物源SOA形成,理由是量化展示BVOC对臭氧/SOA的区域影响及人为-生物排放耦合机制，包含模型情景分析(WRF-CMAQ)和关键数据峰值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEGAN model', 'biogenic SOA formation', 'VOC-limited urban areas', 'anthropogenic-biogenic interaction']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': "Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOC) play an important role in global environmental chemistry and climate. In the present work, biogenic emissions from China in 2017 were estimated based on the Model of Emissions of Gases and Aerosols from Nature (MEGAN). The effects of BVOC emissions on ozone and secondary organic aerosol (SOA) formation were investigated using the WRF-CMAQ modeling system. Three parallel scenarios were developed to assess the impact of BVOC emissions on China's ozone and SOA formation in July 2017. Biogenic emissions were estimated at  $23.54\\mathrm{Tg / yr}$ , with a peak in the summer and decreasing from southern to northern China. The high BVOC emissions across eastern and southwestern China increased the surface ozone levels, particularly in the BTH (Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei), SCB (Sichuan Basin), YRD (Yangtze River Delta) and central PRD (Pearl River Delta) regions, with increases of up to  $47\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  due to the sensitivity of VOC-limited urban areas. In summer, most SOA concentrations formed over China are from biogenic sources (national average of  $70\\%$ ). And SOA concentrations in YRD and SCB regions are generally higher than other regions. Excluding anthropogenic emissions while keeping biogenic emissions unchanged results that SOA concentrations reduce by  $60\\%$  over China, which indicates that anthropogenic emissions can interact with biogenic emissions then facilitate biogenic SOA formation. It is suggested that controlling anthropogenic emissions would result in reduction of both anthropogenic and biogenic SOA.\n\n# 1. Introduction", 'summary': 'Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOC) play an important role in global environmental chemistry and climate. In the present work, biogenic emissio...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 0e26e3a6-efcc-45be-86de-5db0cc1f4815, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'secondary organic aerosol formation mechanisms'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为BVOCs占全球VOC排放90%以上，尤其异戊二烯/单萜类通过氧化反应主导SOA生成和新粒子形成，MEGAN模型基于植物功能型(PFT)构建排放基准。,理由是仅重复基础BVOC常识（排放占比/反应路径），未提供新数据或模型改进方案，与核心问题关联较弱。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Estimation of biogenic VOC emissions and their cor', 'text': 'Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOCs) emitted from terrestrial ecosystems have substantial effects on the global climate and environmental chemistry. Previous studies have shown that up to  $90\\%$  of the total VOC emissions are derived from biogenic sources (Guenther et al. 1995). BVOCs such as isoprene, monoterpenes and sesquiterpenes participate in oxidative chemical reactions in the atmosphere with oxidants such as ozone, OH and  $\\mathrm{NO}_3$  radicals. In addition, BVOCs are major sources of secondary organic aerosols (SOA) and new particle formation (Hallquist et al. 2009; Kulmala et al. 2004; Paasonen et al. 2013; Kota et al. 2015). Measurements and modeling of BVOC emissions are of vital importance to understand the carbon cycle, biosphere-atmosphere interactions and climate change (Gu et al. 2017; Hantson et al. 2017).\n\nOver the past few decades, research has been focused on four objectives: (1) developing and improving BVOC instruments and technology, (2) quantifying the effects of BVOC emissions, (3) developing and improving BVOC emission models, and (4) understanding the mechanisms underlying the interactions of BVOCs with anthropogenic volatile organic compounds (AVOCs). Most BVOCs are highly reactive and readily interact with oxidants, consequently influencing the atmospheric composition. Therefore, accurately estimating the BVOC emissions can improve the results of studies of the effects of BVOCs on the regional and global air quality and climate systems (Makkonen et al. 2012).\n\nBVOC emissions are calculated with models, and the Model of Emissions of Gases and Aerosols from Nature (MEGAN) is one of the models commonly used (Guenther et al. 2006). The standard emission potential of a plant depends on the plant functional type (PFT) and its', 'summary': 'Biogenic volatile organic compounds (BVOCs) emitted from terrestrial ecosystems have substantial effects on the global climate and environmental chemi...'}, 来自论文ID: estimation_of_biogenic_voc_emissions_and_their_cor, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图片对比反演模型（OptS2）与实测数据在垂直剖面的差异，并展示生物源甲醇排放通量分布。,理由是聚焦生物挥发物甲醇的空间反演，与工业源O3前体研究关联度低，且缺乏污染机制深度分析。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['space-based retrieval', 'biogenic methanol']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'First space-based derivation of the global atmosph', 'text': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/d37cfd76-9186-461a-b151-d4a4964dc373/452e68eac316bccbf5f390f2eda70449cdc11da5c25056a90ceb091057cbb50c.jpg)  \nFig. 14. Annually averaged biogenic methanol emissions derived by the inversion OptS1, which uses the Jacob et al. (2005) biogenic sources as a priori, and by the standard OptS2 inversion. Units are  $10^{10}\\mathrm{molcm}^{-2}\\mathrm{s}^{-1}$ .', 'summary': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/d37cfd76-9186-461a-b151-d4a4964dc373/452e68eac316bccbf5f390f2eda70449cdc11da5c25056a90ceb0910...'}, 来自论文ID: first_space-based_derivation_of_the_global_atmosph, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 2eee58e1-3a49-4d90-b3d2-2b4203921418, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'low-NOx pathways for glyoxal formation from aromatics oxidation'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为模型更新了甲醛和glyoxal的化学机制，包括Henry定律常数调整（从3.6×10⁵更新至4.19×10⁵）和湿气溶胶表面吸附系数（γ=2.9×10⁻³），以提升GEOS-Chem模型的准确性。,理由是提供模型优化细节并引用多篇文献（Fu et al. 2008; Mao et al. 2013），但未包含可深挖的图表或明确探索路径。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['GEOS-Chem adjoint', "Henry's law constant"]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'Adjoint inversion of Chinese non-methane volatile ', 'text': "Formaldehyde and glyoxal in the GEOS-Chem model were both removed by photolysis, as well as dry and wet deposition (Fu et al., 2008). We updated the Henry's law constant for glyoxal from  $3.6 \\times 10^{5} \\times \\exp [7.2 \\times 10^{3} \\times (1 / T - 1 / 298)]$  (Fu et al., 2008) to  $4.19 \\times 10^{5} \\times \\exp [(62.2 \\times 10^{3} / R) \\times (1 / T - 1 / 298)]$  (Ip et al., 2009) and added the dry deposition of formaldehyde, glyoxal, methylglyoxal, and glycolaldehyde on leaves (Mao et al., 2013). In addition, we assumed that glyoxal was reactively taken up by wet aerosols and cloud droplets with an uptake coefficient  $\\gamma = 2.9 \\times 10^{-3}$  (Liggio et al., 2005; Fu et al., 2008). All other physical and chemical processes in our forward model were as described in Fu et al. (2008).\n\nFor the forward model described above, we developed the adjoint by modifying the standard GEOS-Chem adjoint (version 34) (Henze et al., 2007). We used the Kinetic PreProcessor (KPP) (Daescu et al., 2003; Sandu et al., 2003) to construct the adjoint of the updated photochemical mechanism. Adjoint algorithms were updated to include the emission and deposition processes of formaldehyde and glyoxal precursors. The aqueous uptake rate of glyoxal by wet aerosols was a function of the ambient glyoxal concentration and the total wet aerosol surface area (Fu et al., 2008). We linearized this uptake process in the backward integrations by using the\n\narchived wet aerosol surface areas from the forward simulations.", 'summary': 'Formaldehyde and glyoxal in the GEOS-Chem model were both removed by photolysis, as well as dry and wet deposition (Fu et al., 2008). We updated the H...'}, 来自论文ID: adjoint_inversion_of_chinese_non-methane_volatile_, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: 402b8851-355f-45fd-8b34-606d56f187ba, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'end-of-pipe technology implementation in developing countries'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HTAP_v2.2排放清单揭示：亚洲59%SO2来自能源部门（燃煤电厂），32%来自制造业；国际航运贡献全球10%SO2和超10%NOx。,理由是提供关键排放源定量分配数据（含具体百分比），明确了跨境污染传输路径，对区域预测模型构建有核心价值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HTAP_v2.2', 'shipping emission tracks', 'sectoral SO2 allocation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'title': 'HTAP_v2.2_ a mosaic of regional and global emissio', 'text': 'The Asian region is still characterised by a relatively large contribution of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  from (coal fired) power plants and manufacturing industry. Most of the  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emitted in North America and Europe comes from coal power plants. However, in Europe Fig. 2a shows that  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  is also emitted from the residential and waste disposal sector. Residential (heating and cooking) and waste disposal sources are particularly relevant in Africa. High annual  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emissions are also observed for India, to which the energy sector contributes  $59\\%$  and the energy-intensive manufacturing industry (iron and steel)  $32\\%$ , also both using coking and bituminous coal according to IEA (2013). Finally, international shipping contributes  $\\sim 10\\%$  to the global  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  emissions.  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  grid maps clearly show the ship emission tracks connecting Asia and Europe with Africa and America.\n\n# 3.1.2  $\\mathbf{NO}_x$\n\nFigure 2b shows that the major sources of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  are ground transport and power generation and these source contributions show a rather uniform feature for all the considered regions. In Central and South America, major emissions are attributed to the transportation sector and just to a minor extent to the energy sector (e.g. in Mexico  $65\\%$  of the  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions originate from road transport). Those industrialised countries with a large share of natural gas as fuel for heating houses and commercial centres and for industry (such as Canada, the Netherlands, Norway) show relatively high emissions of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ : the share of the residential and industry  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions is around  $30\\%$  of the total  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , whereas in USA this is only  $20\\%$ . International shipping and, in particular, aviation contribute together more than  $10\\%$  of global  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions.\n\n# 3.1.3 CO', 'summary': 'The Asian region is still characterised by a relatively large contribution of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  from (coal fired) power plants and manufacturing indus...'}, 来自论文ID: htap_v2.2__a_mosaic_of_regional_and_global_emissio, 关键词: None
